name: Tom Fitton
subject: What is Special Counsel Durham Up To?
body:
Court Hearing on Left’s Illegal Quotas

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES DOJ FOR EMAILS BETWEEN JOHN DURHAM AND AG GARLAND

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26941&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1nbGlUSl9PMHVJWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
Last year Senators Ron Johnson and Chuck Grassley raised
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26937&F=T&]
concerns about whether the Justice Department was in potential
conflict with the Durham Special Counsel investigation because a
senior Justice official, Susan Hennessey, had previously made
statements attacking the Durham investigation.

The senators said, in December 2021, that Hennessey “expressed a
clear partisan bias against the Special Counsel’s investigation,”
referring to one of her tweets
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26938&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93ZWIuYXJjaGl2ZS5vcmcvd2ViLzIwMjAxMjAxMjAyNjIxL2h0dHBzOi90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9TdXNhbl9IZW5uZXNzZXkvc3RhdHVzLzEzMzM4Njg4MjQzNDk4NTU3NDRdOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==
“Durham has made abundantly clear that in a year and a half, he
hasn't come up with anything. I guess this kind of partisan silliness
has become characteristic of Barr's legacy, but unclear to me why
Durham would want to go along with it.”

To explore this, we filed a FOIA suit against the Department of
Justice for records of communication between Special Counsel John
Durham and Attorney General Merrick Garland (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v.
U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26942&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWR1cmhhbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA3MzQvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=
(No. 1:22-cv-00734)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the DOJ failed to respond to our August 23, 2021, FOIA request for:

1. All records of communication, including emails and text messages,
between Special Counsel John Durham and Attorney General Merrick
Garland.

2. All budget records related to the operations of the office of
Special Counsel John Durham.
Durham’s investigation began in May 2019, and he was officially
designated
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26939&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvZmlsZS8xMzcwOTMxL2Rvd25sb2FkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
as Special
Counsel in October 2020.

It shouldn’t take a federal lawsuit to get answers to simple
requests for information about Garland’s communications with Durham
and basic budget documents about the Durham Special Counsel operation.

JUDICIAL WATCH FILES BRIEF SUPPORTING LAWYERS IN 2020 ELECTION
CHALLENGES

The Left seeks to retaliate against anyone who questioned the 2020
election.

We filed an _amicus curiae_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26931&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2tpbmctZXQtYWwtYW5kLXBvd2VsbC12LXdoaXRtZXItZXQtYWwtYW1pY3VzLTE3ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(friend of the court) brief in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Sixth
Circuit supporting Sidney Powell’s appeal of sanctions levied
against her and her associates in Michigan 2020 election challenges.

We argue that the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of
Michigan abused its discretion in sanctioning Powell and other lawyers
in the case.

Our brief comes in the case _King, et al. v. Whitmer, et al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26930&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWljaGlnYW4uZ292L2RvY3VtZW50cy9hZy8xNzJfb3Bpbmlvbl9fb3JkZXJfS2luZ183MzM3ODZfNy5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=],
(Appeal No. 21-1786), in which Powell and other attorneys ask the
appeals court to reverse the lower court’s order sanctioning them.

We argue that improperly sanctioning lawyers for bringing civil rights
litigation on elections will have a chilling effect:

Voting and election litigation constitute some of the most
contentious, political forms of civil rights litigation. These
qualities are even more acute in postelection disputes where
litigation schedules are compressed and available information is
limited and often dynamic. Nevertheless, the prosecution (and defense)
of election disputes plays an important role in our electoral and
political process.

As a conservative advocacy group that often brings election and voting
lawsuits, including those to enforce federal and state election
integrity laws, Judicial Watch has a particular interest in the issues
at stake here. If the decision of the district court is affirmed, and
the Appellants are sanctioned, the precedent will be weaponized to
threaten legitimate parties prosecuting election integrity claims.
Courts sanctioning lawyers pursuing election law claims in the heat
of an election is a dangerous game that could allow election
corruption to go unchecked. The partisan retaliation and harassment of
lawyers involved in litigating the 2020 election dispute is
unprecedented and undermines the rule of law – and courts should not
take part in it.

HEARING HELD IN SUIT CHALLENGING CALIFORNIA’S QUOTAS FOR CORPORATE
BOARDS

We were in court this week for a hearing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26921&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1oZWFyaW5nLW9yZGVyLTM3NTEzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
in our taxpayer lawsuit challenging California’s racial, ethnicity,
and LGBT quotas for corporate boards of directors (_Robin Crest, et
al. v. Alex Padilla, in his official capacity as Secretary of State of
the State of California_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=20709&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMzc1MTMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(No. 20ST-CV-37513)).

The court heard the parties’ competing requests for summary
judgment. A trial is scheduled for May 2, 2022.

This action comes in the lawsuit we filed on October 2, 2020, in the
Superior Court of the State of California County of Los Angeles on
behalf of three California taxpayers (Robin Crest, Earl De Vires and
Judy De Vires) to prevent California from enforcing Assembly Bill 979
(AB 979). The bill requires that boards of directors of
California-based, publicly held domestic or foreign corporations
satisfy racial, ethnicity, and LGBT quotas by the end of the 2021
calendar year.

We argue that any expenditure of taxpayer funds or taxpayer-financed
resources on AB 979 is illegal under the California Constitution. A
Senate Floor Analysis produced during deliberation on the legislation
concluded the bill draws distinctions based on race and ethnicity, and
therefore, it is “suspect” and that “the existence of general
societal discrimination will not ordinarily satisfy courts.” Also,
according
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=20711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMzc1MTMtcGctNC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
to the Assembly Appropriations Committee, AB 979 “will result in
ongoing costs in the hundreds of thousands of dollars to gather
demographic information and compile a report on this data on its
internet website.”

In opposing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26923&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1vcHBvLW1vdGlvbi0zNzUxMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
the state’s effort to summarily end the taxpayer lawsuit, our
attorneys note:

AB 979 and Defendant’s justifications also plainly “embody
stereotypes that treat individuals as the product of their race,
[ethnicity, sexual orientation, or transgender status] evaluating
their thoughts and efforts—their very worth as citizens—according
to [] criterion[s] barred to the Government by history and the
Constitution.” In the end, AB 970 is simply a numerical set-aside
that amounts to racial, ethnic, and LGBT balancing. ([“Racial
balancing is not transformed from ‘patently unconstitutional’ to a
compelling state interest simply by relabeling it ‘racial
diversity.’”].)
(We completed a trial in a separate lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26924&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2xvc2luZy1hcmd1bWVudHMtY2EtZ2VuZGVyLXF1b3RhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
in
Los Angeles County Superior Court on behalf of California taxpayers to
prevent the state from implementing a 2018 law (SB 826) requiring
publicly-held corporations headquartered in California to have at
least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on
their boards by December 31, 2019 (_Robin Crest et al. v. Alex
Padilla_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=14906&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LWV0LWFsLXYtcGFkaWxsYS13b21lbi1vbi1ib2FyZHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTI3NTYxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
(No.19ST-CV-27561)).)

California would require corporate board quotas based on race,
ethnicity, and LGBT status. This law is the most significant attack in
the modern era on constitutional prohibitions against discrimination.
Our taxpayer clients seek to protect the rule of law and ensure that
taxpayer resources are not illegally used to advance blatant and
pernicious race and other discrimination.

AGENCY CREATED TO PROTECT TRANSPORT INVESTIGATES 3,800 ‘NON-MASKED
PASSENGERS’4

Our federal government fails at most everything it does but excels in
pestering – and fining – U.S. citizens, who pay its bills. Our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26943&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLWFnZW5jeS1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0ZXMtbm9uLW1hc2tlZC1wYXNzZW5nZXJzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
the details.

The Homeland Security agency created after the 2001 terrorist attacks
to protect the nation’s transportation system has been quite busy
investigating and fining travelers who do not wear masks to supposedly
slow the spread of COVID-19. From February 2021 when the face mask
security directive was implemented to March 2022, the Transportation
Security Administration (TSA) has investigated more than 3,800 cases
involving “non-masked passengers,” according to a federal audit.
The agency charged with preventing another 9/11 issued more than 2,700
warning notices and over 900 civil penalties against passengers who
violated the mask mandate, the probe found. The average fine was $699.

The Government Accountability Office (GAO), the investigative arm of
Congress, conducted the audit and issued a report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26944&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2FvLmdvdi9hc3NldHMvZ2FvLTIyLTEwNDU4My5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
this week with the
findings. Because the TSA is responsible for securing the nation’s
transportation sector, it issues security directives if threat
information, events, or significant vulnerabilities indicate that
additional security measures are needed. In this case, surface
transportation operators within the U.S. were ordered to implement
face mask requirements for passengers and employees because the
Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) determined that
multi-person transportation modes potentially increase the risk of
spreading COVID-19 because travelers are in close proximity to others
in enclosed spaces where physical distancing is not possible.

It appears that the TSA, not exactly known for its competence, was
more efficient than ever in cracking down on mask violators.
Congressional investigators found that the agency issued the COVID-19
directives in less than a week and “expedited coordination with
external stakeholders—other federal agencies and industry—to
develop and issue these directives, due to the urgent nature of the
COVID-19 pandemic.” Not everyone was happy. “While selected
external stakeholders raised several issues with the security
directives, they stated that TSA’s expedited coordination was
generally effective,” the GAO writes. Some may wonder if
health-related issues fall under the security threats that Congress
created the TSA to deal with. Not really, but the TSA claims that the
introduction or spread of a communicable disease through the
transportation sector is a threat that allows it to exercise its
authority as needed, including the authority to issue security
directives.

Coinciding with the report highlighting the TSA’s mask policing
duties, new research
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26945&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaWF0YS5vcmcvY29udGVudGFzc2V0cy8zMWY5NzZjYjVkZTA0MjdjYmU0YTg1OTU4ODU3YTQ3Mi9veGVyYS5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
conducted by a European consulting and health group shows travel
restrictions failed to prevent the spread of COVID-19. Even when
travel restrictions are implemented immediately after the discovery of
a new variant, it only delays infection peaks by a maximum of four
days, researchers found. By the time restrictions are issued, the new
variant has likely been circulating in communities worldwide,
according to the study. “Air travel restrictions do not affect the
size of the peak,” researchers write, adding that “introducing air
passenger testing does not affect the height of the peak of cases,
relative to not having any restrictions in place. This holds even when
travel volumes are high.” The study has led the International Air
Transport Association (IATA) and Airports Council International Europe
to call for an end to all COVID restrictions, including mask mandates.

The TSA’s “security directive” for mask use on public
transportation and transportation hubs has been extended through April
18. The agency will continue to crack down on violators, issuing
warning notices and civil penalty fines against passengers. First-time
offenders typically get warning notices and “repeat offenders” get
slapped with civil penalties of up to $1,500. Because so many
passengers refused to comply with the face mask requirement, last fall
the TSA expanded the list of aggravating factors that qualify a
violator for a monetary civil penalty to include instances of defiant
behavior while refusing to wear a face mask and repeated removal or
improper use of a face mask after being instructed to wear one. The
agency also increased the penalties, with first-time offenders
receiving $500 to $1,000 fines and repeat offenders fines of up to
$3,000. The overwhelming majority of mask incidents investigated
occurred onboard aircrafts.

As the TSA does an impeccable job chasing non-masked passengers, its
lapses in more serious areas come to mind. They include missing guns
and bombs during covert exercises known as “red team tests
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26946&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmxvZy8yMDEwLzEyL3RzYS1taXNzZXMtZ3Vucy1ib21icy10ZXN0cy9dLOKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==
TSA agents literally sleeping on the job
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=12160&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmxvZy8yMDEzLzA4L3RzYS1hc2xlZXAtb24tdGhlLWpvYi1saXRlcmFsbHkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
and stealing from passengers, the failure to properly screen luggage
and a number of other violations that have risked national security.
Records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=12161&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmxvZy8yMDE1LzA1L2p3LWdldHMtdHNhLWZpbGVzLW9mLWxvc3QtYmFkZ2VzLXVzZWQtdG8tZW50ZXItc2VjdXJlLWFyZWFzLWF0LWFpcnBvcnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
obtained by Judicial Watch a few years ago show hundreds of badges
that allow agents to access secure areas of airports went missing
along with uniforms and other devices used to control entry. Last year
a federal audit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26947&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2FvLmdvdi9hc3NldHMvNzIwLzcxMjU5NS5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
disclosed
that nearly 2 million workers with unescorted access to security
restricted areas at airports throughout the U.S. could pose an
“insider threat” as the TSA studies how to curb the risk. The
agency is supposed to submit a plan to Congress examining the cost and
feasibility of enhanced worker screening measures at American

FOURTH DEPORTATION FOR ILLEGAL ALIEN ARRESTED THREE TIMES BY U.S.
POLICE
Fourth time’s the charm? I doubt it. Here’s a case study of the
danger created by the Biden border crisis. Our _Corruption Chronicles_
blog tells
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58342&L=26932&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm91cnRoLWRlcG9ydGF0aW9uLWZvci1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVuLXdhbnRlZC1mb3ItbXVyZGVyLWluLW1leGljby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
the story.

How porous is the southern border? An illegal immigrant arrested three
times by local police in the U.S. and wanted for murder in Mexico just
got deported for the fourth time. Immigration and Customs Enforcement
(ICE) classifies the Mexican national, Rafael Silverio Rojas, as a
“noncitizen foreign fugitive.” This month the agency’s
Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) handed Rojas to Mexican
authorities at the international boundary of the Lincoln/Juarez Bridge
in Laredo, Texas. Rojas, who is 26 years old, had been removed from
the U.S. on three previous occasions before the most recent encounter.
Somehow the fugitive managed to enter the country through the southern
border again and again.

Roja’s history of illegal border crossings began in 2017 when the
U.S. Border Patrol sent him back home in early July after an
apprehension. He was removed twice in 2020, according to ICE, before
being arrested by ERO officers in Laredo on February 23. The fugitive
illegal immigrant was also arrested by the Laredo Police Department on
three occasions for assault and bodily injury in 2021, federal
authorities reveal. In late October of 2018, Mexican authorities in
Guanajuato, in the country’s central region, issued a warrant for
Rojas’ arrest. He is wanted for homicide. A Guanajuato newspaper
article about Rojas’ latest deportation says Guanajuato is the
Mexican state that saw the most migrants deported by the Trump
administration. Of 89,000 Mexicans “repatriated” in the first five
months of the Trump administration, the story says 6,566 were from
Guanajuato.

It is no secret that there is a national security and humanitarian
crisis along the famously porous southern border and the Rojas case is
just another example of how dire the situation is. Last year the
federal government reported record-breaking Mexican border arrests.
Federal agents apprehended an astounding 1,659,206 illegal immigrants
at the southwest border in 2021, breaking the previous high of
1,643,679 in 2000. In the fiscal year of 2020, federal agents only
arrested 400,651 on the southern border. The upsurge in just one year
is difficult to grasp. Eight of the nine Border Patrol sectors saw
triple-digit percentage increases in illegal immigrants over last year
and one, Yuma in Arizona, reported an eye-popping 1,200.4% hike in
apprehensions. The agency’s Del Rio sector in Texas had an
unbelievable 542.7% surge. The Rio Grande Valley sector, also in
Texas, saw a 508.7% increase and led all stations with 549,000
arrests. Del Rio reported 259,000 apprehensions which surpassed Border
Patrol divisions in Texas and Arizona that typically see more traffic.
Two other Texas stations, Big Bend and El Paso, recorded apprehension
gains of 331.9% and 256.5% respectively. Big Bend and El Centro in
California were the only sectors that did not see six-digit
apprehensions this year, though both reported major increases over
2020—331.9% for Big Bend and 115.4% for El Centro.

Like Rojas, most of the illegal aliens (608,000) arrested by the U.S.
in 2021 came from Mexico followed by the Central American nations of
Honduras (309,000), Guatemala (279,000) and El Salvador (96,000). In
the last month of the fiscal year, migrants from those four Latin
American countries accounted for well over half (63.7%) of
apprehensions along the Mexican border. The final month of the fiscal
year, which ended in September, also saw a final spike of migrants
from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even
China (75%). The number of illegal aliens from Russia nearly doubled
from 758 to 1,432 during the same period, according to year-end stats
provided the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). The Biden
administration partially dealt with the onslaught by dispersing
hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants throughout the U.S. The
administration’s open border policies are also slamming the
overwhelmed U.S. immigration court system, creating the largest
backlog of cases in history. At the end of December pending cases
reached a shocking 1,596,193, according to government figures.

Fiscal year 2022 also started with a bang, a 137% increase in the
first quarter over the final quarter of 2021. In the first three
months of 2022, Border Patrol figures show 496,148 migrant encounters
compared to 209,342 from October to December of 2021.
Until next week ...

clean_body: Court Hearing on Left’s Illegal Quotas [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES DOJ FOR EMAILS BETWEEN JOHN DURHAM AND AG GARLAND [==] Last year Senators Ron Johnson and Chuck Grassley raised [==] concerns about whether the Justice Department was in potential conflict with the Durham Special Counsel investigation because a senior Justice official, Susan Hennessey, had previously made statements attacking the Durham investigation. The senators said, in December 2021, that Hennessey “expressed a clear partisan bias against the Special Counsel’s investigation,” referring to one of her tweets [== “Durham has made abundantly clear that in a year and a half, he hasn't come up with anything. I guess this kind of partisan silliness has become characteristic of Barr's legacy, but unclear to me why Durham would want to go along with it.” To explore this, we filed a FOIA suit against the Department of Justice for records of communication between Special Counsel John Durham and Attorney General Merrick Garland (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [= (No. 1:22-cv-00734)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the DOJ failed to respond to our August 23, 2021, FOIA request for: 1. All records of communication, including emails and text messages, between Special Counsel John Durham and Attorney General Merrick Garland. 2. All budget records related to the operations of the office of Special Counsel John Durham. Durham’s investigation began in May 2019, and he was officially designated [] as Special Counsel in October 2020. It shouldn’t take a federal lawsuit to get answers to simple requests for information about Garland’s communications with Durham and basic budget documents about the Durham Special Counsel operation. JUDICIAL WATCH FILES BRIEF SUPPORTING LAWYERS IN 2020 ELECTION CHALLENGES The Left seeks to retaliate against anyone who questioned the 2020 election. We filed an amicus curiae [] (friend of the court) brief in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit supporting Sidney Powell’s appeal of sanctions levied against her and her associates in Michigan 2020 election challenges. We argue that the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Michigan abused its discretion in sanctioning Powell and other lawyers in the case. Our brief comes in the case King, et al. v. Whitmer, et al. [=], (Appeal No. 21-1786), in which Powell and other attorneys ask the appeals court to reverse the lower court’s order sanctioning them. We argue that improperly sanctioning lawyers for bringing civil rights litigation on elections will have a chilling effect: Voting and election litigation constitute some of the most contentious, political forms of civil rights litigation. These qualities are even more acute in postelection disputes where litigation schedules are compressed and available information is limited and often dynamic. Nevertheless, the prosecution (and defense) of election disputes plays an important role in our electoral and political process. As a conservative advocacy group that often brings election and voting lawsuits, including those to enforce federal and state election integrity laws, Judicial Watch has a particular interest in the issues at stake here. If the decision of the district court is affirmed, and the Appellants are sanctioned, the precedent will be weaponized to threaten legitimate parties prosecuting election integrity claims. Courts sanctioning lawyers pursuing election law claims in the heat of an election is a dangerous game that could allow election corruption to go unchecked. The partisan retaliation and harassment of lawyers involved in litigating the 2020 election dispute is unprecedented and undermines the rule of law – and courts should not take part in it. HEARING HELD IN SUIT CHALLENGING CALIFORNIA’S QUOTAS FOR CORPORATE BOARDS We were in court this week for a hearing [==] in our taxpayer lawsuit challenging California’s racial, ethnicity, and LGBT quotas for corporate boards of directors (Robin Crest, et al. v. Alex Padilla, in his official capacity as Secretary of State of the State of California [] (No. 20ST-CV-37513)). The court heard the parties’ competing requests for summary judgment. A trial is scheduled for May 2, 2022. This action comes in the lawsuit we filed on October 2, 2020, in the Superior Court of the State of California County of Los Angeles on behalf of three California taxpayers (Robin Crest, Earl De Vires and Judy De Vires) to prevent California from enforcing Assembly Bill 979 (AB 979). The bill requires that boards of directors of California-based, publicly held domestic or foreign corporations satisfy racial, ethnicity, and LGBT quotas by the end of the 2021 calendar year. We argue that any expenditure of taxpayer funds or taxpayer-financed resources on AB 979 is illegal under the California Constitution. A Senate Floor Analysis produced during deliberation on the legislation concluded the bill draws distinctions based on race and ethnicity, and therefore, it is “suspect” and that “the existence of general societal discrimination will not ordinarily satisfy courts.” Also, according [=] to the Assembly Appropriations Committee, AB 979 “will result in ongoing costs in the hundreds of thousands of dollars to gather demographic information and compile a report on this data on its internet website.” In opposing [=] the state’s effort to summarily end the taxpayer lawsuit, our attorneys note: AB 979 and Defendant’s justifications also plainly “embody stereotypes that treat individuals as the product of their race, [ethnicity, sexual orientation, or transgender status] evaluating their thoughts and efforts—their very worth as citizens—according to [] criterion[s] barred to the Government by history and the Constitution.” In the end, AB 970 is simply a numerical set-aside that amounts to racial, ethnic, and LGBT balancing. ([“Racial balancing is not transformed from ‘patently unconstitutional’ to a compelling state interest simply by relabeling it ‘racial diversity.’”].) (We completed a trial in a separate lawsuit [==] in Los Angeles County Superior Court on behalf of California taxpayers to prevent the state from implementing a 2018 law (SB 826) requiring publicly-held corporations headquartered in California to have at least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on their boards by December 31, 2019 (Robin Crest et al. v. Alex Padilla [==] (No.19ST-CV-27561)).) California would require corporate board quotas based on race, ethnicity, and LGBT status. This law is the most significant attack in the modern era on constitutional prohibitions against discrimination. Our taxpayer clients seek to protect the rule of law and ensure that taxpayer resources are not illegally used to advance blatant and pernicious race and other discrimination. AGENCY CREATED TO PROTECT TRANSPORT INVESTIGATES 3,800 ‘NON-MASKED PASSENGERS’4 Our federal government fails at most everything it does but excels in pestering – and fining – U.S. citizens, who pay its bills. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [==] the details. The Homeland Security agency created after the 2001 terrorist attacks to protect the nation’s transportation system has been quite busy investigating and fining travelers who do not wear masks to supposedly slow the spread of COVID-19. From February 2021 when the face mask security directive was implemented to March 2022, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) has investigated more than 3,800 cases involving “non-masked passengers,” according to a federal audit. The agency charged with preventing another 9/11 issued more than 2,700 warning notices and over 900 civil penalties against passengers who violated the mask mandate, the probe found. The average fine was $699. The Government Accountability Office (GAO), the investigative arm of Congress, conducted the audit and issued a report [=] this week with the findings. Because the TSA is responsible for securing the nation’s transportation sector, it issues security directives if threat information, events, or significant vulnerabilities indicate that additional security measures are needed. In this case, surface transportation operators within the U.S. were ordered to implement face mask requirements for passengers and employees because the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) determined that multi-person transportation modes potentially increase the risk of spreading COVID-19 because travelers are in close proximity to others in enclosed spaces where physical distancing is not possible. It appears that the TSA, not exactly known for its competence, was more efficient than ever in cracking down on mask violators. Congressional investigators found that the agency issued the COVID-19 directives in less than a week and “expedited coordination with external stakeholders—other federal agencies and industry—to develop and issue these directives, due to the urgent nature of the COVID-19 pandemic.” Not everyone was happy. “While selected external stakeholders raised several issues with the security directives, they stated that TSA’s expedited coordination was generally effective,” the GAO writes. Some may wonder if health-related issues fall under the security threats that Congress created the TSA to deal with. Not really, but the TSA claims that the introduction or spread of a communicable disease through the transportation sector is a threat that allows it to exercise its authority as needed, including the authority to issue security directives. Coinciding with the report highlighting the TSA’s mask policing duties, new research [=] conducted by a European consulting and health group shows travel restrictions failed to prevent the spread of COVID-19. Even when travel restrictions are implemented immediately after the discovery of a new variant, it only delays infection peaks by a maximum of four days, researchers found. By the time restrictions are issued, the new variant has likely been circulating in communities worldwide, according to the study. “Air travel restrictions do not affect the size of the peak,” researchers write, adding that “introducing air passenger testing does not affect the height of the peak of cases, relative to not having any restrictions in place. This holds even when travel volumes are high.” The study has led the International Air Transport Association (IATA) and Airports Council International Europe to call for an end to all COVID restrictions, including mask mandates. The TSA’s “security directive” for mask use on public transportation and transportation hubs has been extended through April 18. The agency will continue to crack down on violators, issuing warning notices and civil penalty fines against passengers. First-time offenders typically get warning notices and “repeat offenders” get slapped with civil penalties of up to $1,500. Because so many passengers refused to comply with the face mask requirement, last fall the TSA expanded the list of aggravating factors that qualify a violator for a monetary civil penalty to include instances of defiant behavior while refusing to wear a face mask and repeated removal or improper use of a face mask after being instructed to wear one. The agency also increased the penalties, with first-time offenders receiving $500 to $1,000 fines and repeat offenders fines of up to $3,000. The overwhelming majority of mask incidents investigated occurred onboard aircrafts. As the TSA does an impeccable job chasing non-masked passengers, its lapses in more serious areas come to mind. They include missing guns and bombs during covert exercises known as “red team tests [== TSA agents literally sleeping on the job [] and stealing from passengers, the failure to properly screen luggage and a number of other violations that have risked national security. Records [==] obtained by Judicial Watch a few years ago show hundreds of badges that allow agents to access secure areas of airports went missing along with uniforms and other devices used to control entry. Last year a federal audit [=] disclosed that nearly 2 million workers with unescorted access to security restricted areas at airports throughout the U.S. could pose an “insider threat” as the TSA studies how to curb the risk. The agency is supposed to submit a plan to Congress examining the cost and feasibility of enhanced worker screening measures at American airports. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8kjm0l36oecqtndi171gi7oqo9gh9dclqvc2960_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2o32cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4ctgsap7cohi68oeccrn6oqe6tlgelqj2pdl6qo6ddj26pgbbcdlmpjb8pj663jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8rmcc9n6kp6fdj2coon1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zblt471ktp5ar178nfgg80bgtu537ahspt92kmeg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2o32cth238h5e8he48ejm2on2s3mebjqf9jl6oqn4t9jkgprac9nm5pqcdtlmugn1dtlmgr7bdtiekr7fdhkmkon9tt663i32cj4skqmcdr46dhm4d726pie4or56vin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu448n2mh5a4sj4lonbdulmkoj9dblmnijbcp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4o32c9g6cp34sv9125onq5apcluh25bt4l8jiv8585d42g9p49fg)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze3p14bq5ltdodc7qo0ro30ulmpr8uqvc591alrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2p74cdh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6sooenelh9rkmmiq9l0hfdajrlcnuat5s383858_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2p74cdh2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zehsnkio56jm4fum24qrro59op98pim86g24b5sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2p74cdh2bs)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: American Bravery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
The Ukrainian people’s courage in resisting Vladimir Putin’s invasion has been nothing short of inspiring. But as Ukrainian
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbab6nuckn91tt1pc48q96rsds03q8n4igaba2t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2o33cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tthc3hm1ob76or34s5iemrj4c3kc5ie5cj0mcp64pb3elg74s9m6prb8cj1cirrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aollmdjrep366hgbbdhnm2qmash5u)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot: The Ukrainian people’s courage in resisting Vladimir Putin’s invasion has been nothing short of inspiring. But as Ukrainian leaders, soldiers, and civilians fight for their freedom, we should ask ourselves – _**what do we fight for?**_
Thank God the United States faces no foreign military attack, but that doesn’t mean our freedom is secure. Under Joe Biden’s hapless “leadership,” our borders, our paychecks, and our constitutional rights are more vulnerable than they have been in decades.
**Peace can only be won through strength; freedom can only be won through vigilance. **

Democrats will use any excuse they can to seize more power. They never stop, so we can’t either. Americans must fight for our freedom, or we will lose it.
**[Please support the House Freedom Fund and their group of conservatives running for Congress this year!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr2pq2rj9dhkifl9trndq8lcqg1emsv8gka9gkoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2o33cph2bs)**
No people ever stayed free by letting elites have their way. Big Business, Big Tech, Big Government are all working overtime, all the time, to collude, censor, and coerce America into wokeness and weakness. Just look at Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s record, in just one year of power:
▶︎ They spent so much it triggered strangling inflation. Now they say we need more spending to fight inflation.
▶︎ They opened the border because they said walls didn’t work. Now there are so many illegal immigrants they say it’s too late to build a border wall.
▶︎ Joe Biden wants to spend $30 billion more on Covid, but states still have $800 billion from last year that hasn’t been spent yet!

It’s all a scam, just like their mask mandates, school closures, vaccine mandates, and refusal to allow American energy independence.
America may not be at war, but we still have to fight for our freedom:
---
* To speak the truth about God, men, and women.
* To know the truth about the origins of Covid-19.
* To have fair and transparent elections.
* To produce our own oil and natural gas.
* To be patriotic conservatives on social media.

---
Today, all those things and more are under attack – not from bombs but with algorithms and bureaucracy. They don’t just want to rule the economy – they want to control our whole lives.
The only way they will succeed is if we let them.
Americans are inspired by the bravery of the Ukrainians defending their country – but now **we need to do the same!**
**[Please join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund and their group of candidates running for Congress this year.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zls3v567omrd5mjquqb3ug87qq4ur31he3afb8n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2o33cph2bs)**
_You can donate to multiple candidates with a single transaction. HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution to their grassroots campaigns._
Thank you for standing strong for freedom. Together, we can stop the Left and secure America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
JIM JORDAN U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio
---
---
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN**
---
---
|
---
[**ELECT HOUSE CONSERVATIVES**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl4booihqjdt400ovf048g089v16ler7cjmbomho_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2o33cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zugma273tl5u9hnld9dho128e5e1udq2t2lr64sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdge2o33cph2bs)

They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.

name: House Conservatives Trust
subject: House Conservatives Trust Newsletter: March 19th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Conservatives Trust, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee, https://www
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=56c02de3d718fbe7229c79cdf5b9b154b6e561e8e84df64c2f567df46426e266a04f43d6de1aa587217f122edace19bcb028db3ff3704f295fc28cb6a7c8012a)
---
| | **House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter**
---

Welcome to the House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter. This is a chance for us at HCT to share an inside look at news and events shaping our fight to take back the House for Republicans in 2022.

Last week Chairman Banks proposed legislation to prevent America from replacing Russian oil products with oil products from Iran or other state sponsors of terrorism. The "No Oil From Terrorists Act" is meant to encourage the U.S. to look to increase domestic production to meet oil supply needs as the Russia-Ukraine war continues. The last thing America needs is a rushed new Iran Nuclear Deal while Putin is waging a war of aggression.

The Republican Study Committee sent a letter to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen calling for her to investigate suspicious funding of USA-based climate change advocacy groups accused of being conduits for hidden donations from Russian oil and gas oligarchs who are seeking to reduce U.S. oil and gas production.

Over 50 House Republicans signed onto Chairman Banks' resolution vowing to reverse any new Nuclear Deal with Iran. The last thing the U.S. and our allies need is another rushed Iran Nuclear Deal to deal with a temporary oil supply crisis.

Biden's Border Surge is growing worse as officials warn of a potential mass immigration event created by human trafficking groups in Mexico and South America looking to take advantage of recently-ended COVID-19 polices that allowed for instant expulsions on the border.

---
* * *
---

**" In 2022, we're going to take back the House" \- President Donald J. Trump
**
---
| | | | [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=56c02de3d718fbe7229c79cdf5b9b154b6e561e8e84df64c2f567df46426e266a04f43d6de1aa587217f122edace19bcb028db3ff3704f295fc28cb6a7c8012a)
---
|
_**Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's failed agenda has led to rampant inflation, a border crisis, American families suffering and embarassment abroad. We must fight back TODAY. Will you join us?**_
---
| | [PITCH IN TO FIGHT BACK](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=56c02de3d718fbe7009111bef51c096cd75b7c95717c3ac5194835863b30dfd3f84db3dd4de6a6a6e7d9c4c8d61740f1600b717c4b344e52)
---
* * *
---
**NO OIL FROM TERRORISTS ACT**
---
Last Tuesday, the Republican Study Committee unveiled legislation to prevent the U.S. Government from replacing Russian oil products with oil products from Iran and other state sponsors of terrorism.

The legislation is aptly named the "No Oil From Terrorists Act" and is meant to encourage the Biden Administration to increase U.S. domestic oil and gas production instead of relying on foreign oil products to combat rising oil prices as Russia continues its invasion of Ukraine.

We believe the Biden Administration should focus on lifting executive orders that canceled the Keystone Pipeline and froze new oil and gas leases on federal lands instead of negotiating a new Iran Nuclear Deal during the Russian invasion of Ukraine.
---
| | | [READ MORE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=56c02de3d718fbe7b155fe4e5161aea2d5a85a46262b22de8189a3d4368ba9dfb9c9b0491882b405f9574391a0ae1be5d3952a7caac4b904)
---
| | | [AND HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=56c02de3d718fbe795e8ea6e471c337e28f77ccca8162ffba12f6ba311599496508e089cef16e331477d4cd86c78d232277c065104c0d38d)
---
* * *
---
**REPUBLICANS VOW ANY BIDEN NUCLEAR DEAL WITH IRAN WILL BE REVERSED**
---
Over 50 House Republicans are backing a bill led by Jim Banks to oppose any new nuclear deal with Iran amid the Russian-Ukrainian War and on the heels of an Iranian missile attack near a U.S. consulate.

Chairman Banks issued this statement about the bill:

_" A renewed JCPOA would increase the risk of a nuclear Iran, enrich terrorists and destabilize the entire region. All that aside, the process in Vienna would be a deal-breaker for any normal administration," Republican Study Committee (RSC) Chairman Jim Banks, R-Ind., who is leading the resolution, said.

"Just days ago, Iranian terrorists threatened to kill American citizens on U.S. soil and the Iranian government openly took credit for a missile attack near the US consulate in Iraq," Banks added. "Let's be clear: Joe Biden isn't just negotiating with terrorists, he's sending terrorists billions in sanctions relief."_
---

---
* * *
---
**RUSSIAN CLIMATE COLLUSION**
---
| | **RSC LETTER: Investigate potential Russian financing of USA groups** Last week, Chairman Banks sent a letter to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen calling for her to lead an investigation into whether Russia is secretly funding radical climate change groups that advocate against U.S. domestic oil and gas production.

An excerpt of the letter is here:

_" As the free world descends into yet another global conflict, it is imperative that the United States remain free from foreign manipulation.

The Russian government has sought to expand its political and cultural influence in Europe. To that end, they have gone to great lengths to increase Europre's reliance on Russian oil and gas.

In 2014, NATO Secretary-General Anders Fogh Rasmussen stated:

"I have met allies who can report that Russia, as post of their sophisticated information and disinformation operations, engaged actively with so-called non-governmental organizations, environmental organizations working against shale gas, to maintain European dependence on imported Russian gas"

Dependence on Russian gas has made it harder for European countries to counter Russia's invasion of Ukraine. But it's not just Europe. In 2021, the US purchased a record amount of Russian oil, and Russia had directed its influence effort at Americans too."_
---
| | [READ THE FULL RSC LETTER HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=56c02de3d718fbe7b678a55be2857160f20f4106215370302ef301737ec952345b5393a9849f276ae83a856a62270802b3a0917d03b39d04)

---
* * *
---
**BIDEN 'S BORDER SURGE**
---
Biden Administration officials are warning that the Biden Border Crisis could get even worse if policies that allow for instant expulsions are ended.

If these policies are reversed, an influx of as many as 170,000 immigrants could further stress the southern border.

**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z277ohcnpmohtp82qvi0sc3hcnl8s59dhe6tcaj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgeeor2cjh2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znukfrf8hgvjunsd3hdt4n2vi7eki0db0n7e22l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgeeor2cjh2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmvu4imcv0pt297oquc7hqdkn9mqji641166c6e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgeeor2cjh2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrihjh87c0cijmuda5ek2qnbanjoci4sltpsj3qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgeeor2cjh2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdhlcubrp1cp0ivudvb7otu2bu1oalkib3q0h07g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgeeor2cjh2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9r4osc1vsjn3jhni8st0asil7ene21072nusq50_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdgeeor2cjh2bs)

body:
Lankford INSULTS Lahmeyer & Oklahoma Voters It has been a full year that the people of Oklahoma have requested a Lahmeyer vs Lankford debate for the
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4508.1.9dac91c026362b9130f92a5868d6a6be) |
---
## Lankford INSULTS Lahmeyer & Oklahoma Voters
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4509.1.43066ac3b715e5f913db43ae491e378c)
---
It has been a _full year_ that the people of Oklahoma have requested a [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4510.1.a023609ca7022d1bac7bc816e290ba33) vs [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4511.1.ed6abbe8d8a99d94eddb5b1b3a7c08a7) **debate** for the US Senate race.
RINO [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4512.1.cbb48c74715f336a7047edc07fc4c1b6) has done EVERYTHING to avoid the subject.
Now he has come out and publicly stated he does not have the **COURAGE** nor **INTEGRITY** to stand on a debate stage and defend his [lackluster record](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4513.1.73f87bee6aa7ae56021441094cb7ffdf).
[The Oklahoman](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4514.1.072d7c4cd1f762bc7a6b6a0f40822141) released a [story](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4515.1.35b572b730503372d50f336eb1b91d98) this morning of an interview with [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4516.1.42be8f3ebf63638e0c3600b80c7da722) stating there will be no [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4517.1.b22283b978cf3b517d851c8a11b0389b) vs. [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4518.1.caec756e3cd0864f68003ad14da350da) debate.
By refusing to debate he insulting the voters of Oklahoma and it is very clear that [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4519.1.a22fb5a6969d8b87baeda51c6e7e0599) is either a **coward on the run** or an **entitled elitist** who believes he OWNS the US Senate seat.
It needs to be made clear to [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4520.1.8f522570ac8f0d7a2664e8deed478273) that nobody OWNS a Senate seat. **In fact, his lease on the seat is up on June 28, 2022.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4521.1.0fac7cf5792ddd00e9de4c3dfe678b93) OWES it to the people of Oklahoma and the country to give an answer for why he COWARDLY changed his mind on January 6, 2021 and certified Joe Biden as POTUS.
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4522.1.ba52e171d9fb612dbd0354d57f44fc7b) OWES it to the people of Oklahoma and the country to give an answer of why he apologized to the black community in Tulsa after January 6 for even questioning the fraud.
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4523.1.86860f46c01c4c2b1ceb108a2bfb2cf0) OWES it to the people of Oklahoma and the country to give an answer for why he opposed Trump's border wall and proposed blanket amnesty for illegal immigrants.
It is clear that RINO [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4524.1.c2640795721955707a5d3ae52fdeac7f) is going to run from these tough questions.
Therefore, I need your help getting our message out.
**2020 Election:**
\- Lankford certified Joe Biden
\- Lahmeyer believes the election was stolen
**Black Lives Matter:**
\- Lankford proposed replacing Columbus Day w/Juneteenth as a Federal Holiday
\- Lahmeyer labels BLM a Domestic Terrorist Organization
**Southern Border:**
\- Lankford was against building the wall
\- Lahmeyer wants to seal up our Southern Border
**Trump:**
\- Lankford was open to a Third Impeachment and labeled Trump a "bad role model"
\- Lahmeyer believes Trump needs to run for POTUS in 2024
Learn more at [www.realJamesLankford.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4525.1.9ae4ebcd2789751348fd127e33b2660e) and [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4526.1.109edee7dea4221a6da1fa43b466e84b)
The choice in Oklahoma is CLEAR. We need to get this message out.
Please help me do that!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4527.1.e838c25b5bc618dbdf09be12784a0ffb), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4528.1.e23254ba8e90c5a73f45e5fb42b2602e), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4529.1.d60532da241dbc6c66982e9189029ed1), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4530.1.f3859725c6a0e2672a5fa22bf9ddcf23), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5191209.4531.1.c4542bae8d9fd5b12bab392fadcd5c94)).

1776 Donor Club

name: American Update
subject: #1 Survival Item of 2022
body:
This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9632%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=W5A8V%2bkhUCkJGqj3JdCs1w&sysid=1)
# #1 Survival Item of 2022
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26892%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u%2fMwOi13xfnDiwMd%2fFM5kQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pfi16rUrJ86CgLg1CdoFVw&sysid=1) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26894%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MeR5F18qTOgUl7k1PcL1Yg&sysid=1) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26805%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qQ6K4o1cwkeDwsBHW7QfaA&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pfi16rUrJ86CgLg1CdoFVw&sysid=1) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26806%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kvlFP4xuVBEDbbdI9wyhaw&sysid=1)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9632%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=W5A8V%2bkhUCkJGqj3JdCs1w&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9632%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=W5A8V%2bkhUCkJGqj3JdCs1w&sysid=1)

| | | Patriot, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59876191:6PE3xsoN_:m:1:3299561967:EC54221ADB48B1A97ECB718DA9B983DF:r)

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

# #1 Survival Item of 2022
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu6pilv7003ahpbdhg7n0hftb7qqcjpjplhrn3tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie8oj0c3h2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlearld6nkh0bshfkg4q0i9jnptp21ksqsdficr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie8oj0c3h2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvd9irr5o7kgaign9v6qeap0g9qolvkq1puoh358_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie8oj0c3h2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zedtp2tf083reu020n15objr3ta6m8ag2uts1ong_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie8oj0c3h2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ami41c4b54tg8olrq0tb581rkhc7h9tivkuavo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie8oj0c3h2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6djan818o14d8klhc114nemjlie36vl317v77cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie8oj0c3h2bs)

But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.

| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.

We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... "Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?" Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: | | Melanie D. subject: The primary field is crowded – here’s why I stand out
body:

| | Peter, I’m running for Governor of Maryland alongside _nine_ Democratic men vying for the job. You may be wondering how I stand out. **[But, before I get into that, will you rush a donation to my campaign? I need 200 more folks to chip in by midnight tonight so I can stay on track to reach my end-of-month goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43131343/335868754/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220319_FR_StandOut_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI5ZTI4MC04NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNeKoM0rESrgkt3uxTZzvA0ochsSRYK6AmKEQGKhI50=)** | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43131345/335868756/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220319_FR_StandOut_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI5ZTI4MC04NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNeKoM0rESrgkt3uxTZzvA0ochsSRYK6AmKEQGKhI50=)

Besides being the only Democratic woman running for Governor, I stand out in this crowded primary field because I am the only candidate with a clear record of success in business and economic development.
As an entrepreneur, I turned around struggling companies. I worked in economic development to bring jobs to the state and keep companies growing, and I served as a county executive for one of the largest counties in Maryland.
None of my opponents can point to a proven economic record like mine – and I know that my record, in addition to my story of creating my own success and my own path when the odds were stacked against me, will resonate with Maryland voters.
If it resonates with you, **[will you be one of the 200 people I need to chip in $25 or more before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43131346/335868757/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220319_FR_StandOut_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI5ZTI4MC04NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNeKoM0rESrgkt3uxTZzvA0ochsSRYK6AmKEQGKhI50=)**

name: Freedom First Project
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| Jim and his family lost power recently.Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator – a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes._**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_**[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._5mEtEhrpN61nIDKioiig)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark..._"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up.__I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged.__The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding.__My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim.Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock.The little workhorse of a generator is so popular...**We even had a waiting list last time we sold out – __thousands__ of names long.**You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer).The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about.No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either.Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too – no complicated instructions to fuss over.And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited.So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today.You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out.**[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-parT7kGkgqX4otAgbw)**
---

**The good news:** Polling shows we have a clear path to winning this seat, flipping Ohio blue, and expanding our Democratic Senate majority. But it ONLY works if we have the resources to launch TV ads as early as possible (and keep them up).

**The bad news:** TV is the most expensive item in a campaign’s budget, and we just don’t have the money to get ads up right now.

**There’s no way to sugarcoat this, Peter — if we don’t get our ads on the airwaves ASAP, we will lose this race.**

[**_The only way we can close this budget gap is with the help of thousands of grassroots supporters like you.
