name: John King
subject: They don’t think a Black candidate can win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
It’s clear some in the establishment still believe in the outdated, disproven, and outright racist idea that leaders who look like me don’t have a place in politics.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43138823/335899930/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220319&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=1d4e9ee2-8ca7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRlOWVlMi04Y2E3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W97cp2p_udd4f3eULEnFMl2yvmwztM63seRxWSp-1Jw=)
---
| Peter, I want to take a moment to write to you about the recent offensive statements made by a Maryland Democratic Party official. In an article released by Axios, it was revealed that an email was sent among establishment insiders claiming that Black candidates cannot win in Maryland. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43138829/335899940/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220319&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=1d4e9ee2-8ca7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRlOWVlMi04Y2E3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W97cp2p_udd4f3eULEnFMl2yvmwztM63seRxWSp-1Jw=) **As someone whose family went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg to serving in the cabinet of the first Black president in just three generations, I am incredibly disappointed by this backward thinking from within my own party. ** _More than disappointed, I’m tired. _ In 2022, there is no place for outdated, disproven, and outright racist ideas about the electability of leaders who look like me. Especially in a state where 44% of the voting population is people of color, this kind of backward thinking has no place in the future of the Democratic Party of Maryland – and it’s up to us to prove them wrong. _**[So I have to ask: will you take a moment to help our campaign show folks in the establishment that we won’t tolerate racist remarks and we have what it takes to win this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43138831/335899948/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220319&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=1d4e9ee2-8ca7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRlOWVlMi04Y2E3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W97cp2p_udd4f3eULEnFMl2yvmwztM63seRxWSp-1Jw=)**_ Our campaign has received nearly 5,000 individual donations, putting us in the top tier of this election with over $2.5 million raised — including contributions from every county in the state and Baltimore City. But despite our successes, we are still being put down and underestimated because of the way I look. Race shouldn’t be seen as a limiting factor, but so many of us have been told to stay in our place time and time again just because of our skin color. And in 2022, it’s appalling that many people still believe that there are things we can’t do. It’s going to take everything we’ve got to overcome the misguided notion that Maryland can’t elect a Black governor. _**[Every single contribution you make — whether it’s $5 or $500 — makes a difference in our grassroots campaign to move our state forward, not backward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43138833/335899958/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220319&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=1d4e9ee2-8ca7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRlOWVlMi04Y2E3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W97cp2p_udd4f3eULEnFMl2yvmwztM63seRxWSp-1Jw=)**_ | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43138835/335899967/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220319-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220319&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=1d4e9ee2-8ca7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRlOWVlMi04Y2E3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W97cp2p_udd4f3eULEnFMl2yvmwztM63seRxWSp-1Jw=)
---
Thank you,
John King

name: Sean Themea
subject: Meet the Special Forces in the fight for freedom
body:
Biden is doing everything in his power to destroy our country with his policies: Inflation is at a 30 year high, at 6.8%. Vacci
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zelet7k3st9s4e7fiv394ps71rev1bokkftrac70_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp32oj36doefdbh6gojeo7369o77d5gmlhn7c9nmhrr1c34s1j36tb4sdpmfc77mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbcr0etg6ctb2mdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jm6p70s5j64oh5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z670m02u6a5ilfmnko3kttvhlnqrr182qb9qboa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie1ob6c9h2bs)

Friend,

Biden is doing everything in his power to destroy our country with his policies:
* Inflation is at a 30 year high, at 6.8%.
* Vaccine mandates have destroyed our economy, as small businesses were forced to close and people lost their jobs.
* The FBI has declared parents are terrorists, just because they opposed the teaching of Critical Race Theory in the classroom.

_The only thing holding the federal government in check are the state governments_.

I want to introduce you to the Special Forces in the fight for freedom who are helping elect hardcore liberty legislators around the country - **Young Americans for Liberty 's Student Activists.**

[**I 've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month that would help us recruit young men and women to knock doors for liberty candidates. Will you donate $20.22, $50, $100, or any generous amount to the fight for liberty? Click here to donate >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaf7goppmrg7d47ufb26753hdnrof481kf0d8kf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie1ob6c9h2bs)

**[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlp09ihr97ckv5g9r92bdpq513desppf3nk03png_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie1ob6c9h2bs)**
Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization today.

**YAL Student Activists have helped elect 173 state legislators.** So far, these legislators have defended liberty in their states by fighting for:
* Free speech.
* The 2nd Amendment.
* Ending pandemic mandates.
* Medical freedom.

Friend, these students need support and they're counting on you.

[**I 'm counting on your immediate support to help recruit student activists for key elections this year. Will you donate $20.22, $50, $100, or any generous amount to the fight for liberty? Click here to donate >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zppset2bon7a4jtdtjg7fkjf7te511icko6bc4a0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie1ob6c9h2bs)

**Since we began, student activists have knocked on over 2.9 MILLION doors.**

During one of YAL's most recent victories in Virginia, student activists knocked over 90,000 doors, spent countless hours phone-banking and distributing mailers to voters, and turned the tide with their efforts.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf1dgek6s1j8d9qklb11cas5hjp0s5doie259omg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie1ob6c9h2bs)

This is a critical year, with many seats opening for election. We're looking to build a coalition of 250+ liberty state legislators... and we are nearly there.

YAL has been busy training student liberty leaders across the country, so we may begin to recruit from a well-trained student army to knock doors. **Click any link below to support our efforts to recruit these student activists.**

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9iaedll2ash2gairc8iv7bq05nv8agokq6cn678_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie1ob6c9h2bs)

[**Donate $250 >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd37aunp22pfl4efpiapm5q5699jagd4sd80f7ng_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cdie1ob6c9h2bs)

clean_body: Biden is doing everything in his power to destroy our country with his policies: Inflation is at a 30 year high, at 6.8%. Vacci Friend, Biden is doing everything in his power to destroy our country with his policies: Inflation is at a 30 year high, at 6.8%. Vaccine mandates have destroyed our economy, as small businesses were forced to close and people lost their jobs. The FBI has declared parents are terrorists, just because they opposed the teaching of Critical Race Theory in the classroom. The only thing holding the federal government in check are the state governments. I want to introduce you to the Special Forces in the fight for freedom who are helping elect hardcore liberty legislators around the country - Young Americans for Liberty 's Student Activists. Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization today. YAL Student Activists have helped elect 173 state legislators. So far, these legislators have defended liberty in their states by fighting for: Free speech. The 2nd Amendment. Ending pandemic mandates. Medical freedom. Friend, these students need support and they're counting on you. Since we began, student activists have knocked on over 2.9 MILLION doors. During one of YAL's most recent victories in Virginia, student activists knocked over 90,000 doors, spent countless hours phone-banking and distributing mailers to voters, and turned the tide with their efforts. This is a critical year, with many seats opening for election. We're looking to build a coalition of 250+ liberty state legislators... and we are nearly there. YAL has been busy training student liberty leaders across the country, so we may begin to recruit from a well-trained student army to knock doors. Click any link below to support our efforts to recruit these student activists. Thank you for supporting these young men and women as they fight for our liberty. Sean Themea Chief of Staff Young Americans for Liberty PS.** Friend, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 and place student activists in key states around the country by the end of the month. name: Nan Whaley
subject: Sign now: Protect communities from gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
We don’t have to wait for another mass shooting to pass common sense gun safety legislation. Instead of reacting to tragedy, we have the power to prevent it.

Team,
Governor DeWine just signed a dangerous new piece of legislation into law. Thanks to DeWine, Ohioans are now allowed to carry guns without a permit or ANY training.
I’ve seen first hand the way that gun violence hurts people in Ohio. After a mass shooting in Dayton, DeWine promised to do something to reduce gun violence. This is just another broken promise from DeWine – and this one makes everyone in our communities less safe.
**[We deserve to feel safe in our communities. We shouldn’t have to live in fear of gun violence. Add your name to our petition now and tell Mike DeWine that this legislation has no place in Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43138997/335900454/-735221026?ms=nw_em_220319_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220319_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M4MzYyNi04ZGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUDwEPidhgA06j0n5WKbsgrh3Bcm5ge523GXFEdugYI=&emci=460bd478-1da7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6cc83626-8da7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)**
Every day, our community in Dayton misses the nine people we senselessly lost in a mass shooting. That day changed our lives forever. No one else should have to feel that way, and we can take steps to prevent it from happening again.
We don’t have to wait for another mass shooting to pass common sense gun safety legislation. Instead of reacting to tragedy, we have the power to prevent it. But first, we need to tell Mike DeWine to stop putting politics before people.
**[Will you sign our petition and tell Mike DeWine to protect our communities from gun violence? Ohio deserves better than this legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43138999/335900462/-735221026?ms=nw_em_220319_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220319_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M4MzYyNi04ZGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUDwEPidhgA06j0n5WKbsgrh3Bcm5ge523GXFEdugYI=&emci=460bd478-1da7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6cc83626-8da7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43139001/335900470/-735221026?ms=nw_em_220319_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220319_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M4MzYyNi04ZGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUDwEPidhgA06j0n5WKbsgrh3Bcm5ge523GXFEdugYI=&emci=460bd478-1da7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6cc83626-8da7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)****

clean_body: Joe Biden finally banned the import of Russian oil after fueling Putin’s war machine. | | Friend, Joe Biden finally banned the import of Russian oil after fueling Putin’s war machine. I believe it’s past time for America to be energy independent... but... Elaine Luria disagrees. America is one of the largest producers of energy in the world. We shouldn’t rely on dictators to fuel our economy. Elect leaders who will allow America to become energy independent. | Joe Biden and Democrats like Elaine Luria do not want America to be energy independent... They shut down the Keystone XL Pipeline, crippled the U.S. energy sector and then turned to brutal dictators in Iran and Venezuela to bail out their failed policies. It doesn’t matter which tyrannical governments we are buying oil from; the point is we shouldn’t be buying oil from any authoritarian thugs. I will help set America on a path to energy independence. We have the means to do it, and it will once again assert our position on the world stage. We don’t have time to waste – this is an urgent situation, and we need to act. We can’t afford more of the same destructive leadership. We desperately need a change in November, and it starts with taking Elaine Luria’s seat. | We have an opportunity to stop supporting oppressive governments all over the world. Together we can restore America’s standing as a world leader. With gratitude, Jen | | | | PAID FOR BY KIGGANS FOR CONGRESS Kiggans for Congress, P.O. Box 5042, Virginia Beach, VA 23471

What do you think about the “priorities” Gov. DeSantis has set for Florida?

_[Take our quick survey now and give us your thoughts!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43139645/335902990/-1452182135?refcode=20220318_f_2_D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTdlMTE0Ni04ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtZb6v0UTsz1dQQhSgLaLqhjZW0idvSF-At7WIuNbVg=&emci=a299dba1-52a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f17e1146-8ea7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8807089)_
Friend,

It’s clear that Ron DeSantis is planning to run for president in 2024. He spent the just-completed legislative session pushing the farthest right-wing legislation you could imagine. He’s getting ready to sign _multiple_ outrageous new bills including:
• **The “Don’t Say Gay” Bill** , which would prohibit any mention of sexual orientation or gender identity in public schools, further marginalizing LGBTQ+ students and putting our teachers at risk of politically motivated lawsuits.

• **A bill to ban abortions** , which is the most restrictive abortion law ever passed in Florida since the Supreme Court decided _Roe v. Wade_.

• **The “election crimes” bill** , which continues to push the false narrative that the 2020 election was somehow stolen or improper.

• **An anti-renewables bill** , which would _eliminate_ incentives for solar energy at a time when we need to do everything possible to lower energy costs and fight climate change.
**_[We want to know what folks like you think about the “priorities” Governor DeSantis has set for the state. Will you take our quick survey now and give us your thoughts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43139646/335902991/-1452182135?refcode=20220318_f_2_D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTdlMTE0Ni04ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtZb6v0UTsz1dQQhSgLaLqhjZW0idvSF-At7WIuNbVg=&emci=a299dba1-52a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f17e1146-8ea7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8807089)_**

Charlie thinks Governor DeSantis has it all wrong — our leaders should be focused on building a Florida that works for _all_ Floridians, not advancing their own careers by stoking political divisions and threatening some of our most basic rights as Americans.

**But Charlie wants to hear from you, too. Take a minute to complete our short survey and let us know what you think. Your input will be invaluable as the campaign heats up!**
[BEGIN SURVEY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43139647/335902992/-1452182135?refcode=20220318_f_2_D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTdlMTE0Ni04ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtZb6v0UTsz1dQQhSgLaLqhjZW0idvSF-At7WIuNbVg=&emci=a299dba1-52a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f17e1146-8ea7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8807089)

clean_body: Charlie wants to know what you think about the “priorities” Gov. DeSantis has set for Florida. | | | | = What do you think about the “priorities” Gov. DeSantis has set for Florida? Friend, It’s clear that Ron DeSantis is planning to run for president in 2024. He spent the just-completed legislative session pushing the farthest right-wing legislation you could imagine. He’s getting ready to sign multiple outrageous new bills including: • The “Don’t Say Gay” Bill , which would prohibit any mention of sexual orientation or gender identity in public schools, further marginalizing LGBTQ+ students and putting our teachers at risk of politically motivated lawsuits. • A bill to ban abortions , which is the most restrictive abortion law ever passed in Florida since the Supreme Court decided Roe v. Wade. • The “election crimes” bill , which continues to push the false narrative that the 2020 election was somehow stolen or improper. • An anti-renewables bill , which would eliminate incentives for solar energy at a time when we need to do everything possible to lower energy costs and fight climate change. Charlie thinks Governor DeSantis has it all wrong — our leaders should be focused on building a Florida that works for all Floridians, not advancing their own careers by stoking political divisions and threatening some of our most basic rights as Americans. But Charlie wants to hear from you, too. Take a minute to complete our short survey and let us know what you think. Your input will be invaluable as the campaign heats up! Thanks, Team Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

Peter,

As of today, two polls have now confirmed that we’ve surged to a solid second place in the Democratic primary – a strong sign that Wisconsinites know that our messaging is resonating and that our team can beat Ron Johnson in November.

This is good news because our hard work is paying off. With your help, we’ve been able to keep running TV ads and reach out to voters across the state to see what matters most to them and then incorporate that into our campaign.

For too long, Ron Johnson has been a roadblock for any progress in the Senate. He’s left behind the people of Wisconsin, and now we have the chance to defeat him. People want change, and I’m going to deliver.

**[But I need you by my side as we fight all the way to November. This is good news because our hard work is paying off. With your help, we’ve been able to keep running TV ads and reach out to voters across the state to see what matters most to them and then incorporate that into our campaign. For too long, Ron Johnson has been a roadblock for any progress in the Senate. He’s left behind the people of Wisconsin, and now we have the chance to defeat him. People want change, and I’m going to deliver. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. body:
Instead of helping working families or creating good-paying union jobs, Sen. Grassley has supported massive corporate tax cuts and breaks for the wealthiest Americans.

**Peter – Sen. Grassley (R-IA) has been in Washington since 1975. Now, after 47 years of his leadership, are you and your family better off?**
The effects of nearly half a century of his radical right-wing agenda and failed leadership are playing out right in front of us: **in recent years, income inequality in America is at its highest level in more than 50 years.** Instead of helping working families or creating good-paying union jobs, Sen. Grassley has supported massive corporate tax cuts and breaks for the wealthiest Americans.
At the same time, from his seat on the Senate Judiciary Committee, he has attacked the right to choose at every opportunity, ramming through controversial, extremist Supreme Court nominees like Brett Kavanaugh. **Today, Roe v. Wade is hanging on by a thread – and the blame sits squarely on Sen. Grassley's shoulders.**
Enough is enough. It's time for new leadership, and Iowans agree: **Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings, and nearly two-thirds of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to elect him for an eighth term.**

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: President Trump: This is a matter of national survival.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Last week President Trump said that eliminating Critical Race Theory (CRT) from schools "is a matter of national survival."
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsbt5iud40iuvjnkjr5ufnjomi6nov14o6mpg4o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctg64o30cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkmepm0ojn6jhb8otic2qb6tb168r74tpmc5rbcdr0sqrmeptleqo7eo3lcup30puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dr665rj6ob7mpg6ccbgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2k1929v33s56kaba64ua2kqaa1la45v8cp9297g_) Last week President Trump said that eliminating Critical Race Theory (CRT) from schools "is a matter of national survival." He's absolutely right. That's why over the last year I've launched the nation's largest and most effective anti-CRT organization. My team and I target local school board races all over the country to get rid of radical CRT-pushing leftists with SANE America-loving people like you and I. **[But, there's no way we can eliminate CRT from our schools without your help. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to Critical Race Theory?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhcghp10ug44c51l3s1h9pbghl6hjlsoedbqa5ao_)** Friend, I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America’s children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It’s state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2v6uhba6ms9ftf8f9s2e6frv39t9rcebafi2ok0_)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zboe36oq4p8m69ot06a1m4slo7a8oho9miof8740_).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you’re not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what’s worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we’ve left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it’s easy to feel defeated. **But I have a plan to take back our schools from the radical left and put an end to critical race theory...** And I know that, with your support, it'll work. And if you don't want to take my word for it... Just read what Tucker Carlson said: **["Parents have almost no support,_but now they do_. The _1776 Project PAC_ __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9bfnrgjvii4lu52f96po5bop4bk0vnhgfc6qroo_)** [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfq7abf12pu7h6odp3i7qe7ntk0ta183h6p22lbg_) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC ensure that Critical Race Theory is eradicated from our schools.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9fte4i6us95utqacbng2t85k62ubn29dr32vvp0_) **_And I have the 3 R’s Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. subject: still short
body:
This is urgent, Derek.
We are just months away from what could be one the most consequential midterm elections of our lifetime. And with the last Florida Senate race being decided by just 0.12%, every goal is critical to reaching voters and winning.
After I asked for your help, I was so heartened to see hundreds of supporters contribute to this campaign – but I still need another 128 Election Year Members before midnight to hit my End of Month goal. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220319_CGVA_Demings]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220319_CGVA_Demings [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220319_CGVA_Demings]
This is a make-or-break moment: If I defeat Marco Rubio, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to control the Senate. Campaign strategists like James Carville say they have "zero doubt" that I can win – but ONLY if I amass enough resources to reach more voters right now.
In a race as important as this one, falling short isn't an option. Missing my goal could mean losing this race. Losing this race could cost Democrats our majority and enough votes to abolish the filibuster, safeguard reproductive freedom or strengthen voting rights. With so much on the line, I'm counting on you to become an Election Year member right now:
Please, Derek, will you split a contribution of $25 or more with me and CommonGood to become an Election Year member, help me reach my End of Month goal and protect our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220319_CGVA_Demings]

Val Demings

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: The words I always carry with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Things weren't always easy
| | |
---
Friend: What we do right now will set the pace for the rest of this year and show the strength of our campaign.

I don't doubt you're getting a lot of emails, **but this email is unlike any other you'll get ahead of such a monumental midterm election, so I hope you'll give it a read.**
When I'm in the middle of make-or-break moments like this for my Senate race, my mind often goes back to Jacksonville – back to the tiny house I grew up in with six brothers and sisters. Things weren't always easy. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and although we didn't have a lot of money, we had each other.
In fact, it was Mom who used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never_ tire." Those words inspired me to get into public service, and ever since then, growing tired of doing what's right has never been an option.
These words have been deep in my soul as I have served the public, from my time in the Orlando Police Department to Congress. They're the words I spoke to myself as I impeached Donald Trump. And they're the words I think about now, as I see how we desperately need more than a 50-50 Senate to build back better for the American people.

_Never tire,_ I think, as I recognize Florida is Democrats' best opportunity to expand our Senate majority. _Never tire_ , I think, as polls show me statistically tied with my opponent, and I come out of yet another finance meeting with the realization I'm far behind where I need to be before a big deadline like this.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what's possible – and I promise I will never tire as I work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for _all_ Americans. **A 50-50 Senate isn't working for you or our country, and it's up to us to expand our majority and secure a future for voting rights, reproductive freedom and all our shared values.**
**So as I look toward my fundraising goals ahead of election day, I need to build a huge grassroots team to help me surge ahead. That's why I set an ambitious goal to recruit 10,000 members before midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to join, friend:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43148056/335921432/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2684-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTZkYjEyNC05YWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Cnsr7fpltgL_XFE3opssORSRr_atVBDukfrwNRL97c=)
**[Friend, I ask a lot of you because I have so much faith that you'll never tire, either. You know the stakes of this election, so before my midnight deadline, can you donate $5 to become a member of this grassroots team? Every donor will help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43148057/335921433/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2684-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTZkYjEyNC05YWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Cnsr7fpltgL_XFE3opssORSRr_atVBDukfrwNRL97c=)**
Thank you for being in this with me.

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43148058/335921434/1417698435?refcode=jtk2684-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTZkYjEyNC05YWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Cnsr7fpltgL_XFE3opssORSRr_atVBDukfrwNRL97c=&emci=318f2f45-50a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=956db124-9aa7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

clean_body: Things weren't always easy | | | Friend: What we do right now will set the pace for the rest of this year and show the strength of our campaign. I don't doubt you're getting a lot of emails, but this email is unlike any other you'll get ahead of such a monumental midterm election, so I hope you'll give it a read. When I'm in the middle of make-or-break moments like this for my Senate race, my mind often goes back to Jacksonville – back to the tiny house I grew up in with six brothers and sisters. Things weren't always easy. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and although we didn't have a lot of money, we had each other. In fact, it was Mom who used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." Those words inspired me to get into public service, and ever since then, growing tired of doing what's right has never been an option. These words have been deep in my soul as I have served the public, from my time in the Orlando Police Department to Congress. They're the words I spoke to myself as I impeached Donald Trump. And they're the words I think about now, as I see how we desperately need more than a 50-50 Senate to build back better for the American people. Never tire, I think, as I recognize Florida is Democrats' best opportunity to expand our Senate majority. Never tire , I think, as polls show me statistically tied with my opponent, and I come out of yet another finance meeting with the realization I'm far behind where I need to be before a big deadline like this. My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what's possible – and I promise I will never tire as I work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. A 50-50 Senate isn't working for you or our country, and it's up to us to expand our majority and secure a future for voting rights, reproductive freedom and all our shared values. So as I look toward my fundraising goals ahead of election day, I need to build a huge grassroots team to help me surge ahead. That's why I set an ambitious goal to recruit 10,000 members before midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to join, friend: = = Thank you for being in this with me. Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. subject: Keep our Communities SAFE
body:
Many Democrats are trying to convince you that they’re now in “Support of the Police” since it’s an election year... We won’t be fooled.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y1R06TBJKx76zxuGJjh2dASdRsmvhDvsX4JALPlSsM_ebWRaLGuxOqZtE27XFgIJmyJmI4qNYOWNV0ZVA7c0QG2CQMMNUn0CxbILgnuKRHeiKdXGuCUgq1iz7aUpTpHI43gi3W8aFOjqaY2I34biQd8soW-HXvqfrQ99GoU8lc8RZZn3rMR1sTGApqxs4673yySbiDLsfJfbSHqp2fPSM2rMJhhaKcig&c=3Zb3ZujuMTi8mnSrgKuC1TbMkkonNyXJq4Fdw0Ah7nrN6hMvIslW5w==&ch=7Klzm0or-k4Cm9mrFDdj1vqYml6hbll7uF6UCCVnoaCRLGt4BEOMnw==)

| Peter,
Many Democrats are trying to convince you that they're now in "Support of the Police" since it's an election year... We won't be fooled.
In Nevada, we remember how Steve Sisolak prioritized criminals over law enforcement with upside-down policies. And we remember, during the riots of 2020, that Las Vegas was spared unlike other cities because a strong, proven leader in Sheriff Joe Lombardo was in charge.
We MUST stop these lawless politicians from pushing their radical priorities, and keep our communities SAFE from any left leaning policy initiative that puts our lives at greater risk.
If you'd like to support that mission, adding your name to our [Law Enforcement Petition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y1R06TBJKx76zxuGJjh2dASdRsmvhDvsX4JALPlSsM_ebWRaLGuxOqZtE27XFgIJmyJmI4qNYOWNV0ZVA7c0QG2CQMMNUn0CxbILgnuKRHeiKdXGuCUgq1iz7aUpTpHI43gi3W8aFOjqaY2I34biQd8soW-HXvqfrQ99GoU8lc8RZZn3rMR1sTGApqxs4673yySbiDLsfJfbSHqp2fPSM2rMJhhaKcig&c=3Zb3ZujuMTi8mnSrgKuC1TbMkkonNyXJq4Fdw0Ah7nrN6hMvIslW5w==&ch=7Klzm0or-k4Cm9mrFDdj1vqYml6hbll7uF6UCCVnoaCRLGt4BEOMnw==) is a great way to do just that. Thank you in advance for taking a minute to sign.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: An emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59877943:6XOngsoNo:m:1:3317145305:6B20B993D0D163FB607218BE40BAD555:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59877943:6XOngsoNo:m:1:3317145305:6B20B993D0D163FB607218BE40BAD555:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59877943:6XOngsoNo:m:1:3317145305:6B20B993D0D163FB607218BE40BAD555:r)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59877943:6XOngsoNo:m:1:3317145305:6B20B993D0D163FB607218BE40BAD555:r)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---

name: Andy Parker
subject: Welcome to our team, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Parker for Congress
body:
I am committed to solving problems, not creating them.

| _You are receiving this email because of your past support for Virginia Democrats. Andy is running against one of Marjorie Taylor Greene’s top allies, Bob Good, in Virginia’s 5th District. | Peter,

My life has been defined by two guiding principles: to be the best father and husband I can be, and to try to make a difference every chance I get.

These two principles were crucial to me in 2015 when my 24-year-old daughter, Alison Parker, a journalist, was shot and killed on live television. I had a choice to retreat into my grief or to honor Alison’s life through action. **I chose the latter.** After Alison’s death, I fought back against the social media giants profiting from my family’s tragedy.

As I’ve worked to uphold my daughter’s legacy, I’ve watched Congressman Bob Good, embrace dangerous misinformation and spread conspiracy theories that led to the January 6 insurrection at our nation’s Capitol. I knew that his reckless disregard for the truth was a threat to our democracy, and I knew I had to do something about it. **That’s why I’m running to represent Virginia’s 5th congressional district.**

I am committed to solving problems, not creating them. But to get to Congress and fight for Virginia families the way I fight for my own, I need serious resources. body:
March 31 public reporting deadline is the most important to date.
| | |
---
Our FEC deadline is quickly approaching, team.
I know you probably get a lot of emails discussing "goals and deadlines" but these benchmarks are critical to ensuring that our fundraising is on track to keep our campaign running. And March 31 public reporting deadline is the most important to date. Here's why:
* This will be the first opportunity since two extremist Republicans jumped into the race to see what my opponents are raising. So it's _especially_ important for my campaign to report strong fundraising numbers.

* I won my last race by a narrow 1,017 votes in the closest race in the country -- and recent reporting has labeled this seat a toss up. With the Senate split 50-50, losing even one seat means ceding control to Republicans.

* Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have spent over $7.5 million attacking my record, and we need the resources to set the record straight.

In a swing state like New Hampshire, my team's ability to defend this seat depends on meeting every single goal we set. **Because falling behind could mean the difference between a red and blue Senate. **
That's why it's so important that we meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. **[I'm reaching out to ask if you can chip in $5 or whatever you can before it's too late. I wouldn't ask unless it was necessary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43149392/335928628/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk782-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGVlNDg1NC05ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jr4N3g6nBoO6yUdSrRLy_q0-g4KuYvJQ5dfIfTjdIFY=)**

clean_body: March 31 public reporting deadline is the most important to date. | | | Our FEC deadline is quickly approaching, team. I know you probably get a lot of emails discussing "goals and deadlines" but these benchmarks are critical to ensuring that our fundraising is on track to keep our campaign running. And March 31 public reporting deadline is the most important to date. Here's why: This will be the first opportunity since two extremist Republicans jumped into the race to see what my opponents are raising. So it's especially important for my campaign to report strong fundraising numbers. I won my last race by a narrow 1,017 votes in the closest race in the country -- and recent reporting has labeled this seat a toss up. With the Senate split 50-50, losing even one seat means ceding control to Republicans. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have spent over $7.5 million attacking my record, and we need the resources to set the record straight. In a swing state like New Hampshire, my team's ability to defend this seat depends on meeting every single goal we set. Because falling behind could mean the difference between a red and blue Senate. That's why it's so important that we meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you in advance! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =**. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. Oh no. We slapped our foreheads.
We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it.
The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours.
The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand.
And then... poof!
GONE!
Our inventory manager was asking...
_**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_
Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow!
And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now.
That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:
[**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149961&L=81646&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI0LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQyMCZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzE5LXMwNThjMDM3VC1CdW5kbGUxJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEMtMTcxOC0yMDIyMDMxOS1zMDU4YzAzN1QtQnVuZGxlMQ==)

**Melanie D.**
I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.

---|---
|
**Shirley C.**
I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.

---|---
|
**Wing C.**
I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.

---|---
|
**Richard G.**
It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.

We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... "Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?" Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: == == | | Melanie D. I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it. ---|--- | Shirley C. I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much. ---|--- | Wing C. I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Living standards set to fall – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/livingstandardsfailing?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Americans generally expect to get richer. From one year to the next, incomes in the US have risen faster than the cost of living. Not any more.

While the average Mississippian in 2022 is many times better off than their great grandparents, will the next generation enjoy growing prosperity?

Soaring inflation means prices are rising far faster than incomes. In the 15 months that I have lived in Mississippi, I’ve noticed the price of everyday items rising rapidly.

Why are prices rising?
---
|
---
| Firstly, the federal government has created way too many dollars. The more dollars that the Federal Reserve puts into circulation, the less that you are able to buy with the dollars you happen to hold.

Another reason for rising inflation is bad energy policy.

Prosperity depends on having a plentiful supply of energy. Energy is needed not only to power trucks and cars, or to keep our ac systems running. Cheap energy means more affordable food, clothing, travel and almost everything.

Tragically, government policy has set out to make energy more costly by restricting the use of fossil fuels. This, in turn, increases the price of everything from gas to groceries.

To make matters worse, the international situation means that there is now an embargo on Russian oil. However essential the oil embargo might be, imagine how much better placed the US would be to cope with it if the Keystone oil pipeline was now operational? Instead, the Biden administration cancelled it.

Another reason Americans have enjoyed rising living standards has been the growth in international trade. Being able to import products that others produce more cheaply meant that US consumers got a great deal.

With the Covid crisis and the invasion of Ukraine, we are starting to see a decline in world trade and a return to protectionism. This will mean a worse deal for US consumers and an increase in the cost of everyday items.

How should we respond?

I was interested to see the Lieutenant Governor of our state call for a temporary removal of the gas tax. It might not necessarily hold down gas prices in quite the way intended, but lower taxes would be welcome by many Mississippians faced with rising bills.

The Speaker is, of course, advocating that we eliminate the income tax. That would be an even bigger long term help.

Politicians might be able to help Americans cope with the cost of living crisis at the margins. But the most useful thing that all of them need to do is step out of the way.

It is political interference in the energy market that has increased energy prices. It is monetary mismanagement by the fed that has fueled inflation.

What America needs to ensure rising living standards is less political interference, lower taxes and the free market.

In the video below, I discuss what lessons the US should draw from Europe’s energy policy disaster.

Have a great weekend!
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c70ba46ee0&e=5703353baa)
---
The Green Energy Disaster
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=bf7ca24683) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=bf7ca24683).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Have You Heard The News?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8273910427d8/have-you-heard-the-news?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=3784ab1f10&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,

After another great week on the campaign, **we are closer than ever** to reaching our signature goal and **securing our spot on the Republican primary ballot** —but don't take it from me; take it from the Utah Office of Elections.

**As of TODAY, we have verified nearly 20,000 signatures from our first submission to the Lieutenant Governor's Office!**

**This is a huge accomplishment**. Our verification rate of 70% exceeded our expectations and is PROOF that **Utah voters are ready for better leadership, better politics, and better solutions**.

Now that the Utah Elections Office has completed the verification of our first batch of signatures, **it is critical** that we **use this data to fuel our fire**. We need to gather and submit enough additional signatures to hit the **28,000 verified signatures required** to get on the ballot before **April 11th**.

Our signature gathering team will continue to **knock on doors and attend public events** across the state, but **we need YOUR help** to keep our momentum—it's all hands on deck!
---
| | **HOW YOU CAN HELP**
* **If you have already signed** , make sure you are registered as a Republican or [update your voter registration](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=4e70e742cf&e=10c1db3257).
* **If you have not signed** , do so NOW at any of our [s](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=5121aa5b51&e=10c1db3257)[ignature gathering locations.](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=8899d3d987&e=10c1db3257)
* **[Sign up to collect signatures](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2d3b53ccfc&e=10c1db3257)**. You can download and print your signature petition [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=7bbd30f3ca&e=10c1db3257) to take with you as you visit family, friends, and people in your neighborhood.
* **If you're already gathering signatures** , thank you! Find events and suggested locations to collect signatures with #TeamBecky [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=1d6b3b96dc&e=10c1db3257).

---
| In other news this week, I had the **tremendous opportunity** to spend my Monday with **St. George community leaders and Dixie State Administrators**.
---
| |
---
During my time in **our state's fastest-growing metro** , I learned more about Dixie State's plans to **prepare the workforce of tomorrow and develop a strong economy**.

President Biff Williams spoke humbly about **St. George's future-focused approach to workforce concerns** , and I am confident that St. George will uphold its legacy of strong university-community partnerships and innovative expansion.
---
| | **Thank you, as always, for your ongoing support** of this campaign and our fight to bring more **productive, proactive, and inclusive leadership to Washington**.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends, After another great week on the campaign, we are closer than ever to reaching our signature goal and securing our spot on the Republican primary ballot —but don't take it from me; take it from the Utah Office of Elections. As of TODAY, we have verified nearly 20,000 signatures from our first submission to the Lieutenant Governor's Office! This is a huge accomplishment. Our verification rate of 70% exceeded our expectations and is PROOF that Utah voters are ready for better leadership, better politics, and better solutions. Now that the Utah Elections Office has completed the verification of our first batch of signatures, it is critical that we use this data to fuel our fire. We need to gather and submit enough additional signatures to hit the 28,000 verified signatures required to get on the ballot before April 11th. Our signature gathering team will continue to knock on doors and attend public events across the state, but we need YOUR help to keep our momentum—it's all hands on deck! | | HOW YOU CAN HELP If you have already signed , make sure you are registered as a Republican or . If you have not signed , do so NOW at any of our . You can download and print your signature petition to take with you as you visit family, friends, and people in your neighborhood. If you're already gathering signatures , thank you! Find events and suggested locations to collect signatures with #TeamBecky . | In other news this week, I had the tremendous opportunity to spend my Monday with St. George community leaders and Dixie State Administrators. | | During my time in our state's fastest-growing metro , I learned more about Dixie State's plans to prepare the workforce of tomorrow and develop a strong economy. President Biff Williams spoke humbly about St. George's future-focused approach to workforce concerns , and I am confident that St. George will uphold its legacy of strong university-community partnerships and innovative expansion. | | Thank you, as always, for your ongoing support of this campaign and our fight to bring more productive, proactive, and inclusive leadership to Washington. | | "DONATE" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 1467 Bountiful, UT 84011 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Paid for by Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate.

| | My grandfathers both served in the Navy in World War II, folks, and they instilled in me the values of perseverance, service, and sacrifice. I wanted to be just like them. So I joined the Naval Academy when I was 17 years old – just over a decade after they began allowing women to serve. At first, my male classmates underestimated me. I didn’t earn their respect until they found out I had a 4.0 and was one of the first women _ever_ accepted into the Naval Academy’s Nuclear Program. As one of the few women serving in the Navy, it was easy to get discouraged. Sometimes I wondered if I had made the right choice. But despite the adversity I faced, I spent 20 years in the Navy. Today I know that my continued service is not a choice, but a duty to our nation and our values as Americans. I’m not done serving my country – we still have a lot of work to do. That’s why I’m running for Congress for a third term. But we have an uphill battle ahead of us, and to continue to do that work – I need your help. [**Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever amount makes sense for you, to my campaign today? 680,000 North Carolinians could access health insurance by expanding Medicaid. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43131543/335869215/823540626?refcode=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5ZTI4MC04NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-3uThAOR9P_ZTydHgd4-J3B9MbBg5bo9Tp0WPSz_hY=&emci=b97f19e0-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
Peter, **Roy Cooper and NC Democrats agree: A visit to the doctor or picking up a necessary prescription should _never_ break the bank.** That’s why they’ve spent decades working to expand Medicaid in North Carolina — just as 38 states and the District of Columbia already have. But NC legislative Republicans have BLOCKED these efforts at every turn. **[Now, Roy wants to hear from you: Do YOU support expanding Medicaid for North Carolinians who need it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43131544/335869217/89626542?refcode=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5ZTI4MC04NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-3uThAOR9P_ZTydHgd4-J3B9MbBg5bo9Tp0WPSz_hY=&emci=b97f19e0-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43131546/335869219/89626542?refcode=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5ZTI4MC04NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-3uThAOR9P_ZTydHgd4-J3B9MbBg5bo9Tp0WPSz_hY=&emci=b97f19e0-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43131547/335869223/89626542?refcode=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5ZTI4MC04NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-3uThAOR9P_ZTydHgd4-J3B9MbBg5bo9Tp0WPSz_hY=&emci=b97f19e0-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)

Peter, experts estimate that expanding Medicaid would make health insurance accessible for more than 500,000 of our friends, family, and neighbors who need it. _That would make a big difference to keeping our people safe and healthy — and it would lower costs for everyone._
After living through the worst public health crisis in a century, it’s more apparent than ever that quality health care can’t be the privilege of only the wealthy few.
[**Take our one-question poll right now to let Roy know: Are you in favor of expanding Medicaid in NC?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43131548/335869224/89626542?refcode=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5ZTI4MC04NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-3uThAOR9P_ZTydHgd4-J3B9MbBg5bo9Tp0WPSz_hY=&emci=b97f19e0-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3729e280-84a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: 680,000 North Carolinians could access health insurance by expanding Medicaid. | Peter, Roy Cooper and NC Democrats agree: A visit to the doctor or picking up a necessary prescription should never break the bank. That’s why they’ve spent decades working to expand Medicaid in North Carolina — just as 38 states and the District of Columbia already have. But NC legislative Republicans have BLOCKED these efforts at every turn. | | ---|--- Peter, experts estimate that expanding Medicaid would make health insurance accessible for more than 500,000 of our friends, family, and neighbors who need it. That would make a big difference to keeping our people safe and healthy — and it would lower costs for everyone. After living through the worst public health crisis in a century, it’s more apparent than ever that quality health care can’t be the privilege of only the wealthy few. | ---|--- Thanks for sharing your thoughts! Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. body:

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=3ebf4524a33148aca7e22728667d6cab&_e=jb2kfiI173vR7OjNJN5UeQZd4XviVYDGecokbxJ_qNejn7VqUXUJXXTzWiQ5ehXsTvy-PnO_eSJ9khYSIhkWpoeMv9pH4R4iTyt54vhIgc4ajHdLbNeI_7P552Ezui_F1tzRM-JwDLNTZNtm-5NJwGwqbsDfDiP38CqMa5vyYQrwhsn47dq3m_4p_4rQAwquU7WbWCgPr9Kdj5Ex09aS-wJRhvkYTN9SGQNPdK5-laTQadoUvsPICI_flqv_Enmfb4hthw1HPD9O72lnnY5jvVoIvkFcIdDD7IHas8kRDMqks80T9diq4nEXsrVC2M8DHAYsGV1sZtQgg6AhABnr827sgqQFillCRiAOrkHGZibPCNzJhkwJn6MQSVDl_yFXu3wYHRFUvqjyvmjnShy0URWis-4DC-udjyQ4vIkZ6cF-kVZfJsr9102QGeb7E8u3mNUYYiyo9s250Xyb1QQxTORElcof511TEkimntikUTuw0TDDBFv0OGCfuL4bofoW30kRdU30KHHu4LHGpxdWK9Z6ET-7i1JTg3vfmL0DXgRrhiblczsEBhx9v0-CUNLzk3sG3FIZC0Kb62OBlZSphwjK0mo9CKePbEQhRhy4Q9A%3D)

Fellow American,

**A few days ago, 6 state governments were hacked by a Chinese state actor. We don’t yet know what they were after, but we do know that they accessed the personal information of thousands of Americans.**

**This time last year, hackers got into a Florida water supply and changed the chemical makeup of the water to be deadly.** Luckily, plant workers noticed the hacker and changed the chemical makeup back to normal before the water went out to 15,000 Floridians, but this exposes a major hole in our security.

**An attack like this, that could have ended in American civilian casualties, should not and cannot happen again.****[If cybersecurity and defense of our infrastructure is something that you feel our government should begin focusing on please take a minute to give me your thoughts.](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=3ebf4524a33148aca7e22728667d6cab&_e=jb2kfiI173vR7OjNJN5UeQZd4XviVYDGecokbxJ_qNejn7VqUXUJXXTzWiQ5ehXsTvy-PnO_eSJ9khYSIhkWpoeMv9pH4R4iTyt54vhIgc4ajHdLbNeI_7P552Ezui_F1tzRM-JwDLNTZNtm-5NJwGwqbsDfDiP38CqMa5vyYQrwhsn47dq3m_4p_4rQAwquU7WbWCgPr9Kdj5Ex09aS-wJRhvkYTN9SGQNPdK5-laTQadoUvsPICI_flqv_Enmfb4hthw1HPD9O72lnnY5jvVoIvkFcIdDD7IHas8kRDMqks80T9diq4nEXsrVC2M8DHAYsGV1sZtQgg6AhABnr827sgqQFillCRiAOrkHGZibPCNzJhkwJn6MQSVDl_yFXu3wYHRFUvqjyvmjnShy0UTyZY-E-YEAIa40yQ5kH0toHKgSKFlXmajB6DHIn9meQc1mLIt4Z0EErWr1CzhXXDEXCU15UlsWcpGVzMdmMvG5nfPV2TMA4_bDNROud3BIrWx_OU-lEpOfRFf5gVFqN0mEpdODoAFAaTsqw8cNYkgD9JA8nIXdTdGctznQjBs2oVER8695TSz04_dlziG2_JGzmjzu_yJmQRbdfWIBvo20%3D)**

As tensions between the US and Russia continue to build, I think our government should be securing our critical infrastructures. It is widely known that many of our key infrastructure sectors, including water and energy, are protected by outdated security measures. This leaves our vital systems vulnerable to hacks or cyberattacks—an increasingly popular form of non-conventional warfare. It’s time for us to do something about it.

As a veteran, I know what it takes to defend our country. It’s no easy task defending the greatest country in the world, but it’s something that must be done. Our government's primary responsibility is to protect the people.

In Congress, I will ensure that issues like this get the attention that they deserve. **[Will you please take a minute to take my short survey and let me know if cybersecurity is something that you would like to see our Congress spend more time on?](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=3ebf4524a33148aca7e22728667d6cab&_e=jb2kfiI173vR7OjNJN5UeQZd4XviVYDGecokbxJ_qNejn7VqUXUJXXTzWiQ5ehXsTvy-PnO_eSJ9khYSIhkWpoeMv9pH4R4iTyt54vhIgc4ajHdLbNeI_7P552Ezui_F1tzRM-JwDLNTZNtm-5NJwGwqbsDfDiP38CqMa5vyYQrwhsn47dq3m_4p_4rQAwquU7WbWCgPr9Kdj5Ex09aS-wJRhvkYTN9SGQNPdK5-laTQadoUvsPICI_flqv_Enmfb4hthw1HPD9O72lnnY5jvVoIvkFcIdDD7IHas8kRDMqks80T9diq4nEXsrVC2M8DHAYsGV1sZtQgg6AhABnr827sgqQFillCRiAOrkHGZibPCNzJhkwJn6MQSVDl_yFXu3wYHRFUvqjyvmjnShy0UZbJCvUqLeQPwOXLMbVhWOGOASDLTiAQhTN8ENBuq3F9sajslRgPoiJ107NHzTKmYgI6TybcCLyWjiPubPtlHqFN7CS959pP36q2RC_-K0q4plJoC1wOyRWnFRpmg5LG2YcR2JFqM_d1nuzmcbv_ATeeGaxZa2gI4MDft5hE0Qy0qh4SooMvn481R_GMojN6X-uUiomYMvxFsPXfWU-4eOA%3D)**

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=3ebf4524a33148aca7e22728667d6cab&_e=jb2kfiI173vR7OjNJN5UeQZd4XviVYDGecokbxJ_qNejn7VqUXUJXXTzWiQ5ehXsTvy-PnO_eSJ9khYSIhkWpoeMv9pH4R4iTyt54vhIgc4ajHdLbNeI_7P552Ezui_F1tzRM-JwDLNTZNtm-5NJwGwqbsDfDiP38CqMa5vyYQrwhsn47dq3m_4p_4rQAwquU7WbWCgPr9Kdj5Ex09aS-wJRhvkYTN9SGQNPdK5-laTQadoUvsPICI_flqv_Enmfb4hthw1HPD9O72lnnY5jvVoIvkFcIdDD7IHas8kRDMqks80T9diq4nEXsrVC2M8DHAYsGV1sZtQgg6AhABnr827sgqQFillCRiAOrkHGZibPCNzJhkwJn6MQSVDl_yFXu3wYHRFUvqjyvmjnShy0Uc4wYvmiPEMKaZ8BuskOusiXPgh609UlSQcX93HZBeh2fQfcKZptUMP8pysxEgz2lC7O6Se6mNjRxpCXJo4KTYodfEi4Qa66tc6b6w4u72Q4vDT8uXF_JiE8lNMHJE5TZBlm2pTEwbTp7pB3bDOwy-7KuIrf5RGa5uhfU3o6vQAYUp0iiqpDvetahYInjNaFL_Qx1UqPz96mFudRGic1wUg%3D)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Geoff Diehl: Protecting Mass. Taxpayers from the Gas Tax Since 2014
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
You've probably seen a lot of recent headlines about Geoff calling for Massachusetts lawmakers to suspend the state gas tax amidst sky-high inflation rates.
---
|
---
| "I'm calling on members of the Massachusetts Legislature to support Massachusetts residents coping with price shocks at the gas pumps by using a supplemental spending bill as a vehicle to immediately suspend collection of our state gas tax. We should also suspend the motor vehicle excise tax."
\- Geoff Diehl, March 8, 2022
---
|
---
| But there's nothing new about Geoff wanting to protect Massachusetts residents from the gas tax. In fact, it's something Geoff's been doing for almost a decade.
Geoff led a ballot campaign back in 2014 that successfully struck down automatic increases in the state gas tax that were tied to the rate of inflation.
With inflation currently running at about 7.9%, can you possibly imagine what would have happened if Geoff hadn't stepped forward to protect taxpayers all those years ago?
Fortunately, Geoff was there back then to fight against unfair taxes. He's here now, campaigning hard against Beacon Hill's greed. And he'll continue to be there every single day to protect taxpayers once he's elected to serve as our next Governor.
There is no question that Geoff is committed to making Massachusetts a more affordable place to live.
The only question that remains is: can Geoff count on you to stand with him? Can he count on you to support his candidacy for Governor?
If you're able to, please consider making a donation in support of making Geoff our next Governor.
---
|
---
| | [Click Here to Make a Donation to Geoff's Campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AE6MANq51COMbHtt1RkRfX3BPrEZz5K_YLlSkQ5jYMZQlQ_AVvSu1ph0LOZ3o7joWTCWHVZJBK6vdWF-pg1c6PuRASV4TjWMyLn9VrtCiM3paUmgbqKkZETby84d3TECjb3q8RvxTj76uuoxVWhvB0Njtb4cvXgBfCaXh-3TLCL5HZvO-Zgf7g==&c=GlZBjLCb6ERFMHQ_SSpl7B860Odl4GjiV74ccI31V2rTrmsGY7WuxQ==&ch=lfpabNKyLzqAptm3hMEWRGb8E6uFbS-c_-v0TkjIu9_YTQgGBbTr_g==)
---
|
---
| Thank you for your support!
---

body:

It's a beautiful day! Today we are celebrating _Women in Public Office Day_. **And as you can imagine, there 's not much we like to do more at HER Time HQ than celebrating women in public office.**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2PzC3qxGH8GSiTAJRRfOCIivWFj6lHLyGggTwbJHON4=/E7WnrdUEce3AXmeiun-ccl11hUtSy_-MmOoP5DxpQl8=?refcode=X_031922_WomenInOfficeDay)
That's because when we elect women, they help support and empower _other_ women by fighting for things like paid family leave, the Violence Against Women Act, abortion rights, equal pay, and so much more.
It's a beautiful cycle, and one we're committed to continuing.
[We have 16 frontline Congresswomen who are fighting for all those important policies and more -- but they are all in really tough races in 2022. Will you help keep them in office by donating now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2PzC3qxGH8GSiTAJRRfOCIivWFj6lHLyGggTwbJHON4=/E7WnrdUEce3AXmeiun-ccl11hUtSy_-MmOoP5DxpQl8=?refcode=X_031922_WomenInOfficeDay)
Let's hear it for all our women in power!
-- _HER Time_

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: Donald Trump is a national security threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43152000/335940827/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGE0NmI5Ny1hYmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k506yZJvDGhVJzVntNLSL0gyYnAzGxswLUJZLFo5kAs=&emci=27809d37-aba7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c0a46b97-aba7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43152001/335940828/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGE0NmI5Ny1hYmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k506yZJvDGhVJzVntNLSL0gyYnAzGxswLUJZLFo5kAs=&emci=27809d37-aba7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c0a46b97-aba7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing our first federally-mandated FEC deadline of 2022, and right now we’re still very short of our $1,000,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**

Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump. Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat. Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of kompromat Russia has on him... Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him. I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
