body:
Maryland’s Court of Appeals just moved our primary date back to July 19, 2022. | | | |
---
| | |
# **Three additional weeks for us to WIN!**
---
| **Dear ****Peter,**

**Maryland’s Court of Appeals just moved our primary date back to July 19, 2022. ** **The Up-Side:** In three weeks, we can introduce our campaign to thousands more voters. In the last week alone, I called over 1,300 voters and our volunteers reached out to hundreds more. **The Down-Side:** Our campaign expenses just grew by three weeks! We need to raise an extra $25,000. _**Yikes!**_
---
| [Would you please donate today?](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=73ad3f5ba1&e=0faa9de128 "Would you please donate today?")
---
| **Grassroots campaigns are only as strong as the support they receive!**

In just two weeks, we have a major end-of-quarter filing deadline with the FEC. It is critical we get our numbers up by March 31st.

[**_Please donate today!!_**](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=db21542c64&e=0faa9de128)

_Campaigns are expensive and your support allows us to reach more voters and flip this district from big business to public interest!

An additional $25,000 will allow us to send mail to another 10,000 voters, purchase more palm cards, yard signs, digital ads, and afford three additional weeks of pay for campaign staff!_

**[Please help us maximize this opportunity and donate to our grassroots campaign today!](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=5e5f998e1d&e=0faa9de128)

Thank you,
Ben Smilowitz**
---
|

clean_body: Maryland’s Court of Appeals just moved our primary date back to July 19, 2022. | | | | | | | Three additional weeks for us to WIN! | Dear Peter, Maryland’s Court of Appeals just moved our primary date back to July 19, 2022. The Up-Side: In three weeks, we can introduce our campaign to thousands more voters. In the last week alone, I called over 1,300 voters and our volunteers reached out to hundreds more. The Down-Side: Our campaign expenses just grew by three weeks! We need to raise an extra $25,000. Yikes! | "Would you please donate today?" | Grassroots campaigns are only as strong as the support they receive! In just two weeks, we have a major end-of-quarter filing deadline with the FEC. It is critical we get our numbers up by March 31st. Campaigns are expensive and your support allows us to reach more voters and flip this district from big business to public interest! An additional $25,000 will allow us to send mail to another 10,000 voters, purchase more palm cards, yard signs, digital ads, and afford three additional weeks of pay for campaign staff! Thank you, Ben Smilowitz | Three additional weeks for us to WIN! | | | Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress

My re-election campaign is ramping up to be a fight. Despite the challenge, I am not deterred in the slightest.

While some running for public office will deceive voters and perpetuate lies, I will keep my head held high and tell people the truth.

I know that if we are going to move forward in strength - both in Wyoming and nationally - we have to be rooted in substance and ideas. subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
| |
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e5624140936b47b2bb6c540baf452472&_e=-IzB5Wino5aqikyBs_yFm1iOBq3GPEAk1yT-5vNnn-JaNvMukbhqEeaxxMPtfDjsocBriVpHKTXKORtVj-moNng8t0qJOkwqJQJcemWcnrMzbGcJnpoyJRzRpsGgzjtqRYlwDIOdlyWPimV3GRqgdNe8T6eFp3MqnCgBxGzxhIrGRScvIqIFxEl4bJyZy0JTkSTzbDAvarm1J5ecQ5tpyCCnV6i2NgMO-E1OvnhCNEkLODvpf4nyQ8F6D1jly8--qS672pm88iQcId18wpsZqLdXSN3opICCPIGjXdsnXtNeiNW9ZMhM2rVJmw17x55y6M57-0AeC1zpkJczf85UufmaDMWhGZjOLQdlwBy3rV0afG39x9GKxSGHBxq5NxvGuULXE6BFfeP2yZkuwrGC1w%3D%3D)

Friend,

I have good news and bad news.

Let’s start with the **good news** —I qualified for the ballot last week. This means I have the ultimate honor of running for reelection as your representative in 2022!

**The bad news** is that my radical Democratic opponent is trying to do the same.

Friend, I don’t have to tell you that my Democratic opponent would be like a bull in a China shop if elected to represent East Tennessee.

For months, he has attacked me for:

✅ Supporting election integrity and voter ID
✅ My strong pro-life values
✅ Defending people's freedom from burdensome COVID-19 mandates

I don’t know about you, but I see those conservative values as a point of pride, not something to be criticized for.

**That just goes to show you how off-the-charts liberal he is!**
[**Support my campaign to defend our conservative values**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e5624140936b47b2bb6c540baf452472&_e=-IzB5Wino5aqikyBs_yFm1iOBq3GPEAk1yT-5vNnn-JaNvMukbhqEeaxxMPtfDjsocBriVpHKTXKORtVj-moNng8t0qJOkwqJQJcemWcnrMzbGcJnpoyJRzRpsGgzjtqRYlwDIOdlyWPimV3GRqgdNe8T6eFp3MqnCgBxGzxhIrGRScvIqIFxEl4bJyZy0JTQHgdNFbUOWjLFp48WzyNWOaFvD483EQXtUR8u2uLoTTEDtCBRUd5wxT7QqpZM5je_LcZ8OvzwBf2tem5mkrxMhzdFVNEqZpc7ILd8TqlnzlifatqRWmM5Zhrl_UtsC_j-mP-gkWrSBcJktuMv0fUOojkz4SwMSVuSJJxizcJzj1e9aArpwzksTzgTQ90TLiTunu9JetddvZAzhJlEv3rvg%3D%3D)
While I know voters like you will champion Republicans like me up and down the ballot, I need your support to fend off the woke mob today.

Can I count on you to chip in just $10 to my campaign so we can show my Democratic opponent that East Tennessee wants no part in his anti-American agenda?
[**CHIP IN $10 NOW**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e5624140936b47b2bb6c540baf452472&_e=-IzB5Wino5aqikyBs_yFm1iOBq3GPEAk1yT-5vNnn-JaNvMukbhqEeaxxMPtfDjsocBriVpHKTXKORtVj-moNng8t0qJOkwqJQJcemWcnrMzbGcJnpoyJRzRpsGgzjtqRYlwDIOdlyWPimV3GRqgdNe8T6eFp3MqnCgBxGzxhIqkJe2TW22AM0HEskTycrz2o1eGuUZ3NrTn4j2s4pb3lSBuYUf3BSumOs58ApjjTvcsIe96EeunuZi7rwc8iu3e3gJj53D3B0cf4H4SisiizuxP8FUum3D_BKcHo3iwt5hkdGDfF_fixs1RBiq-FcIvOl7kI5fjwDwswrkZ5s4LcqobCkfvcHPrcXSQ9g7Fj2zAJzlCxFYO2fLwI4rwu0UKlEfc95OgAAvy4mwqVgmMIvzUmiwAS0NsbumfTVZpqrY%3D)
I can’t thank you enough for your continued support and donations.

Humbly,
Tim Burchett

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown=20for=20Governor?=
subject: ICYMI: Another Endorsement! 🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Michael Brown, Republican candidate for Governor, announced today that he has been endorsed by David Den Houten, the Missaukee County Prosecutor. | | | |
---
| | | Peter – I'm pleased to announce that I've been endorsed by David Den Houten, the Missaukee County Prosecutor.

David stated, “I am endorsing Michael Brown for Governor as he understands that criminal justice reforms must be made with an eye toward victim rights and community safety.”
---
|
---
| “With crime rising nationally and in Michigan, his many years in law enforcement and the knowledge and compassion that his experience brings, are exactly what Michigan needs for Governor,” he added. “I wholeheartedly endorse Michael Brown."

I’m thankful for David’s support. He has been on the front lines of our criminal justice system and understands the importance of standing up for the rights of victims of crime.

David’s support adds to the growing list of endorsements of my campaign. I've also been endorsed by Representative Beth Griffin, Hillsdale County Sheriff Scott Hodshire, St. Joe County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite, Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli, Chairman of the Berrien County Board of Commissioners Mac Elliott, former Berrien County Treasurer Bret Witkowski, rock star Ted Nugent, and many business and community leaders.

I'd be honored to have your support as well. Please head over to my website and add your name.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---
| [ENDORSE MICHAEL BROWN](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=37d7d510ab&e=0636b97700 "ENDORSE MICHAEL BROWN")

Folks,

JD Vance’s garbage book, Hillbilly Elegy, costs $7.85.

You can buy a copy to use as a coaster (or a doorstop, or a chew toy for
your dog), OR you can donate $7.85 to our campaign to flip Ohio blue and
expand the Senate majority.

While JD Vance pretends to be your average Ohioan, he couldn’t be more out
of touch. After years of working in Silicon Valley boardrooms, Vance’s
qualifications for the Senate include the backing of a $10 million super
PAC from billionaire Trump lackey Peter Thiel, and a record of bashing the
working class and even blaming them for their economic struggles.

body:
|
| | |
**Hey Patriot,**
**IMPORTANT NOTICE:
Your 1776 Donor Club Membership MUST be renewed
**
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59878756:JkIjkToNa:m:1:3299561967:CC384EFE3125921D62004B881B74B706:r)
---

_Kindly renew before midnight TONIGHT so there 's no lapse in your membership!_

---

**AS YOU KNOW, the Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable.** From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated were invited to join the 1776 Donor Club: **including you!**

Will you decide to step up to the plate one more time for Trump and for America and renew your 1776 Donor Club Membership? **We are ONLY inviting our TOP Trump Patriots to re-up their status as a member.**
**[Chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left's attacks.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59878756:JkIjkToNa:m:1:3299561967:CC384EFE3125921D62004B881B74B706:r "Chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left’s attacks. ")**
245 years ago, our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history: _**AMERICA**_. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. _**But now, those freedoms are under attack. body:
When I’m treating a patient, the last thing I want them to worry about is whether they can afford the medication needed to keep them healthy and alive. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43153076/335945941/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220319drugprices_DKJ_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDkyMjJlYS1iMGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kmAfdu2yY2szhYsoYrsOPHNxe2DP0W08UBJrIne48xw=)
---
**As a doctor, this is what I want Congress to hear:**_When I’m treating a patient, the last thing I want them to worry about is whether they can afford the medication needed to keep them healthy and alive._ We all know that prescription prices are too high — _criminally_ high, even. Prices for popular brand name drugs for diabetes, asthma, and depression are up to 87% cheaper in Canada than in the United States. **We can fix this if we give Medicaid the power to negotiate prescription drug costs. But it will take political courage.** I’m running to replace a Congressman who raked in contributions from pharmaceutical industries while voting against lowering the price of prescription drugs. We need a doctor in the House to get this done. [Friend, will you help me flip this seat, go to D.C., and fight for the families hurting from Congress’ lack of action on prescription drug costs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43153077/335945942/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220319drugprices_DKJ_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDkyMjJlYS1iMGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kmAfdu2yY2szhYsoYrsOPHNxe2DP0W08UBJrIne48xw=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: What we’d like to say to Sen. Manchin (re: Biden’s SCOTUS Nominee) >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4)
---
**Listen, President Biden 's SCOTUS nominee will face the Senate on Monday - _and we 're shaking in our boots:_** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7172?t=7&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4) President Biden has the opportunity to nominate an amazing progressive Supreme Court Justice - **_a fierce defender for our rights who will impact the Court for DECADES._**

But, _we are TERRIFIED that Senator Manchin will stick to his guns and BLOCK President Biden 's nominee._

[**So we 're sending Manchin a letter demanding that he does his job and SUPPORTS President Biden's nominee: Add your name NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7172?t=8&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7172?t=9&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4)
---
**TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN**
**FROM: A Nervous Democrat **
**DATE: March 19, 2022**

**_Dear Senator Manchin,_**

**You 're making me nervous.** With the Supreme Court already HEAVILY conservative, now is NOT the time for you to take a stand against President Biden.

So much is on the line that our Supreme Court must defend:

Reproductive rights.
Voting rights.
Public health.
And so much more.

**If we miss our chance to put a fierce progressive on the Court, we could be plagued by MAGA rule for DECADES._NO NO NO!!!_**

So now, I'm personally demanding you step up, meet this moment, and support Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as President Biden's Supreme Court Nominee! [I'm dead serious - and to prove it, I'm giving a donation of $2 to the Voter Protection Project to help elect more Democrats who will fight to balance the Supreme Court »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7172?t=10&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7173?t=11&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4)
---
**_*SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT*_**
Sincerely,

**__x. A Nervous Democrat__**
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7172?t=12&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4)
---
**_*SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT*_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=6&akid=1559%2E878179%2EakPWF4)

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Enroll in our all-new online course: Constitution 201
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsVyV4XHN9

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVyV4XHN9

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Have you ever wondered what caused the rejection of the American Founding and the radical transformation of our government?

To answer this pressing question, I invite you to enroll in Hillsdale's free online course, "Constitution 201: The Progressive Rejection of the Founding and the Rise of Bureaucratic Despotism."

Taught by Hillsdale College's politics faculty, this course invites every liberty-loving American to explore:

the origins and key early leaders of American Progressivism,
how Progressivism has altered the structure of the Constitution and the relationship of the American people to their government,
the new ideas and purposes that animate Progressivism today,
how this movement away from the American Founding threatens the rights of every American,
and how we might restore constitutional government in America today.

Activate your free access to "Constitution 201" and begin learning at your own pace.

Activate your free course now »

Now more than ever before it is essential for every citizen to understand the nature of modern Progressivism so that we can intelligently defend free government in America. I hope you will join us in this pursuit.

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Enroll in the course now

- Fred D.

- John C.

Hi Peter — it’s Jeff. _**We’re officially****2**** MONTHS from the Primary!**_ I can’t stress enough how important it is we defeat _Dr. Oz_ and _Dave McCormick_ on May 17th... I don’t know if you’ve seen some of the ads these guys are putting out, but it’s the MOST GENERIC PANDERING to conservatives. I swear it’s like some of these guys are reading from a script. Maybe that’s why they refuse to answer tough questions from Pennsylvania voters or, you know, _show up to a debate_. Peter, we can’t underestimate these guys. They’re well-funded and ready to sell out our commonwealthー _[**Don’t let that happen, support my fight to Save Pennsylvania >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da31f950a71242d3a9769b748784618e&_e=mvjE81JttMJIGR9yp9Pl7D_fr4TjMgOQ-Y3ntuy3sNV1un7C_YBZzkGeF4cT-mVRH8UrpARmDjW9vg0Itzcn40z9Z4cs7YcSERlfZWj7p4ggg5lE9coJOpzyXKoyNICuzYBnhc1bpIVrNPlr4QEFb9KJx9LRHd0PLsMBbtR_CH34CME-p9Ewzk0XCOBM9P-435wdgOPptUCcyJ42xlsE7IPYGcmm_brpNSQ2T1coDoYX6mtW3SkOm3rt7PqEjipQRiYSoGb3r6y96srn_sKE7bHGYZAkX-h2mZ4G7Y-h1KzRbjRj5DGvaGm8GhtQa0BQWL2MNOKq0-3svZ7nnVHLLXLuK93XvdC-lcB9zRaPARwXn7eEngQHDrO_uUbjI0frkPTEBh81MwLY3jXoUYu8Q6-p6sPOXoR6PKB7XgZDVPAyueZ3sFIe_l-fL6AQDbDdLumQRmDpXFalnTeylArMGSGkj5bc33heoWqIJ9gSPd3khdTjRfKkYmaSLeOcB0Lk)_

name: VoteVets
subject: $3 to elect the next Tammy Duckworth?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Before the end of every quarter, we distribute checks to a number of veteran candidates running for office.
#
Derek —
Before the end of every quarter, we distribute checks to a number of veteran candidates running for office.
Think about people like Tammy Duckworth, Ruben Gallego, Ted Lieu and more. We supported all of them... and early.
Those checks are made up by lots and lots of individual donations made by VoteVets supporters. They demonstrate the strength of the community we’ve built together.
But more importantly, they are used to elect a new generation of veteran leaders. The ones you’ll be proud to support years down the line.
There are a number of them running for Congress this year, and we’d like to help them out now because early money is the most important for a campaign. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today to help elect a new generation of progressive veterans? Your support before the end of quarter fundraising deadline means a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-elect?refcode=em220319-1-15&t=1&refcode2=4604_3013755_lB0QYl&akid=4604%2E3013755%2ElB0QYl)

name: Team Democracy (via saraforwi.com)
subject: Hey Peter, got a minute for democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Rodriguez for Wisconsin
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorse-election?refcode=email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorse-election?refcode=email]
Peter-
Right now, Wisconsin is ground zero for democracy and voting rights in our country as GOP leaders enable and embolden anti-democracy conspiracy theorists.
GOP politicians have joined extremists to:
❌ Introduce 40 restrictive voting laws
❌ Embrace plans to jail mayors and dismantle the bi-partisan Elections Commission
❌ Decertify the 2020 election of Joe Biden
STAND UP FOR DEMOCRACY TODAY >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorse-election?refcode=email]
This is not a Democratic or Republican issue -- this impacts each and every one of us. We have to work together to rebuild trust to protect our democracy.
Republican Assembly Speaker, Robin Vos, has wasted more than $680,000 of taxpayer money to run a sham election investigation — all as a means to undermine our elections and pave a path for the GOP to win the Governor's office in November.
Tell Robin Vos and GOP extremists that democracy is on the ballot this year — and democracy will prevail! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorse-election?refcode=email]
We need your help—it’s all hands on deck for voting rights. Extremists want to undo the policies that made the 2020 election the most secure and accessible ever, make voting more confusing and violate citizens’ access to the ballot box.
This is unacceptable — and it makes this upcoming election all that more important. We have to organize now, fight back with every tool we have, and win this year to secure the voting rights of Wisconsinites now and in the future.
Thank you for all you do to win!
Team Sara
Sara is focused on putting Wisconsin first and
getting things done that will make a difference
in people’s daily lives. Contribute to support
Sara's work to keep moving Wisconsin forward >>
Contribute today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-rodriguez-for-wisconsin?refcode=highstakes]
https://www.facebook.com/Sara4WI [https://www.facebook.com/Sara4WI] https://twitter.com/sara4wi [https://twitter.com/sara4wi]
Paid for by Sara Rodriguez for Wisconsin.
Sara Rodriguez for Wisconsin
PO Box 1404
Brookfield, WI 53008-1404
United States

However, if you would still like to unsubscribe from our emails, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/adeaa9e5-93a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/2912dc90-94a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTEyZGM5MC05NGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uzpX_m_dbTorJsi4xLnXfbF0uJkeKbCB8yE4C4SP9cA=&id=124556504 .

name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: SXSW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4nILNvUH50QfALR86YlQESKuvq6XNo3yH_wf3jS3SGlYOVXYm_ggMKUdmhiRxDqhp4d3tbIzxWrel1ndmqqJfrdsCsDDtainbASGac-9PETn3mD98UnPJB0Wn3F2tkNamIhvKC8KUsMuirUK5JtQk-v/3kh/r-tDTG1IRmCl8rdK1r7C1g/h0/qU0mZmBubFrDmNtxafYEaV1_3yKcbOkjWuZHZDZdKw4) Hi Peter, it’s Jessica. This past week, I made a pit stop at SXSW’s “Immigration: The Real Story” session in Austin for a discussion about immigration and the border. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCai3G68V-wLuS4jWD5DcuLsqYTnwL2wswUzGLzCa7cTq-Gv1iWCL4dNHawaZt05lhl2QN2o2gGVZ26SvpYEIn2XjmKRjmmKvNtZuUZerDNBRk8HTSTuAtKqLuHGAK44QzcV0H1XwcUmwZTlGkdNVpgi90otflypFUARFRMiXF1Y7lyc4I8lQwpwdH8smd7h4zwwIWFeHpovCrMQeSfCLZSqMGSIlYcrvY47XSDCnShU_XF5bOM41QfE9YZ7DY-jA0/3kh/r-tDTG1IRmCl8rdK1r7C1g/h1/GY7-WRc5ubUl2eTTT5jrgZR7LkwkH-YzCsr8JpoxEOw) During this session, I talked a lot about my own experiences growing up on the border as the daughter of Mexican American immigrants and as an immigration and human rights attorney. You see, growing up in Laredo, I saw first-hand that the rules of this country weren’t written for everyone. My experience — along with the struggles of my family and neighbors — are what inspired me to become an immigration and human rights attorney in the first place: so I can protect the rights of immigrants. Conservative politicians like Henry Cuellar have turned their backs on immigrants and created a false narrative that paints them as the problem. While Donald Trump was in office, Cuellar voted to fund his border wall _twice_ and was the only Democrat to support extending the amount of time immigrant children could be detained at the border. Here’s the reality: folks who come to the United States are not what’s causing a crisis — the crisis itself is how we’re handling these human lives. It’s time that we bring in new representation to South Texas who will treat our country’s immigration system with compassion and love. **And once I’m elected to Congress,_that’s exactly what I intend to do._** [_**So if you’re with me, will you make a small contribution today to my campaign? The runoff election is just 2 months away, so it’s important that I get all the support I can from grassroots supporters like you.**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCai3G68V-wLuS4jWD5DcuLsqYTnwL2wswUzGLzCa7cTovV4uMZ1JU7N75rvDLf0EX5d7obX5PvmDJcU7-g0gS_RQwON4DsGpGYFxzIiXpyP3PmKu1xXLKZlZFOvMYodSVgLefZeIh-KHBw7zBKIEpJ60G9IhQmD4-gWo6bDYgi7MFm3-kmFYg_5d5ck-dmoogkPB9zcyarjL77EEQ34DrPJJfaQmpCHoISeSWSiZa1ctHz9cABOHTCCFt4dDYhV4L/3kh/r-tDTG1IRmCl8rdK1r7C1g/h2/tTWBt1_GeSEfoWtvckvaV-A9q4N5TW6gQRSEHxwJSgs) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCai3G68V-wLuS4jWD5DcuLsqYTnwL2wswUzGLzCa7cTpRs8Hcydn8Mo9jXMV_jAJCBfOhj1DqC6ignNe3ImQyFh4gJGvLD8X0QKRBqNjJ4OYYaD4o1v9pt_ybBACi9ROLVvq41t3rjRkhjMg4U-RE4dsyxj5p1j3cbtHXCtENfFUytjna3wVb1LZeMPm_4idrNVnRdKOtcAZdRQfodbE4rd07PorY4fZaIGl5M8aHo7Nb-78etZ6If955bJHUQ6Q9/3kh/r-tDTG1IRmCl8rdK1r7C1g/h3/Sw5JcDq8GrCnH-TLAczd2ILxHf7tyGlQSFwTxtO77qk) I’m running for Congress to create a pathway to citizenship for our undocumented people, revamp the visa system, strengthen family reunification, and create a humane border and immigration policy by scrapping disastrous laws like the 1996 Immigration Act that lays the groundwork for the massive deportations that we’re seeing today. We defied expectations in the Democratic primary when we came within just a small margin of defeating Henry Cuellar, despite being outspent by hundreds of thousands of dollars. And together, we are going to prove that a people-powered campaign like ours can take on a far-right Democratic incumbent and win the runoff election on May 24th. clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, it’s Jessica. This past week, I made a pit stop at SXSW’s “Immigration: The Real Story” session in Austin for a discussion about immigration and the border. During this session, I talked a lot about my own experiences growing up on the border as the daughter of Mexican American immigrants and as an immigration and human rights attorney. You see, growing up in Laredo, I saw first-hand that the rules of this country weren’t written for everyone. My experience — along with the struggles of my family and neighbors — are what inspired me to become an immigration and human rights attorney in the first place: so I can protect the rights of immigrants. Conservative politicians like Henry Cuellar have turned their backs on immigrants and created a false narrative that paints them as the problem. While Donald Trump was in office, Cuellar voted to fund his border wall twice and was the only Democrat to support extending the amount of time immigrant children could be detained at the border. Here’s the reality: folks who come to the United States are not what’s causing a crisis — the crisis itself is how we’re handling these human lives. It’s time that we bring in new representation to South Texas who will treat our country’s immigration system with compassion and love. And once I’m elected to Congress,that’s exactly what I intend to do. I’m running for Congress to create a pathway to citizenship for our undocumented people, revamp the visa system, strengthen family reunification, and create a humane border and immigration policy by scrapping disastrous laws like the 1996 Immigration Act that lays the groundwork for the massive deportations that we’re seeing today. We defied expectations in the Democratic primary when we came within just a small margin of defeating Henry Cuellar, despite being outspent by hundreds of thousands of dollars. And together, we are going to prove that a people-powered campaign like ours can take on a far-right Democratic incumbent and win the runoff election on May 24th. Juntos, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

Friend, I just wrapped up a finance meeting, and the main point of the discussion was this: How am I going to overcome the combined $116 million Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm raised last year?

Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We are writing to ask if you can make your first $3 donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign today. Mark needs you in the fight with him.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Please give us a chance to explain why this request is so very important – especially today.
#

Friends —
In a moment, we're going to ask you to make a very important donation to help Mark Kelly defend this Senate seat. Please let us explain why the contribution we’re asking you to make today is so important.
Here's the truth:
The only reason Mark Kelly was able to withstand so many attacks from corporate special interest groups last campaign and is doing so again in this one is because we’ve built a record-breaking small-dollar fundraising campaign.
It’s unlike anything an Arizona Senate race has seen before. And it’s been critical, because without it, it’d be Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell right now.
But if we’re going to win this campaign, Mark needs you in the fight. He really needs you to make your first donation.
Donate to help us reach 1 million donors this week. Donate because our FEC filing deadline is coming up and we need to report as many donors as possible. Donate because Mark needs your help if he’s going to win.
Please:
[**Can you make your first $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today? This is an FEC filing deadline month and we need to report as many donors to this campaign as we possibly can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220319-1-7&t=4&refcode2=2395_6688874_uNN4VI&akid=2395%2E6688874%2EuNN4VI)

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: we are legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
This deadline is one of the last chances we have to show the strength of our grassroots movement
#

Hey team —
At the end of this month, we will face the final quarterly FEC filing deadline of our campaign, after which we are legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers.
This deadline is one of the last chances we have to show the strength of our grassroots movement before our May primary, so it's very important for us to stand out this time around with a big number to report.
[So if you're in a place to do so today, we hope you will consider making a $3 donation to support our movement for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43147577/335920372/-358086307?refcode2=bec87437-99a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220319-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWM4NzQzNy05OWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74tOyB50uK_V3KeTBgEmVhIPwhkRwIMO47hYh7yefro=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43147578/335920373/-358086307?refcode2=bec87437-99a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220319-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWM4NzQzNy05OWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74tOyB50uK_V3KeTBgEmVhIPwhkRwIMO47hYh7yefro=)**
Since this is one of the last times our fundraising numbers will be made public before our May primary, everyone will be watching to see if we have what it takes to take our fight for working families to the Senate.
If we don’t post strong numbers, the pundits will say we don't have what it takes to win this race.
That’s why we’re trying to bring in as many small-dollar donations this month as possible. It’s not just how much money we raise, but how many donations we receive that shows our grassroots strength.
If everyone contributes whatever they can afford, we’ll show all of the naysayers that there's an enormous coalition of support behind Malcolm's historic campaign for Senate.
[So we have to ask: Can you make a $3 contribution today, ahead of our big deadline at the end of this month, to ensure that our movement for working people comes out on top?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43147579/335920374/-358086307?refcode2=bec87437-99a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220319-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWM4NzQzNy05OWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74tOyB50uK_V3KeTBgEmVhIPwhkRwIMO47hYh7yefro=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43147580/335920375/-358086307?refcode2=bec87437-99a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220319-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWM4NzQzNy05OWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74tOyB50uK_V3KeTBgEmVhIPwhkRwIMO47hYh7yefro=)**
Thank you.
Team Malcolm

subject: This isn’t the email we were hoping to send
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
Wow. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_43Z2uXnk78vuX_mMYmZDEyCAmEoBEiVKOfAKoTyCMIg1ANGzUbUDSXeF9UrLHhujgA8y75YzCBjtEJTYKJH51k8xeYkTxYElWCalsNBrWNGWoSgiojhaQQpkiHfkJDTIATblSGwvx6mDj43PqHrZTEOGA5X_hAfQfBeVew_o7Fh48FgAhENkCPmQm1gw7TQWDRST1yYSdhS87Gv3Se9JuT_16yr2ws8cyTDBdHPZcTBrCyI56JXfcE04F_Pf8-58/3kh/c7N26LGmQyOlNeJwFZdw2w/h0/ClH31X61GU73GGLVmQ-oUfYLZ39iFSaL9zu34ccPuZw)
Peter, Here’s the truth: It doesn’t matter how unpopular Kyrsten Sinema is in Arizona. Primarying Sinema and ousting her from the Senate is going to require a _serious_ amount of grassroots resources. Not only does she have the advantage of being the incumbent, Sinema has over $5 million cash on hand — not to mention corporate-backed super PACs willing to defend their ally at any cost. Here’s another truth, Peter: **Our fundraising hasn’t kept pace with what we need in order to beat Kyrsten Sinema and her campaign war chest.** Every dollar we raise goes to grassroots organizations in Arizona laying the strategic groundwork for a primary challenge against Sinema. clean_body: Wow. | | | Peter, Here’s the truth: It doesn’t matter how unpopular Kyrsten Sinema is in Arizona. Primarying Sinema and ousting her from the Senate is going to require a serious amount of grassroots resources. Not only does she have the advantage of being the incumbent, Sinema has over $5 million cash on hand — not to mention corporate-backed super PACs willing to defend their ally at any cost. Here’s another truth, Peter: Our fundraising hasn’t kept pace with what we need in order to beat Kyrsten Sinema and her campaign war chest. Every dollar we raise goes to grassroots organizations in Arizona laying the strategic groundwork for a primary challenge against Sinema. But right now, we need a critical boost to our fundraising to keep our work going. So we’re coming to you personally to ask... Our mission is to ensure that Arizona is able to send a real Democrat to the Senate, and that we have a strong Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate after the 2022 midterms. Together, we’re making sure our partner organizations on the ground in Arizona have everything they need to oust Kyrsten Sinema. Let us explain why. Last cycle, Maggie Hassan won her race by only 1,017 votes, making it the closest Senate race in 2016. And now this cycle, Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have spent more than $7.5 million on attack ads against her. That’s more than they’ve spent attacking any other Democratic Senator in the country. If we keep getting outspent, we'll have no chance of holding this seat and our razor-thin Democratic majority. We'll be frank: With election experts now calling this race a toss-up and a poll showing Maggie statistically tied with her opponents, we need to make up ground – and fast – or we could lose this election and with it our Senate majority. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

subject: Meet challenges with strength
body:

# Overcoming challenges for a stronger campaign
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | [**DONATE!**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f7N_Ynn43/c?w=OK1nH3X2xo1VRlF9OUMHOlKBplswjbDfXZGz6i3UaJQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RvdWd3aGl0ZTRjb25ncmVzc3dlYnNpdGUiLCJyIjoiMmVmZmZhNGUtMDYxNy00MDEzLWZlM2ItOGQ1OGViNzM2NzJlIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0)
---
| | Español debajo del inglésOvercoming challenges for a stronger campaign I realize that virtual meetings have had their shortcomings. I’d like to extend a heartfelt apology to those people who have tried to access our virtual town halls and have been left out. Every voice matters to this campaign, and our campaign is working hard for solutions that will make our virtual events easier to access and available on more platforms. I understand the frustration of people who want to be heard and involved, but feel left on the sidelines. That is not what our campaign is meant to be. Our inclusive stance is to correct the inequities in representation that currently exist in the political process; that means recognizing where we ourselves have fallen short, and putting in the work to make things right. We can build a strong coalition. Everyone knows that politics is full of partisanship, pettiness and people protecting their own power. As I meet new people on the campaign trail, one question I am frequently asked is, “how are you going to bring people together?” I am grateful for the opportunity to demonstrate a new approach to politics for the 4th Congressional District, one that focuses on building unity instead of divisiveness. With that in mind, I would like to share with you some exciting news about our campaign. We have hired the first full-time Diversity Advocate for a campaign in Central Washington. Mark Anthony Figueroa is a first-generation Mexican American born in Santa Ana, California, and raised in Tri-Cities, Washington. He is the eldest of six siblings and a first generation migrant college student and graduate. His experience is in the realm of education in under-resourced and low-income communities. He has taught at Pasco High school and St. Patrick’s Catholic school. He is passionate about inclusivity in representation and equity for the common good. Within his new role, he is an added voice of support for those who have historically been excluded and are not being heard. This campaign will be one that brings our community together, reaching across boundaries of background and language to strengthen each other. Fluent in English and Spanish, it is our hope to break down language barriers within the political process and communicate to our Spanish-speaking communities of their importance and human dignity. Our goal is to increase voter registration and voter turnout in CD4 for all groups and celebrate the richness of diversity within our district. Our new campaign manager has a background in public service and education. Lindsey Keesling has a twenty year history of social service: she’s worked on transitioning families out of homelessness; drug and alcohol abuse prevention and treatment; youth mentorship and more. She is a proud alumnus of Yakima Community College and Heritage University. Most recently she’s worked as a public school teacher in the Yakima School District. She is passionate about strengthening community resources so that children can succeed. Reaching out to marginalized groups isn’t without challenges, but we are ready. I am looking forward to outreach opportunities throughout the district. If we back down from the challenges we face because they are difficult, that means accepting a loss from the start. The truth is that we can win, and I believe we must win in order to offer our district a stronger and more secure future. We will continue to innovate and create a new kind of campaign for the 4th Congressional District, and to overcome the challenges we face through bringing our community together.
---

| |
Superando las dificultades para una campaña más fuerte Sé que las reuniones virtuales han tenido sus carencias. Me gustaría extender una más sincera disculpa a aquellas personas que han intentado acceder a nuestros ayuntamientos virtuales y se han quedado fuera. Cada voz es importante para esta campaña, y nuestra campaña está trabajando arduamente para encontrar soluciones que harán que nuestros eventos virtuales sean más fáciles de acceder y estén disponibles en más plataformas. Entiendo la frustración de las personas que quieren ser escuchadas e involucradas, pero se sienten marginadas. Eso no es lo que pretende ser nuestra campaña. Nuestra postura inclusiva es corregir las inequidades en la representación que existen actualmente en el proceso político; eso significa reconocer dónde nos hemos quedado cortos y esforzarnos para hacer las cosas bien. Podemos construir una coalición fuerte. Todo el mundo sabe que la política puede estar llena de parcialidad y que la gente proteja su propio poder. A medida que conozco gente nueva en la campaña electoral, una pregunta que me hacen con frecuencia es: "¿cómo vas a unir a la gente?" Estoy agradecido por la oportunidad de demostrar un nuevo enfoque de política para el Distrito 4 del Congreso, uno que se enfoca en construir la unidad en lugar de división. Con eso en mente, me gustaría compartir con ustedes algunas noticias emocionantes sobre nuestra campaña. Hemos contratado al primer Partidario de la Diversidad de tiempo completo para una campaña en el centro de Washington. Mark Anthony Figueroa es un mexicoamericano de primera generación nacido en Santa Ana, California, y criado en Tri-Cities, Washington. Es el mayor de seis hermanos y un estudiante universitario migrante de primera generación y graduado. Su experiencia es en el área de la educación en comunidades de escasos recursos y bajos ingresos. Ha enseñado en la escuela secundaria Pasco High y en la escuela católica St. Patrick. Le apasiona la inclusión en la representación y la equidad para el bien común. Dentro de su nuevo rol, es una voz adicional de apoyo para aquellos que históricamente han sido excluidos y no están siendo escuchados. Esta campaña será la que una a nuestra comunidades, superando los límites de origen e idioma para fortalecernos mutuamente. Con fluidez en inglés y español, esperamos romper las barreras del idioma dentro del proceso político y comunicar a nuestras comunidades de habla hispana su importancia y dignidad humana. Nuestro objetivo es aumentar el registro de votantes y la participación electoral en CD4 para todos los grupos y celebrar la riqueza de la diversidad dentro de nuestro distrito. Nuestra nueva directora de campaña tiene experiencia en servicio público y educación. Lindsey Keesling tiene una historia de veinte años de servicio social: ha trabajado en la transición de familias fuera de la falta de vivienda; prevención y tratamiento del abuso de drogas y alcohol; tutoría juvenil y más. Ella es una orgullosa alumna de Yakima Community College y Heritage University. Más recientemente, trabajó como maestra de escuela pública en el Distrito Escolar de Yakima. Le apasiona fortalecer los recursos de la comunidad para que los niños puedan tener éxito. Alcanzar a los grupos excluidos no está libre de desafíos, pero estamos preparados. Espero con ansias las oportunidades de alcance en todo el distrito. Si retrocedemos ante los desafíos que enfrentamos porque son difíciles, eso significa aceptar una pérdida desde el principio. La verdad es que podemos ganar, y creo que debemos ganar para poder ofrecerle a nuestro distrito un futuro más fuerte y seguro. Continuaremos innovando y creando un nuevo tipo de campaña para el 4° Distrito Congresional, y para superar los desafíos que enfrentamos al unir a nuestra comunidad.
---

clean_body: Español debajo del inglés Overcoming challenges for a stronger campaign I realize that virtual meetings have had their shortco | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Overcoming challenges for a stronger campaign | | | | | | | | Español debajo del inglésOvercoming challenges for a stronger campaign I realize that virtual meetings have had their shortcomings. I’d like to extend a heartfelt apology to those people who have tried to access our virtual town halls and have been left out. Every voice matters to this campaign, and our campaign is working hard for solutions that will make our virtual events easier to access and available on more platforms. I understand the frustration of people who want to be heard and involved, but feel left on the sidelines. That is not what our campaign is meant to be. Our inclusive stance is to correct the inequities in representation that currently exist in the political process; that means recognizing where we ourselves have fallen short, and putting in the work to make things right. We can build a strong coalition. Everyone knows that politics is full of partisanship, pettiness and people protecting their own power. As I meet new people on the campaign trail, one question I am frequently asked is, “how are you going to bring people together?” I am grateful for the opportunity to demonstrate a new approach to politics for the 4th Congressional District, one that focuses on building unity instead of divisiveness. With that in mind, I would like to share with you some exciting news about our campaign. We have hired the first full-time Diversity Advocate for a campaign in Central Washington. Mark Anthony Figueroa is a first-generation Mexican American born in Santa Ana, California, and raised in Tri-Cities, Washington. He is the eldest of six siblings and a first generation migrant college student and graduate. His experience is in the realm of education in under-resourced and low-income communities. He has taught at Pasco High school and St. Patrick’s Catholic school. He is passionate about inclusivity in representation and equity for the common good. Within his new role, he is an added voice of support for those who have historically been excluded and are not being heard. This campaign will be one that brings our community together, reaching across boundaries of background and language to strengthen each other. Fluent in English and Spanish, it is our hope to break down language barriers within the political process and communicate to our Spanish-speaking communities of their importance and human dignity. Our goal is to increase voter registration and voter turnout in CD4 for all groups and celebrate the richness of diversity within our district. Our new campaign manager has a background in public service and education. Lindsey Keesling has a twenty year history of social service: she’s worked on transitioning families out of homelessness; drug and alcohol abuse prevention and treatment; youth mentorship and more. She is a proud alumnus of Yakima Community College and Heritage University. Most recently she’s worked as a public school teacher in the Yakima School District. She is passionate about strengthening community resources so that children can succeed. Reaching out to marginalized groups isn’t without challenges, but we are ready. I am looking forward to outreach opportunities throughout the district. If we back down from the challenges we face because they are difficult, that means accepting a loss from the start. The truth is that we can win, and I believe we must win in order to offer our district a stronger and more secure future. We will continue to innovate and create a new kind of campaign for the 4th Congressional District, and to overcome the challenges we face through bringing our community together. | | UPCOMING EVENTS:> < Douglas County Town Hall: Wednesday, March 23rdAll members of Washington's CD4 are welcome! < | | | | | Superando las dificultades para una campaña más fuerte Sé que las reuniones virtuales han tenido sus carencias. Me gustaría extender una más sincera disculpa a aquellas personas que han intentado acceder a nuestros ayuntamientos virtuales y se han quedado fuera. Cada voz es importante para esta campaña, y nuestra campaña está trabajando arduamente para encontrar soluciones que harán que nuestros eventos virtuales sean más fáciles de acceder y estén disponibles en más plataformas. Entiendo la frustración de las personas que quieren ser escuchadas e involucradas, pero se sienten marginadas. Eso no es lo que pretende ser nuestra campaña. Nuestra postura inclusiva es corregir las inequidades en la representación que existen actualmente en el proceso político; eso significa reconocer dónde nos hemos quedado cortos y esforzarnos para hacer las cosas bien. Podemos construir una coalición fuerte. Todo el mundo sabe que la política puede estar llena de parcialidad y que la gente proteja su propio poder. A medida que conozco gente nueva en la campaña electoral, una pregunta que me hacen con frecuencia es: "¿cómo vas a unir a la gente?" Estoy agradecido por la oportunidad de demostrar un nuevo enfoque de política para el Distrito 4 del Congreso, uno que se enfoca en construir la unidad en lugar de división. Con eso en mente, me gustaría compartir con ustedes algunas noticias emocionantes sobre nuestra campaña. Hemos contratado al primer Partidario de la Diversidad de tiempo completo para una campaña en el centro de Washington. Mark Anthony Figueroa es un mexicoamericano de primera generación nacido en Santa Ana, California, y criado en Tri-Cities, Washington. Es el mayor de seis hermanos y un estudiante universitario migrante de primera generación y graduado. Su experiencia es en el área de la educación en comunidades de escasos recursos y bajos ingresos. Ha enseñado en la escuela secundaria Pasco High y en la escuela católica St. Patrick. Le apasiona la inclusión en la representación y la equidad para el bien común. Dentro de su nuevo rol, es una voz adicional de apoyo para aquellos que históricamente han sido excluidos y no están siendo escuchados. Esta campaña será la que una a nuestra comunidades, superando los límites de origen e idioma para fortalecernos mutuamente. Con fluidez en inglés y español, esperamos romper las barreras del idioma dentro del proceso político y comunicar a nuestras comunidades de habla hispana su importancia y dignidad humana. Nuestro objetivo es aumentar el registro de votantes y la participación electoral en CD4 para todos los grupos y celebrar la riqueza de la diversidad dentro de nuestro distrito. Nuestra nueva directora de campaña tiene experiencia en servicio público y educación. Lindsey Keesling tiene una historia de veinte años de servicio social: ha trabajado en la transición de familias fuera de la falta de vivienda; prevención y tratamiento del abuso de drogas y alcohol; tutoría juvenil y más. Ella es una orgullosa alumna de Yakima Community College y Heritage University. Más recientemente, trabajó como maestra de escuela pública en el Distrito Escolar de Yakima. Le apasiona fortalecer los recursos de la comunidad para que los niños puedan tener éxito. Alcanzar a los grupos excluidos no está libre de desafíos, pero estamos preparados. Espero con ansias las oportunidades de alcance en todo el distrito. Si retrocedemos ante los desafíos que enfrentamos porque son difíciles, eso significa aceptar una pérdida desde el principio. La verdad es que podemos ganar, y creo que debemos ganar para poder ofrecerle a nuestro distrito un futuro más fuerte y seguro. Continuaremos innovando y creando un nuevo tipo de campaña para el 4° Distrito Congresional, y para superar los desafíos que enfrentamos al unir a nuestra comunidad. | | PRÓXIMOS EVENTOS:> <Ayuntamiento del condado de Douglas: miércoles 23 de marzo¡Todos los miembros del CD4 de Washington son bienvenidos!> < | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . | | | Friend, VP Kamala Harris has been missing in action on so many fronts... While our borders were left wide open for drug cartels and criminals, Kamala was nowhere to be found - _she could barely even manage a photo op!_ And with the tragedy in Ukraine still ongoing, she isn’t fighting for our energy independence - our VP has instead resigned us to even **HIGHER** prices at the pump. We asked this question about Biden earlier... Now we want to get your thoughts on the performance of the Vice President, too. _**_[Is Kamala Harris completely failing the country?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTA5NTEzOTc1ODg4ODc4NTMxJmM9bTJkNSZlPTAmYj05NDU2NzQ4NTYmZD1jOHIwYzhy.ZM71sTW-C4HYkAd1Op97AvJb38tS7VVduKjAeHl7MJ8)_**_**__****[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTA5NTEzOTc1ODg4ODc4NTMxJmM9bTJkNSZlPTAmYj05NDU2NzQ4NzQmZD1uNnY0dzVr.BqD5JurHoUZqeXq6Wuf9c7jhOihhwYQvEdrfXrxI-dY)**

name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
I’m writing to share some quick updates from the campaign trail. [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=40ecca8e8c7f473d9d4fc8449f1459f9&_e=s4CsBVErBbSNZ0-PrOhBl4UiVtKC4rwbrgsxftOuql2AZLZqiBLdp-Ra3FRf1Ck1RUCTm2Oq-UM_nDbCGy4hxhbzoofJzsJ1pCcRi0AIHCmXzOOwGIrqdaqVoWFk2kb-hZYcN_F-40FsrBCu-ujKF0WZX_bEbL_Jgh3q0FTJN3g93aFvkiSpFynjZC_-suTIYiqTI1wBUh1NSASzPeY_hQervifndTL95wkBMrQvrlzz4w3XWrPnRkmHzKAMH7_L6Zg-3EmDUgNUQZNeBjAWBQ%3D%3D) Happy weekend everyone! I’m writing to share some quick updates from the campaign trail. Earlier this month, Julie and I had the pleasure of attending the “For The Troops” benefit honoring Gulf War Era Veterans at the Reagan Library. Our family is proud to support FTT and amazing work they do for our servicemembers abroad! I was back to the Reagan Library a couple days later to meet with Senator Tom Cotton of Arkansas, who spoke eloquently about American values and achieving “Peace through Strength.” Last weekend – in between my boys’ little league games – I had the privilege of speaking (and listening to candidates for other offices) at the California Republican Assembly Law & Order Debate in Moorpark. What a great crowd and fantastic event! As an unwavering supporter of small business, I was grateful for the opportunity, over the past week, to meet with leaders from the U.S. Chamber of Commerce, the Club for Growth, and the National Federation of Independent Business. We discussed ways to support small businesses – and how to counter proposed legislation that would increase burdens on them. Water security is a critically important issue in our community. I recently toured the Las Virgenes Municipal Water District facility in Calabasas to learn more about our local water needs – and what the federal government can do (and should stop doing) to make sure our residents and businesses have access to the water they need at reasonable prices. Thank you to everyone who came to our Campaign Headquarters Grand Opening several weeks ago! We are open for business at 1362 Thousand Oaks Boulevard. Feel free to stop by anytime to chat or pick up a yard sign. Speaking of yard signs, thank you to my friends at the Ventura County Deputy Sheriffs’ Association for putting this jumbo sign outside your headquarters the other day. I’m honored to have overwhelming support from our local law enforcement community – including the VCDSA, which represents nearly 800 uniformed peace officers in Ventura County. Last but not least, come join us next Saturday afternoon for delicious food and great company at our BBQ Bash in Moorpark. [RSVP here](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=40ecca8e8c7f473d9d4fc8449f1459f9&_e=s4CsBVErBbSNZ0-PrOhBl8QUnbESnls9Puw8uhXKTENl7hNO9xv2aTldXhhvp44Vcr9EH08ZZqCpD9PfJkKDvWq14BR8WP0xXuPE0hfghkJsOehBBPF3WJZ-4HrJ2NqBoq-cIXL8r3WlSYtAWH7E-eCQ9pfVj7m0KjZlKG3xD-DvOKmlSmKQ4m4tWxM29SYHpFPbugCN1ZFO9cku7XLIhe-GK8-xoj6CGBoZaa5v8gsLGgn6_KdQUutIFFrlWnlLECPA3ny2OYHUM4eB3qDWLs-vj1nme4PRv7SqwBU4RSUSY_HrhvxbOmD3yypKkoeDRltO7Y6c7ot3xZAQ-M2HNl1UwgWnTZKROaay1ma9cl75RFWP4f7hwks2s_Rto9Y2QdHFCD-diT303S-wthYbw7sqAe1Vntz9E6mFhyq00gaumMbEqk-pL73ZPV8uuWejnhs_xxEv1TfwXs3zUEJPEEWQYEGNmdmxec-uxqupIR8%3D) to secure your ticket for the event. We’d love to see you there! [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=40ecca8e8c7f473d9d4fc8449f1459f9&_e=s4CsBVErBbSNZ0-PrOhBl8QUnbESnls9Puw8uhXKTENl7hNO9xv2aTldXhhvp44Vcr9EH08ZZqCpD9PfJkKDvWq14BR8WP0xXuPE0hfghkJsOehBBPF3WJZ-4HrJ2NqBoq-cIXL8r3WlSYtAWH7E-eCQ9pfVj7m0KjZlKG3xD-DvOKmlSmKQ4m4tWxM29SYHpFPbugCN1ZFO9cku7XLIhe-GK8-xoj6CGBoZaa5v8gsLGgn6_KdQUutIFFrlWnlLECPA3ny2OYHUM4eB3qDWLuDurF6z9AqkerWRmCrW55pC_-4eNAzeJCEtz6DH6UeGuNdlrJDxYlj_sgG7LyiU5zSlMN08MTuWMUVM4kqf9LOgbqARrSML5MieQToIrkZV3iIWPk7BrQgztCVTG5wD9VXvxa2uOzIMtJutBTBu_QL5z0MH2JmJHiwEt_9dwkLvtZ-H7dyDSZcSueEERn5KxamZwk49YwL1n-aHBKgX6ao%3D) Thank you for reading and enjoy your weekend.
Sincerely,
Matt [**DONATE clean_body: I’m writing to share some quick updates from the campaign trail. Happy weekend everyone! I’m writing to share some quick updates from the campaign trail. Earlier this month, Julie and I had the pleasure of attending the “For The Troops” benefit honoring Gulf War Era Veterans at the Reagan Library. Our family is proud to support FTT and amazing work they do for our servicemembers abroad! I was back to the Reagan Library a couple days later to meet with Senator Tom Cotton of Arkansas, who spoke eloquently about American values and achieving “Peace through Strength.” Last weekend – in between my boys’ little league games – I had the privilege of speaking (and listening to candidates for other offices) at the California Republican Assembly Law & Order Debate in Moorpark. What a great crowd and fantastic event! As an unwavering supporter of small business, I was grateful for the opportunity, over the past week, to meet with leaders from the U.S. Chamber of Commerce, the Club for Growth, and the National Federation of Independent Business. We discussed ways to support small businesses – and how to counter proposed legislation that would increase burdens on them. Water security is a critically important issue in our community. I recently toured the Las Virgenes Municipal Water District facility in Calabasas to learn more about our local water needs – and what the federal government can do (and should stop doing) to make sure our residents and businesses have access to the water they need at reasonable prices. Thank you to everyone who came to our Campaign Headquarters Grand Opening several weeks ago! We are open for business at 1362 Thousand Oaks Boulevard. Feel free to stop by anytime to chat or pick up a yard sign. Speaking of yard signs, thank you to my friends at the Ventura County Deputy Sheriffs’ Association for putting this jumbo sign outside your headquarters the other day. I’m honored to have overwhelming support from our local law enforcement community – including the VCDSA, which represents nearly 800 uniformed peace officers in Ventura County. Last but not least, come join us next Saturday afternoon for delicious food and great company at our BBQ Bash in Moorpark. to secure your ticket for the event. We’d love to see you there! Thank you for reading and enjoy your weekend. Sincerely, Matt | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Our fight to protect LGBTQ+ children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| |
---
Peter, I had to make sure you saw my survey.

**Right now, GOP lawmakers across the country are taking aim at LGBTQ+ children.** In Florida, state senators passed the infamous “Don’t Say Gay” bill, barring teachers from discussing topics related to sexual orientation or gender identity in classrooms. In Texas, Governor Abbott has called for parents who give their children gender-affirming care to be investigated for **_child abuse._****_ _**

I am doing everything I can to protect the rights of the vulnerable and voiceless, but I need to know if you’re in this fight with me, Peter. My team set a goal to hear from 2,000 fearless fighters before midnight, and we’re still missing your voice.

We’re only 100 responses short, so please, answer this quick question:
| | **Should we fight the GOP's assault on LGBTQ+ rights?**

**Peter, the GOP has chosen their next target in their cultural war against LGBTQ+ rights: children.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43149324/335928357/304068380?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk403-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWVlNDg1NC05ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unCisL96iE57N-k0nAFNNaFpLmwKuh4ojl-fMOcKZ5E=&emci=0568e86d-3fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e5ee4854-9ea7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)
In Florida, the state Senate passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, a measure that will prohibit Florida teachers from discussing topics involving sexual orientation or gender identity in the classroom. **Nine other states are considering similar proposals.**

In Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott instructed the Texas Department of Family and Protective Services to investigate parents providing gender-affirming care to their children as child abuse. And, to make matters worse, the Texas Department of Health and Human Services removed LGBTQ+ resources from its suicide-prevention website – **despite the fact that LGBTQ+ youths are more than four times as likely to attempt suicide than their peers. **
These attacks on LGBTQ+ children are unacceptable and sickening. Government officials are supposed to fight for _everyone_ – but instead, these extremist officials are targeting the most vulnerable children in their communities for political gain.

**Earlier this week, I called on the U.S. Department of Justice to launch a federal investigation into Gov. Abbott’s atrocious attacks on trans children, but the fight for LGBTQ+ rights is far from over. Peter, with an ever-increasing number of attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, I need to know where you stand. So please, let me know ASAP: **
| | **Should we fight the GOP's assault on LGBTQ+ rights?**

That's why I'm reaching out to you ahead of my first end-of-month fundraising deadline. We have the momentum, but we need grassroots resources to win: Can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43154422/335955486/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk803-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjgyOTlkYi1iZmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrG8r4k1-qzAGHZNiRUjuV0tXDCXnVgo9DnKwsbxF6M=)**

**But Republicans across the nation will be spending MILLIONS to take back the Senate and stop Democratic challengers like me. So, I'm going to need grassroots supporters like you to get this campaign across the finish line – $10, $20, $50 at a time.**
**With nearly two-thirds of Iowans ready for new leadership and Sen. Grassley facing record-high disapproval ratings, we have an unprecedented opportunity in Iowa. name: Lauren Micek-Vargas
subject: My husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I told him I'd be the one to ask this time.

|
---

| | I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money.

But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. [**_So, yes -- I’m about to ask for $10 before midnight. Let me explain why. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43149517/335929101/1129282168?refcode=20220319_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI3MzljNi05ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kUcvfk7oz1-tIHQewlh9KfvtVWEuU2U4TDADLcGYL-Y=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43149518/335929103/1129282168?refcode=20220319_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI3MzljNi05ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kUcvfk7oz1-tIHQewlh9KfvtVWEuU2U4TDADLcGYL-Y=) I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats:

**[One of the things I admire most about Tony is that when he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43149519/335929104/1129282168?refcode=20220319_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI3MzljNi05ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kUcvfk7oz1-tIHQewlh9KfvtVWEuU2U4TDADLcGYL-Y=)**

When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds.

When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding.

When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law.

And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief:

[**Tony stepped up to unseat him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43149521/335929105/1129282168?refcode=20220319_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI3MzljNi05ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kUcvfk7oz1-tIHQewlh9KfvtVWEuU2U4TDADLcGYL-Y=) [**_Everyday folks deserve a fighting chance, but my husband’s opponent doesn’t have the interests of our community at heart. Tony is determined to win this race, but it won’t be easy -- or cheap. Don Bacon already has a $977,000 fundraising lead. That’s why Tony needs to raise another $10,775 before midnight, and why I said I’d ask you today on his behalf. Will you chip in $10 to help him close this gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43149522/335929106/1129282168?refcode=20220319_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI3MzljNi05ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kUcvfk7oz1-tIHQewlh9KfvtVWEuU2U4TDADLcGYL-Y=) Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record.

But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him.

It’s personal.

It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds.

It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him.

And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca.

[**I know you work hard for your money, and I wish I didn’t have to ask.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43149523/335929107/1129282168?refcode=20220319_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI3MzljNi05ZWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kUcvfk7oz1-tIHQewlh9KfvtVWEuU2U4TDADLcGYL-Y=)

But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign.

And it will be that much harder for him to flip this important seat for Democrats. clean_body: I told him I'd be the one to ask this time. | | | I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money. But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. = = I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats: = When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds. When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding. When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law. And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief: = = Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record. But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him. It’s personal. It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds. It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him. And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca. = But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Trading stocks in Congress [Take Action]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Right now, members of Congress are allowed to make huge profits from
buying stocks that they know will perform well based on pending
legislation and private briefings.

This is unacceptable. Owning and trading individual stocks make members of
Congress and their families financial stakeholders in the industries they
were elected to oversee. We should trust that our elected officials are
legislating on behalf of their constituents, not their personal financial
interests.

There are multiple bills under consideration in Congress that would end
this corrupt practice, but many lawmakers have a financial incentive to
maintain the status quo and keep the rules as they are.

Elected officials shouldn’t be able to profit from their positions of
power. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97860?t=1002&akid=22453%2E1203867%2Eh-iarc ]If you agree, will you send a message to your Representative to
let them know it’s time to ban all members of Congress and their families
from profiting through ownership of individual stocks.

Send a Message

As long as members of Congress and their families are allowed to own and
trade individual stocks, our ability to make progress on priorities like
climate change, health care, and prescription drugs is threatened. Stock
trades will continue to fuel policies that profit big corporations AND
Members of Congress, but NOT benefit the people.

If we’re going to change Washington to make it work for the people, we
must implement a ban on members of Congress and their families trading
stocks. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97860?t=1003&akid=22453%2E1203867%2Eh-iarc ]If you’re with us, will you send a message to your
Congressperson and let them know it’s time for a ban on stock trading for
members of Congress.

Send a Message

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=22453%2E1203867%2Eh-iarc ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=22453%2E1203867%2Eh-iarc ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220319-22453-footer&t=1006&refcode2=22453_1203867_h-iarc&akid=22453%2E1203867%2Eh-iarc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=22453%2E1203867%2Eh-iarc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

I know donating to political campaigns isn’t always your top priority. But without donations from grassroots supporters like you, my campaign wouldn’t be able to function and we could be in danger of losing this critical blue district!

**That’s why I wanted to give you a special, inside look at one of our big expenses: yard signs.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43150122/335931647/301334478?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220319_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGVhNzE5NS1hMGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVCN75i3MdDFsbwtypNGvP_co_JtyFggUpuFx-x_d_Y=)
If we can’t reach our fundraising goals (we have a really big Quarter 1 fundraising goal coming up in a few days), _we won’t be able to fund critical supplies like yard signs and turn out the vote come November._

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Will you help us run the strongest possible campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We’ve proven ourselves before. But we’re not done.
#
We want to level with you about fundraising.
No one doubts that we have the people or organizing power to build a movement to elect Beto as Governor of Texas. We’ve proven that strength time and time again. We have thousands of volunteers. We are traveling to every part of the state. And we’ve already raised millions of grassroots dollars — all without corporate PACs or special interests.
**But lately, our fundraising has slowed down.** If we don’t pick up the pace, we will be heavily outspent by Greg Abbott. In a time of 30-second TV ads and super PACs, the only way forward for Beto in this race is to run a people-powered effort like we’ve never seen before.
We have a big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up, and we can’t risk falling short. So we need to try our best right now to close the gap. Emails like this one have generated about half of all the money we’ve raised so far, but only a small percentage of people reading any given email end up donating.
**[Can Beto count on you now to be one of the people who steps up to be part of this grassroots campaign? Make a $3 contribution right now to help give us the resources we need to compete.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54045?refcode=ema20220319-181128&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=181128%2E444211%2EHHCJt5)**
From the beginning, Beto said this campaign would be funded by real people. No corporate PACs. No corporations. No dark money special interests. We’re holding true to that promise. But we have to face the realities about the flood of money on the other side.
Greg Abbott has over $50 million in the bank. That’s around 8x what we have right now — and that total doesn’t take into account the super PACs that will do _anything_ to help the ultra-wealthy few continue to profit from Abbott’s corruption.
[We need your help right now to pick up our pace so we don’t get heavily outspent. Add a $3 contribution right now so that we can run the strongest possible grassroots campaign to elect Beto as Governor. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54045?refcode=ema20220319-181128&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=181128%2E444211%2EHHCJt5)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54045?refcode=ema20220319-181128&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=181128%2E444211%2EHHCJt5)**
We're dedicated to campaigning the right way — the real way — by traveling across the state and listening to Texans in every part of the state, and by relying on the support of regular, everyday people chipping in what they can afford.
When Beto’s campaign succeeds and we begin a new era in Texas, one where our governor puts families and communities first, it’ll be because people like you decided to click on emails like these and make it happen.
Thank you for all you are doing,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220319-181128-footer&t=22&refcode2=181128_444211_HHCJt5&akid=181128%2E444211%2EHHCJt5)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=181128%2E444211%2EHHCJt5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=181128%2E444211%2EHHCJt5)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.
