name: Erica Smith
subject: Respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hi, it’s Erica.

Making the hard ask for financial support for our campaign is not
comfortable.

So I wanted to tell you more about who I am [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45178?refcode=em20220319-1009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1009%2E3698%2E-1xhC1 ]before I respectfully ask
you to make a donation to our campaign for the U.S. House in North
Carolina.

I’m Erica Smith. I’m an engineer, educator, minister, and three-term state
senator. Growing up Black in the South was difficult. But our elders
taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith.

I was raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road
that my mother was raised on. My five siblings and I grew up picking
cucumbers and corn on the family farm. Now it’s 2021, and my mother still
lives on the same dirt road, waiting for it to be paved.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45178?refcode=em20220319-1009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1009%2E3698%2E-1xhC1 ][IMG]

All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their
roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care, waiting for
a living wage, and waiting for a representative who understands what it
means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change.

We can be that change.
I’m running for Congress to create opportunities for communities like
mine. Together we can win a living wage, bold climate action, universal
broadband, reproductive justice and so much more.

If elected, I will fight tirelessly for North Carolinians — and I’d be one
of the few Black women to ever represent the state in Congress.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45178?refcode=em20220319-1009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1009%2E3698%2E-1xhC1 ]If you’re with me, will you please make your very first donation of $5
to our campaign for U.S. House? This is one of the most competitive races
in the country and I need your support to win.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45178?refcode=em20220319-1009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1009%2E3698%2E-1xhC1 ]Donate $5

Thank you for taking a personal stake in this campaign,

Erica

Erica Smith for Congress

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

clean_body: [1]Erica Smith Hi, it’s Erica. Making the hard ask for financial support for our campaign is not comfortable. So I wanted to tell you more about who I am [ ]before I respectfully ask you to make a donation to our campaign for the U.S. House in North Carolina. I’m Erica Smith. I’m an engineer, educator, minister, and three-term state senator. Growing up Black in the South was difficult. But our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith. I was raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that my mother was raised on. My five siblings and I grew up picking cucumbers and corn on the family farm. Now it’s 2021, and my mother still lives on the same dirt road, waiting for it to be paved. [ ][IMG] All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care, waiting for a living wage, and waiting for a representative who understands what it means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change. We can be that change. I’m running for Congress to create opportunities for communities like mine. Together we can win a living wage, bold climate action, universal broadband, reproductive justice and so much more. If elected, I will fight tirelessly for North Carolinians — and I’d be one of the few Black women to ever represent the state in Congress. name: Charles Booker
subject: I use this every single day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

I wanted to show you something today that I use every single day: my short
acting insulin.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17236?refcode=em20220319&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1669%2E346206%2ErnjzvF ][IMG]

I take it with every meal, every single day. I will die without it. And
three years ago, I almost did.

Three years ago, I was forced to make a choice that too many struggling
families across Kentucky still have to make to this day: buy food for my
girls, or refill my insulin prescription. I chose my girls, and nearly
died as a result.

And the worst part of this is that the cost of insulin — like the one you
see in my hands above — isn't determined by supply and demand.

Instead, few companies set a price to maximize their own profits. In 2020
alone, Eli Lilly made $2.6 billion off of Humalog, because millions of
people like me have to either pay for their drug or die.

I’m running for Senate because I know what it’s like to not be able to
afford quality healthcare — and I’m ready to fight so that no family in
Kentucky has to make the choice that I did. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17236?refcode=em20220319&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1669%2E346206%2ErnjzvF ]If you’re ready to rise up
and join me in this fight, will you chip in $5 right now to
our campaign?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17236?refcode=em20220319&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1669%2E346206%2ErnjzvF ]Contribute $5

Healthcare is a human right,
Peter, but Big Pharma companies
are colluding to make the costs of life-saving drugs like insulin
artificially skyrocket. In a country as rich and powerful as the United
States, that is unconscionable.

I will never forget how broken I felt in that hospital bed, dying because
I chose to use my last dollars to feed my daughters over my expensive
insulin.

No one anywhere should die because they don’t have money in their pocket.

I’m done with this cycle of failed leadership — that’s why I’m running for
U.S. Senate,
Peter. My promise is to bring
these lived experiences to the U.S. Senate so we can finally pass the
urgent policies our families need to survive. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17236?refcode=em20220319&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1669%2E346206%2ErnjzvF ]Will you chip in
anything you can to help power our fight as we build this campaign for the
people of Kentucky?

Thank you,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220319-1669-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1669_346206_rnjzvF&akid=1669%2E346206%2ErnjzvF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1669%2E346206%2ErnjzvF

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:
That is not who we need in office.
And none of it would be possible without you.

clean_body: That is not who we need in office. And none of it would be possible without you. = Well, it’s safe to say our opponent is a certified election denier. = After being endorsed by the Trump-backed America First SoS Coalition and the MyPillow CEO Mike Lindell (yes, that guy), it’s clear that our opponent does not have New Mexicans’ democratic interests at heart. We save our democracy by embracing our democracy. The election was not a fraud. New Mexico’s elections are some of the most secure in the country. Our problem isn’t our election integrity process, but the actors creating doubt and mistrust in our elections that intimidate voters — and wasting taxpayer money to do so. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = The GOP knows how important the Secretary of State office is, which is why they are zeroing in on New Mexico and Maggie – we cannot let them win. From Cowboys for Trump to our election-denying opponent and the GOP’s coalition of election-denying candidates, the stakes for our democracy could not be higher. = = Thank you for stepping up! Maggie HQ Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >> ___= Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

name: Donald Trump
subject: Miss me yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow American,

I’ve got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: **_ Do you MISS ME YET? _**

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. _Guess what?_ _I was right!_ I hate to say it, but I was right.

**It’s painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that’s what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.**

**[Take a moment to let me know if you miss me](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3138d7897d6f493b924904090babc6e2&_e=Zzoit-wL2lwgCnSKYqfqR6t-ZCLpFH6bPU0M4JRkqLsNgR_8RDP2bGKYbwbNUjvcOx5WOGfeoxOd3RkRWWie8ZsQbJbUQnTz6oIEyLXiuTDvUK4A_wle-_uq-JTKC03ocZ8c_nEsEx-M2gGXVANW6Rx2aZgdAfgXBOiyqsa0ZOu3-n0YTEm4w6mJ0cV_0nKTtkDx7KpDXJIwYcSwQQLZK1A-FB0gonWOcxTilWb0-d2HLZ_Tu1L1KIjJsp4FrJaxm4D0wOVcJiVCPJivRsQT4ipQ3fGgMZYrl4SWklRbhRAwoyj4_-t7iBnbQaK1lAJHqDQ4w5-En353E0pM4tBQt4Ccp5IZONpZoKKftD_IIXbluOFArCDoY34sz-Jf9h-yrdvE4hm59jD-LXLFjsDpoXZv_qGjFc7NpZ7evFyoBCEvOlOI4emTqCCuKlJNPVsddxYFjOTmwtIQUiThFJ-27QL1j8zS5yysYiDqsS1B_2w%3D)** and the **AMERICA FIRST** policies my team and I put into place during our **FOUR GLORIOUS years in the White House.**

[**< < MISS ME YET? LET ME KNOW >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3138d7897d6f493b924904090babc6e2&_e=Zzoit-wL2lwgCnSKYqfqR6t-ZCLpFH6bPU0M4JRkqLsNgR_8RDP2bGKYbwbNUjvcOx5WOGfeoxOd3RkRWWie8ZsQbJbUQnTz6oIEyLXiuTDvUK4A_wle-_uq-JTKC03ocZ8c_nEsEx-M2gGXVANW6Rx2aZgdAfgXBOiyqsa0ZOu3-n0YTEm4w6mJ0cV_0nKTtkDx7KpDXJIwYcSwQQLZK1A-FB0gonWOcxTilWb0-d2HLZ_Tu1L1KIjJsp4FrJaxaYpnIYThSSkMYsbKcKCY_nWd90zfGzNlTUEwz6Uuy7eNgBxNbXDuXGflSawRvDQjO2rKSOVuebri16tjHSae6VW_P4XkXPUWLzYLlJdT70Fed0OL_ASDloG37T4n5QnQGyjwO2TuavRogzt-UZxFckvIm9sqOuoXDKSRPnz89W4shZaVOk0psFk92nrbDiQG9482xeVn0aLOk65aMxbPrHibPg8KQwZSkr-yvz9_olU%3D)

**I’d like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT** so don’t wait – let us know if you want us back in office.

I’d ask my supporters the same question I’m asking you now on Twitter, but Jack DORSEY banned me because he didn’t like what I had to say!

_Wonder why he hasn’t banned Putin yet ..._

Thanks for your support,
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3138d7897d6f493b924904090babc6e2&_e=Zzoit-wL2lwgCnSKYqfqR6t-ZCLpFH6bPU0M4JRkqLsNgR_8RDP2bGKYbwbNUjvcOx5WOGfeoxOd3RkRWWie8ZsQbJbUQnTz6oIEyLXiuTDvUK4A_wle-_uq-JTKC03ocZ8c_nEsEx-M2gGXVANW6Rx2aZgdAfgXBOiyqsa0ZOu3-n0YTEm4w6mJ0cV_0nKTtkDx7KpDXJIwYcSwQQLZK1A-FB0gonWOcxTilWb0-d2HLZ_Tu1L1KIjJsp4FrJaxaEL1LwTgLA5KI_Xk2HvrPxXVUJjnLPMpwVq6qttQydmOLTOxRyiRcbNQnOJxWiu0SWHYlTx9-NxdlexsI7qzVfMhyAeFhcXubJ4zUADKexhzksCjjo-4mYlY2EIeKZKGmuj5TjSP7yaThcgLHnYXxeWEwzu-urPNUj2KJh1q2sYbzRStyW-bWq_kMOR7KI39FSPVbQR4yzdE-SLWT4k09xFOLc_KGULyg8Rr8XXDWPo%3D)

name: Max Steiner
subject: Think Democrats are to blame for Gas Prices? Think again...
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43151620/335939245/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQ0MTQ0MS1hOGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpubuza-Pc5A2LDgzLTtf8HMn0EMWBwtJsjvV2cAfNI=)
Friend,

I just got back from a week of travel across the district that took me from Chico to Tehama County, Shasta County, Siskiyou County, and then Lassen County over the course of a week before getting home late last night. Obviously getting in front of voters is going to be key to winning this race - but we have a big district, and that means a lot of miles of driving.

So why the travelogue introduction? Because this is a good segue to talk about gas prices! Not only have I noticed the hit of higher prices at the pump, but a lot of rural voters have too. I know this, because a lot of them blame Democrats for our $5.50 gas. I feel like they must have all watched the same _Fox News_ program on "why the Dems are to blame for oil prices". I heard the same tired GOP talking points over and over. I'm sure many of your Republican/Independent friends and neighbors are making the same complaints as well.

So this email is dedicated to knocking down those arguments: **1.) Biden could have kept oil prices low even with the conflict in Ukraine if he wanted to.** This is just laughably incorrect. The U.S. and our European Allies have stopped buying Russian oil because every dollar spent on Russian gas is another dollar being spent on a bomb against Ukrainian civilians. Without Russian gas, Europeans need to buy U.S. gas, which pushes up U.S. prices. It's simple "supply and demand".

**2.) Trump would have figured out a way. **Wrong. Trump called Putin a "genius". Putin is not a genius and neither is Trump. Trump's "way" would have been abandoning Ukrainians to their fate.

**3.) Biden shouldn't have killed Keystone XL -- an oil pipeline that would have brought in more Canadian crude.** Wrong again. That pipeline did not exist when Biden cancelled its construction permit and it would not have existed now. Generally, non-existent infrastructure isn't very effective. So no, it would not have had any effect on oil prices. (Note: I think the Keystone XL Pipeline is fine, and increasing U.S. oil exports would make Europe less dependent on bad actors in Russia and the Middle East. That said, invoking it in the context of Ukraine is a transparently bad faith argument.)

**4.) Related to the argument above: Biden should allow more drilling**. Drilling isn't instantaneous. There's a lead time between permit and production. More permits now will have little effect on gas prices until next year.

**5.) It's all the government's fault.** Actually, some of the price increase in oil, and in inflation in general, is due to monopolies. Market consolidation is bad for consumers and drive up prices regardless of market conditions. Chevron's market value has increased by 20% in the past month - that's $60 billion dollars. That's one oil company. Government regulation of monopolies is important and healthy (Chevron actually came out of Standard Oil when it was broken up in the early 20th century). Washington seems to have forgotten its role as market regulator - it's time to remember.

**6.) California should pause the gas tax.** Actually, this is not a terrible idea: reacting to a temporary supply crunch with a temporary tax holiday has a lot of support in the economic literature. Newsom's plan - for a $400 tax rebate per family - is a little better though. By compensating everyone, Newsom's plan rewards those who already made the jump to electric or who have decided to drive less - by walking or biking, for example. We are in a supply crunch, rewarding those doing their part to reduce demand makes sense. Here's the thing: most Republican arguments about anything are made in bad faith. We need to remember that the GOP supported Trump when he attempted to blackmail Ukraine into investigating Hunter Biden. They have no principles -- they just want to use every crisis to attack the party in power. The propagandists on Fox and in the Republican Party spreading the lies that I responded to above know they're lying.

I'm sending this email because Democrats are the Party of facts, and Democratic voters like to know that their representative is smarter than a hereditary rice farmer that makes millions off rice subsidies every year. They're also important to know off-hand, to fire off in response to the Trumpers who thinks he can play "gotcha" with every Democrat he meets.

Democrats can't just play defense. We can't "take the high road when they go low". The arguments above are for you and for the "reasonable" Republicans and independents in your life who don't live in a world of "alternative facts". For the Republican trolls in your life, the best argument is to keep it simple, true, and direct: Trump supported Putin and Putin is killing children, the dollar extra we are paying in gas is just another hangover from the Trump administration.

**[I support Ukraine, and I'm willing to pay a little more for gas. Feel free to contribute a little if you want to offset those costs!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43151621/335939246/360059203?refcode=em-3.18.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQ0MTQ0MS1hOGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpubuza-Pc5A2LDgzLTtf8HMn0EMWBwtJsjvV2cAfNI=)**

Have a good weekend,

Max
| **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43151622/335939247/360059203?refcode=em-3.18.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQ0MTQ0MS1hOGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpubuza-Pc5A2LDgzLTtf8HMn0EMWBwtJsjvV2cAfNI=)**
---

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43151623/335939248/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQ0MTQ0MS1hOGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpubuza-Pc5A2LDgzLTtf8HMn0EMWBwtJsjvV2cAfNI=)
Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. If you'd like to receive less email, add your name [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43151625/335939250/379103408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQ0MTQ0MS1hOGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpubuza-Pc5A2LDgzLTtf8HMn0EMWBwtJsjvV2cAfNI=&emci=d08b44f9-fda6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=85441441-a8a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11663292) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d08b44f9-fda6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/85441441-a8a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQ0MTQ0MS1hOGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpubuza-Pc5A2LDgzLTtf8HMn0EMWBwtJsjvV2cAfNI=&id=113269053).

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc1ilqr391bmih80dcdbkfajlil29ch9dtmoh778_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp6dcdl62rjcdj2e1pm1p5m61in2pb7m6qr4p73e9rm8s37c6p3cohgmcrj1cdn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj32s5jcgrr4cb662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jmeoj5c5i68oh5u)
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zki4u8s4ihc1ekjapds4hao19v02egduf3pe9288_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6aob4chh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zu7fg8t9b409tebvig7vl44qsueb6hhp9k6tcuao_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6aob4chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkdi00jevvrsmqgep83anqe91l5o1mcenktf2otg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6aob4chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2z2stuhjsrt6ran52mdkvgbq8ii1l9dv9sjlprjg0).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

**So team, please don’t wait. Pitch in now to help us keep building our momentum so we can defeat Governor DeSantis and finally get to work on building a Florida for all:**

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Reminder: The world's bullies are emboldened
body:
the outlook is not good
---
| | | | | | Volume 34 | March 16, 2022
---
|
---
| The world's bullies are emboldened.
---
| | |
---|---
|
As if the situation in Ukraine wasn't tragic enough, now Iran is firing missiles on Iraq, just steps away from the U.S. Consulate there.

China has amped its aggressive rhetoric, with that government warning the world of the "worst consequences" to anyone supporting Taiwan's military.

And in Ukraine, Russia has attacked a military range close to the border of Poland, where U.S. troops were training Ukrainian forces just a short time ago. And, a U.S. journalist was shot and killed at a Russian checkpoint.

Why are these leader posturing so? Because as demonstrated by the botched removal of troops from Afghanistan last year, America appears to be weak militarily, and has gutless leadership. Because of our lack of energy independence and our diminished military strength.

The Heritage Foundation has issued its [2022 Index of U.S. Military Strength](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o3MUgaePSvipv5zCk_cl0vwNZVBAGnF7iuepkhr_zPCAz76yGMonlVs6rlztfxG2LDUYUUuVn8tqkAjsvaVyYTH1irV9NyYFKGusE6SHqRs1gHryhxlC33fH3iQPQjT0WwmZc6sihNkEsY2q3GVVGwyKCNyR7nUGSFNKLqqdzQDncP9P53CSoHvazCudwRsv&c=IseReHBPpmXgGlKg58Wp1WfrYWC4zC9Q4iGn-4s3uN2QBdfee69leg==&ch=n1l7Xcrug60CCCmiw_DlgJNGYkn1c4dd8rFZ86Vpm0CgTBBF1H_oJA==) and the outlook is not good. Several branches of the armed services were ranked marginal to weak. The Army, it said, remains "weak" in capacity with only 62 percent of the force it should have. The Navy is marginally trending toward weak because it desperately needs a larger fleet of 400 ships, but current and forecasted levels of funding will prevent this from occurring for the foreseeable future. The Air Force, the index shows, is weak because it is not mission ready and its fleet is aging, in addition to other challenges.
| | |
---|---
|
Only the Marine Corps is considered to be strong because of its ability to modernize and its readiness. However, as the index states, it is hamstrung by a lack of funding and old equipment.

The government's job is to protect the American people. I support funding our military in the strongest ways and fortifying our forces, so we are a formidable nation--one respected for its strength.

Send me to Congress so I can refocus priorities that make our country strong. Together we will deter foreign leaders from attempting any threat against us, and sleep well at night knowing we are once again respected as a world leader.
|
---
| | |
---
| | | [Send Erik your Feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o3MUgaePSvipv5zCk_cl0vwNZVBAGnF7iuepkhr_zPCAz76yGMonlbNoFmljy99Yd0urcq16_c_PBwBuEPNGm81NJ100mZ11rYeCvdquqpNKtcJpKVHeC8MgS_vW16fCJPQSXWwUhmByBtHjwC16pOdua5jgcfJz3YQAZ94DP1bMvmntHAOzlTzTj9fwOyCFx1GMMgwSHZxDZFasZzn4kokH1DzNU96I&c=IseReHBPpmXgGlKg58Wp1WfrYWC4zC9Q4iGn-4s3uN2QBdfee69leg==&ch=n1l7Xcrug60CCCmiw_DlgJNGYkn1c4dd8rFZ86Vpm0CgTBBF1H_oJA==)
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
It's been a busy week on the campaign trail.
Erik appeared on the radio with Peter Boyles and Jimmy Lakey (hear the interviews at the link below).

County Assemblies are in full swing and Erik is speaking at them. He impressed crowds in Teller and Park counties on Saturday, and plans for a presentation at the Jefferson County assembly this coming Saturday.

Last night, he participated in his fourth debate at the event hosted by Mountain Republicans and Tea Party 285 held at "The Barn" in Evergreen. The energy level was high and Erik pulled 40% of the vote in the straw poll.

Check the upcoming events at the bottom of this newsletter and find where to join the fun with Erik.
| | [Check out Erik's Radio and Podcast appearances](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o3MUgaePSvipv5zCk_cl0vwNZVBAGnF7iuepkhr_zPCAz76yGMonlUfIlTKs0Bu5qxWg4U-zFmRaj5R6vlCXop-aMDVYawIqh_qH-vItSpiYiBZUwwTAQICcCC0CgSguX9ZqnriPE6_fFF9xugihmH4LBMhv4esyMG4grAtiKGA=&c=IseReHBPpmXgGlKg58Wp1WfrYWC4zC9Q4iGn-4s3uN2QBdfee69leg==&ch=n1l7Xcrug60CCCmiw_DlgJNGYkn1c4dd8rFZ86Vpm0CgTBBF1H_oJA==)
---
| | |
---
| A True Grass-Roots Campaign
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

Poncha Springs Community Center is at 333 Burnette Ave

Saturday March 19th 9:00AM Erik will address the Jefferson County Assembly at the Denver West Marriot in Golden. It's "All Hands On Deck" for every Republican in Jefferson County. Don't miss this opportunity to participate in the process.
Denver West Marriot is at 1717 Denver West Blvd in Golden

Monday, March 21st 6:00PM Come to The Olive Garden in Littleton to hear Erik speak in person. This is a great opportunity to hear from the frontrunner in the Colorado Congressional District 7 race.
The Olive Garden is at 5380 S. Wadsworth Blvd in Littleton

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Shaffer?=
subject: Come help at the office tomorrow! (yard signs + envelopes)
body:
Now that Jeremy is on the ballot, we have plenty to do here at the office, and tomorrow, Sunday March 20th, from 2-5 pm we'll be having a volunteer. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/volunteer?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| | Hello friends,

First, thank you so much for all your help in helping collect nearly 3,000 signatures to get Jeremy on the ballot -- we got more than any other candidate in PA-17!

Now that Jeremy is on the ballot, we have plenty to do here at the office (9066 Perry Hwy, Pittsburgh, PA 15237), and tomorrow, Sunday March 20th, from 2-5 pm we'll be having a volunteer get-together at the office with two main tasks.

1\. YARD SIGNS - yes, yard signs are in! And we need help putting them together before we can deliver them.

2\. ADDRESSING ENVELOPES - we're going to be sending out thousands of mail pieces in this race and we need help hand-addressing all those envelopes.

Whether you can drop in for the entire three hours or just for 15 minutes, we'd love to see you tomorrow and have your help!

Thanks again,
Trevor Naglieri
Campaign Manager
(508) 826-5135

name: Adam Schiff
subject: He’s all but announced
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]Adam Schiff for Congress

He all but confirmed it, Derek.

At a South Carolina rally broadcast live on Newsmax TV — that’s Fox News
for your crazy uncle’s crazy uncle — Donald Trump said it:

“We are going to take back America. And in 2024, we are going to take back that
beautiful, beautiful White House [cheers]. I wonder who will do that? I
wonder...”

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ][IMG]

I won’t spill any more ink over what a disaster a second Trump term would
be for our country. You know that already, and just as importantly, we
have a job to do first.

So, I have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]Can you rush a $10 donation to my campaign today so that we never, ever
have to see Trump in the White House again? If we keep our House Majority
— and keep Kevin McCarthy out of the Speaker’s Office — we have a chance
to stop Trump in 2024:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1006&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1007&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1008&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1009&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1010&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Trump understands that he can’t announce his presidential campaign before
the midterms — the House Majority will be decided in exactly the kind of
battleground suburban districts where his brand is completely toxic, the
ones that rejected him in Democrats’ Blue Wave election in 2018.

So instead, he’s making his intentions clear through winks and nods and
just enough distance for Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans to hide
their support for him while they try to persuade voters to trust them
again. But there’s no hiding their true ambition:

Defeat Democrats. Destabilize democracy. And pave the way for Republicans
to take back the White House in 2024.

You know the difference between keeping our country and losing it could be
whether Kevin McCarthy is the one holding the gavel the next time Congress
has to certify the results of a presidential election.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]I’m personally asking: Can you chip in $10 towards my fight for our
democracy, and against Trump’s Republican Party, and to defend our House
Majority?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1013&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1014&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1015&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1016&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1017&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220319_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&refcode2=126_5257348_-klZ8B&akid=126%2E5257348%2E-klZ8B ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Trump’s vanity is well-documented. But there is nothing that would cause
more direct and immediate harm to our democratic experiment than having a
Trump sycophant like Kevin McCarthy as House Speaker standing in the way
of our progress.

Let’s leave nothing to chance. Thanks for pitching in what you can.

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: V. Demings
subject: a single contribution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
help me fight back against Rubio
| | |
---
**Friend: I'm trailing Marco Rubio in the polls – and __ now _, _I'm falling behind my fundraising goal. I cannot afford to miss this goal, but here's where things stand:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43155497/335962544/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2675-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjdkOGFhMy1kMGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWAnjfqLihErY_wwMWMUPn5N17H8u_Km-nYZ41zU9Lc=)
Polling shows me 2 points down in my race that will decide Senate control. I know that we can overcome this, but missing this goal means making tough decisions like pulling back our efforts to reach Floridians.

Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes. In a race this tight, every choice we each make is incredibly impactful. **It could be your single donation that lets us knock just enough doors, call just enough voters or run enough ads to push this campaign – our movement – to victory. **
The GOP isn't showing any signs of slowing down: Marco Rubio is breaking GOP fundraising records, and Mitch McConnell's special-interest allies are ready to drop hundreds of millions to keep Florida red. National Republicans have already poured in $10 million to keep me and any other Democrat from winning in Florida again.

**This is an absolutely critical moment, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back against Rubio and the GOP and take the lead. This is about Florida, defending the Senate and protecting our democracy from the GOP's far-right agenda. **
**[_So please, friend, I need you to donate $5 right now to make up this critical gap before my midnight deadline. body:

| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 19, 2022Contact: Info@CrystalVanuch.com
---
| | **Crystal Vanuch's Commanding Victory in Today's VA07 Republican Forum Proves She is the Only Candidate Who Can Beat Spanberger** **Culpeper, VA** – Team Vanuch issued the following statement following Crystal's commanding victory in today's Virginia Guardians & Warriors PAC 7th District Congressional Republican Forum in Culpeper County. "This morning, Crystal Vanuch proved that she is the clear conservative choice to become the Republican nominee in Virginia's 7th Congressional District with a commanding victory over Bryce Reeves and other candidates. While other candidates flip flop positions depending on which political office they're running for, Crystal's credentials are unquestioned. She has earned a reputation for being a conservative leader committed to delivering results for her constituents. While most politicians just talk, she gets the job done. Crystal Vanuch is the only candidate that can beat extreme liberal Abigail Spanberger and bring conservative leadership back to the 7th District."
---
| | |

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: re: Trump’s Big Lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
Do you agree that we must protect voting rights, friend?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43155571/335962815/122893247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAzNDE2OS1kMmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbR0Nh6h31_n4BQkL_xjE_c8mcqp5dh_rkLQ_4eHus0=&emci=d8ef4bf5-e6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4f034169-d2a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=19650583) Folks, Joe Biden is the President of the United States. That is a simple fact. But too many Republican lawmakers across the country still refuse to accept that fact. They’re beholden to Trump and his Big Lie – and they’re using it as an excuse to enact draconian laws that make it harder for people to vote. Here in Nevada, I’ve faced down relentless efforts by Donald Trump and state Republicans to undermine our democracy. But here’s the thing: I’m running against multiple extremist Republicans who believe Joe Biden is an illegitimate President. They fully believe Trump’s Big Lie. And if any one of them becomes Governor, they’ll keep pushing the Big Lie until they’ve wiped out voting rights for thousands of Nevadans. **[Voting rights are under attack more than ever and we need everyone to speak out to protect our democracy. So right now, I’m asking you to sign your name next to mine to denounce Trump’s Big Lie and the GOP’s attacks on voting rights>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43155572/335962816/1468175649?refcode=email_031822_votingrightspetition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAzNDE2OS1kMmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbR0Nh6h31_n4BQkL_xjE_c8mcqp5dh_rkLQ_4eHus0=&emci=d8ef4bf5-e6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4f034169-d2a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=19650583)** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43155573/335962817/1468175649?refcode=email_031822_votingrightspetition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAzNDE2OS1kMmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbR0Nh6h31_n4BQkL_xjE_c8mcqp5dh_rkLQ_4eHus0=&emci=d8ef4bf5-e6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4f034169-d2a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=19650583)
---
Let’s be clear about what’s happening: Republicans in Nevada and around the country know they can’t win on the issues. So they want to make it harder and harder for people, especially people of color, to vote.
And they know if they can spread enough doubt about our elections and win in 2022, they’ll have control over a key swing state in 2024 and suppress the vote even more.
**I refuse to stand by and let extreme Republicans strip away the right to vote, but I need your help. Sign on now to denounce the GOP’s attacks on voting rights and the Big Lie:**
**[action.stevesisolak.com/a/protect-voting-rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43155574/335962818/-1054555423?refcode=email_031822_votingrightspetition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAzNDE2OS1kMmE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbR0Nh6h31_n4BQkL_xjE_c8mcqp5dh_rkLQ_4eHus0=&emci=d8ef4bf5-e6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4f034169-d2a7-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=19650583)**
Thanks,
Steve

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Survival Item of 2022
body:
This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znv02oveuuf9ohne5kd7is8jfh433uu4hhkhhr9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6eoj0c3h2bs)
# #1 Survival Item of 2022
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9j1f2vpcdojq41448veh77j7hkisrgr9cnht4b8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6eoj0c3h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z11hso9sedr800unia902ukmg9t5oos3fi2e6ds8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6eoj0c3h2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1tfap08kttdpc5qe7v4jss0qqf6f2efsuhrqpso_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6eoj0c3h2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmr05orev5b80tkndhrdqnmv4bo4eqlid3rjdu78_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6eoj0c3h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zl3fufodqfgqt58646875em0ou904sjqita31pr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6eoj0c3h2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z59e3cdmb430lafm7d6824njicp5gmsqs7o4nejo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6eoj0c3h2bs)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2zhka6ni38g5eppp0ddvhfim3b0fe2n0p30giign8).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztdhc06qvd98hrop3qi9eae0n60uot2beshj11a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cth6eoj0c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
| | | BREAKING via FiveThirtyEight: **Trump's disapproval rating nears an all-time high!**

_As Trump considers another run for office, we need to know where this grassroots team stands:_**

Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220319-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220319-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&akid=3416%2E9716520%2EXYQMoB)
Team -- Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that a brand new poll shows Donald Trump’s **disapproval** rating at 67% -- **_that's near an ALL-TIME HIGH!_**

The lies and scandals of Trump’s four years in office are FINALLY starting to catch up with him! And with Trump still calling the shots in GOP races nationwide, these numbers could spell **_serious_** trouble for Republicans this year.

**We need your help to confirm this poll's accuracy BEFORE Trump launches another White House bid.** We’re missing 9 responses from Pennsylvania, and our live poll expires at 11:59 PM. **Can you take a moment to respond?**

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220319-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220319-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&akid=3416%2E9716520%2EXYQMoB)
Thanks,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

[Photo](https://go.dscc.org/go/1270?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220319-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220319-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&akid=3416%2E9716520%2EXYQMoB) by Gage Skidmore. subject: Numbers don’t lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
We can’t ignore the facts.
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=35ba56ed83a944af9f0e275575c804d9&_e=F_oxzfl9FYLcPQZCryQzQ8bPr7z3gtV8DzQIAwuy9e_egzA-8mBds71qUqgM-0FKYL2HGskE2et-YZkb9seTLHmR3H11V3STAv1_vzg8de42t474Q1z1NGKRFxxrWLbLa6StA5DbBMfW1M4QihPJD8Je1V7yEdVx2K8u6hzysWj6CNCrhZiU53tpqPREWnxjHoWQzu-z3ResNaNoCYn8BdieHQfBKTE4VyqxvI9oKcFw7mgcmhxXgcLH1qwxZezYQPGgRA8kSSa5WIVGGV0q44SCrBFfkg-qUeMRcuLy_QRVoDqc9VIO7HnZHcqwps3vnL0Bc8yBV9VQ-JkRMFGd9fQXFeY3IK1LosswbP1LmtHYtRrnhEly35WRtoyG_zSwAotKjI1Qz2KSdDLqc6_4vxA6jNNZerJImRivilcXW6GHsrzJTdq-Zwd34BOmZQzY-pJy2y0LESUzDOfvu6Wu23dwM8jlCISIeuOvFlI3GjbMfPHiwRFTwnX6GpGSGmoMkedhbLSH_omq7Fk5slRgXQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
I hate to say it, but this 50-50 toss-up governor’s race is going to come down to fundraising.
---
Reports have shown that in roughly _**9 out of every 10 elections**_ across the country, the better-funded candidate wins.
---
_And with radical liberal Tony Evers sitting on more than $10.5 MILLION in cash on hand, we can’t afford to come up short at the end of this first quarter._
---

clean_body: We can’t ignore the facts. | Friend, I hate to say it, but this 50-50 toss-up governor’s race is going to come down to fundraising. Reports have shown that in roughly 9 out of every 10 elections across the country, the better-funded candidate wins. And with radical liberal Tony Evers sitting on more than $10.5 MILLION in cash on hand, we can’t afford to come up short at the end of this first quarter. Every month, we set benchmarks to ensure we’re keeping pace with our quarterly goals... ...Because falling behind even one month could allow Tony Evers to take the upper hand and recover from his disastrous poll numbers. That’s why I’m reaching out to every one of our supporters and every grassroots patriot across the country to help ensure we hit our first quarterly goal of the election year. With your help, we will marshal the resources we need to FIRE Evers and take back the battleground state of Wisconsin in 2022. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Add your name: End for-profit immigration detention centers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It's critical we ensure that all detained people no longer endure cruel and inhumane treatment in for-profit detention centers.
#
Peter,
Not long after President Biden was sworn into office, he signed an important executive order ending the Department of Justice’s use of for-profit prisons. **Unfortunately, this executive order did not apply to immigration detention facilities.**
Investigation after investigation and news report after news report has shown the cruel treatment of immigrants in detention centers puts their wellbeing and lives at risk. And yet, Customs Enforcement (ICE) continues to expand its detention system at taxpayers’ expense, including its use of these dangerous facilities.
That’s why Pramila co-led more than 100 of her colleagues in a letter calling on the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and ICE to stop its use of for-profit prisons, review its facilities, and suspend its detention expansion.
[**Can you add your name as a citizen co-signer of this letter demanding an end to for-profit immigration detention centers?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-for-profit-immigration-detention/?source=em20220319-1118&t=1&akid=1118%2E420207%2EX87N9v)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-for-profit-immigration-detention/?source=em20220319-1118&t=2&akid=1118%2E420207%2EX87N9v)**
The immigration detention system is one that has consistently bucked accountability and transparency — **that must end.**
Multiple studies have uncovered horrifying conditions detained people have had to endure, like when a detention center in Georgia came under fire for their reported unnecessary and non-consensual medical procedures performed on women.
Pramila co-led a letter to DHS calling on them to immediately investigate and respond to these accounts, and successfully passed a resolution condemning the unwanted, unnecessary medical procedures performed on women without their full, informed consent.
**But now it’s critical we ensure that all detained people no longer endure cruel and inhumane treatment in for-profit detention centers.** [**If you agree, add your name as a citizen co-signer of Pramila’s letter demanding an end to for-profit immigration detention centers.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-for-profit-immigration-detention/?source=em20220319-1118&t=3&akid=1118%2E420207%2EX87N9v)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-for-profit-immigration-detention/?source=em20220319-1118&t=4&akid=1118%2E420207%2EX87N9v)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220319-1118-footer&t=5&refcode2=1118_420207_X87N9v&akid=1118%2E420207%2EX87N9v)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=1118%2E420207%2EX87N9v)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1118%2E420207%2EX87N9v)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43155690/335963334/683353327?refcode=20220319_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzRmYzMxYy1kNWE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jr51TC89LCtprgHO6IGCcFuG3hbmI689H3XrRgquFaA=) **Friend – I have an urgent update, and I wanted you to hear it from me first:** **1.** NBC News reports that Georgia is the most important swing state in the November elections, which means Senate control could be decided by our race. **2.** Donald Trump just held a megadonor fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago with my potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R), so they can flood this race with MILLIONS to defeat me. **3\. Our people-powered movement is falling short of the resources we need to fight back. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qpcVNRBTtFK6fZY9fY2_6nH6S2utoRfvqikrLr5h0ak=/iFCvC_MxS4M_xx0rBaDFtr8xW_a95DgsFfK0cQIPfds=?refcode=E14639-20220319-Insulin-header-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, Imagine having a child who needs insulin and having no idea how you're going to pay for it. Here in the Valley, that's a reality for too many parents. Insulin prices are simply out of control. Josh has heard from people paying as much as $1,000 a month, even with insurance. And let's be clear why this is happening - corporate greed. A report Josh commissioned found that pharma companies could charge as little as $11 for insulin and still make a profit. Our healthcare system, especially prescription drugs, is completely out of whack, and we refuse to just shrug our shoulders and let it continue. **That 's why Josh is fighting to cap the price of insulin at $35/month. This one change would make a massive difference for millions of families.** 1 in 10 Americans have diabetes. This is an issue that touches just about every single family, and it's completely outrageous that big pharma is price gouging on something our loved ones need to survive. If we could cap the price of insulin, that's hundreds (if not thousands) of dollars per month families could put towards education, food, or a mortgage. It makes a huge difference. [**If you stand with Josh 's push to cap the cost of insulin - and fight back against pharma greed - we'd love to have your support with a grassroots donation.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qpcVNRBTtFK6fZY9fY2_6nH6S2utoRfvqikrLr5h0ak=/iFCvC_MxS4M_xx0rBaDFtr8xW_a95DgsFfK0cQIPfds=?refcode=E14639-20220319-Insulin-SL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/qpcVNRBTtFK6fZY9fY2_6nH6S2utoRfvqikrLr5h0ak=/iFCvC_MxS4M_xx0rBaDFtr8xW_a95DgsFfK0cQIPfds=?express_lane=true&refcode=E14639-20220319-Insulin-EL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

Fellow American,

Today, I am asking for just $2. This is why:

1. Our race in Georgia WILL DETERMINE who controls the Senate majority.
2. The race is a DEAD HEAT. Three recent polls show us leading 47%-44%, 48%-46%, and 49%-48%.
3. Our opponent knows the race is tight, so he is already spending over $3 million on tv ads 8 months before the election!

There's so much at stake, and Democrats in Washington know it too. That's why Democrats are sending millions to our opponent.

He's amassed over $23 million from Democrat megadonors and Hollywood stars - the most in the country.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Reagan=20Project?=
subject: Quit playing catch up
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| ,

This is Jeff - Founder of the Reagan Project. I'll get straight to the point - **our goal is to elect 400 conservatives at all levels of government in just 4 years**. We started the Reagan Project because our party is always playing catch up to the progressive left \- they have numerous organizations recruiting, training, and funding candidates from the local level up, while our bench of good conservative candidates is alarmingly thin.

**The purpose of the Reagan Project is to balance the scales - it's time to build the conservative bench**. There is not one organization on our side that is solely dedicated to preparing our next wave of candidates. We will fill that void.
---
|
---
| [HELP US BUILD THE CONSERVATIVE BENCH](https://reaganproject.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eab6c004629fe6ca434f8be4a&id=f72f8fb22b&e=0dc8615419 "HELP US BUILD THE CONSERVATIVE BENCH")
---
| While other organizations are engaged in just a handful of congressional races this year, we are focused on local, state legislature, and additional congressional races in an effort to build a bench of future conservative leaders.

**With your help, the Reagan Project will prop up conservative candidates in congressional, state legislature, county, and local races through significant independent expenditures and funding. **From school board to City Hall, from the state legislature to the Halls of Congress, patriots will have the financial support they need to win.

**_[But we can't do it alone. We can't do it without funding. Would you be so generous to contribute $25, $50, $100, $250, or any amount you can afford so that we can begin recruiting and funding conservatives for the upcoming mid-term election?](https://reaganproject.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eab6c004629fe6ca434f8be4a&id=e415415462&e=0dc8615419)_**** **

Democrats have a head start. name: Sen. Cortez Masto
subject: I’ve proven them wrong every time.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
The little girl in this photo has no clue what a wild ride life has in store for her.
#

The little girl in this photo has no clue what a wild ride life has in store for her. Right now, all she knows is the joy of weekend camping with her family, tearing into her mom’s homemade meatballs, and begging her dad to buy her a dirt bike.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ccm-split?refcode=em220319-1-MA&refcode2=557.357359.-Rn2qp&t=1&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp)
Her dad raised her on three principles: work hard, be honest, and respect everyone. She spent her life watching him pour his heart into bettering his community, and she became a first-generation college graduate and pursued a career in law to protect that community.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ccm-split?refcode=em220319-1-MA&refcode2=557.357359.-Rn2qp&t=2&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp)
She went on to be elected Nevada’s Attorney General just as the 2008 financial crisis wreaked havoc on America’s middle-class families and our economy. She took on the Big Banks with a fellow Attorney General from California and secured $1.9 billion in relief for Nevada homeowners.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ccm-split?refcode=em220319-1-MA&refcode2=557.357359.-Rn2qp&t=3&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp)
In 2016, she would make history as the first woman from Nevada and first Latina ever elected to the United States Senate. The odds were stacked against her, and many said she had no chance of winning. Mitch McConnell and the GOP spent nearly $50 million to defeat her, but her grassroots team stood by her every step of the way.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ccm-split?refcode=em220319-1-MA&refcode2=557.357359.-Rn2qp&t=4&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp)
My story is one of community. It made me who I am today and it’s why I fight so hard for Nevada in the Senate. But I was just declared “the most vulnerable Democratic Senator” in the entire country, and Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate is leading me by 3 points in the polls.
[**Can you split a $10 donation right now between my campaign and Cheri Beasley’s in North Carolina to help defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent and defend the Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ccm-split?refcode=em220319-1-MA&refcode2=557.357359.-Rn2qp&t=5&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp)
From college, to the courtroom, to the U.S. Senate — people have doubted that a Latina could compete and overcome the odds to win. I’ve proven them wrong every time, and I know that with your help, I can do it again.
My race will be one of the closest in the country and Nevada will be crucial for control of the Senate. GOP outside groups have already spent over $4 million to defeat me and flip the one seat they need to take back the Senate.
[**I need your help to close this polling gap and defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent. Please, donate $10 right now to help me and Cheri win in Nevada and North Carolina to defend the Democratic Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ccm-split?refcode=em220319-1-MA&refcode2=557.357359.-Rn2qp&t=6&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp)
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine
P.S. My dad eventually bought me that dirt bike.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ccm-split?refcode=em220319-1-MA&refcode2=557.357359.-Rn2qp&t=7&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=557_357359_-Rn2qp&akid=557%2E357359%2E-Rn2qp) today to help us make history.

Peter, A few days ago, we received new details about what Kyrsten Sinema has been saying behind her closed-door fundraisers, which are primarily attended by GOP lobbyists. And unsurprisingly, Peter — it’s pretty ugly stuff. Right after we shared these shocking revelations, we had one of our best fundraising days this month. Despite this, though, **we’re already seeing our fundraising tick back down** — when we need to continue keeping up the pressure and momentum. **[We need to keep up this surge in donations to show Kyrsten Sinema we don’t stand for this behavior — especially as new allegations come to light. Please rush a donation of $5 today to help ensure we have the resources to primary Kyrsten Sinema and replace her with a real Democrat.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS7bQmpX0OvymsCaYF8dj1ILYbj6jQmeokyoo3rYSWTvATH3MN95vVyZ4ihz3_UJESG3LcB3mCOkgeIalXFt9A4yI4wDKlWAzKBY3b1vryT2wU2URrAZ1xcflJGyddZrQQl23OJyN-ezhLOZwX9gslvAVZHfX5u0aKD3ZXIKBRcmI0GFvdqXqlnKCWAbjCMWKDMASxu-tGaDCRXC3Tp2H5RzTNnZDCuctjh0TVm2V4wZtVTuTq0WYMbDQ9RKBANjFVvTWvI_gTav6Ty8flHbWCKb-Mcu8iB-C3jAbqjDzByKBEa8mMQoR62c6Fiwtgt6Dkzx7be3IbJMFYD7o_QzNyJ6PkjIAd2gljDmlQZrmDJ-S7-44IR9senbd3x4NHWXm2/3kh/xZ_aZT96QMS1PC-ElrTPNw/h1/v20n4wvADlPOXLJm1E8MA8TTyPvXuiF-PIiPomyLEys)** **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS7bQmpX0OvymsCaYF8dj1ILYbj6jQmeokyoo3rYSWTvCyJBK5v0OfUadbBhHf5Jpq4KrW0UoBIevv5TjgdTBVfJDXfRG_KPTGD-2ITo1RnI-BhRkEqcI_v-K_EVvUTn4UehBUTB4ojqmHYICEJpBgjdpNX-zp2C4BOFG4YuTHoSQ6O-1IlHEzTYudT_hDxSSvxkJM7lW_bcB_GhOgWfpmXm8EGnyU-KoUu6alTNWqTAk6P2062vvHlSym6mhBiGbQ6vVAWmuSI__ImGFWs7FWKRruR_0dE7_zFhZqjs9re2qV7BsOjXOY1oV1bZ6XQuiFj5nHDRZn_h_NCZKIur5d-sKh90rsETM9acCqtpexhkSJUP5W0qhVD1dXgaHk2IPH/3kh/xZ_aZT96QMS1PC-ElrTPNw/h2/Jgj4PYfY530WC3NClSh8f8pSDT4JR5Ih7pfY3AWbdg8)** From making fun of President Biden, to openly praising GOP Representatives Kevin McCarthy and Andy Biggs — the latter who is one of the chief proponents of Trump’s Big Lie and claimed that Black Lives Matter was behind the January 6th insurrection. body:
The Post and Courier Editorial | | |
---

---
| | Hi Friends,

I wrote an editorial about our border and illegal immigration in [The Post and Courier](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=b83c31e56d&e=bb02dd73bf) on 3/17. Please post, like, share and comment on social media with the link above and on my social media platforms.

**Upcoming Events:**
* Edisto Beach One4Coffee House 22 March 5PM, 114 Jungle Rd Unit F, Edisto Island
* Candidate Forum - 2 April 830AM-10AM American Legion Post 166, 116 Howe Hall Rd Goose Creek.
* 3rd Thursday downtown Summerville at Hutchinson Square 5PM to 7PM, wear Centurion T-shirt, get names on clip boards. Pass out flyers.
* N Charleston Rotary - 2 May 12:00PM Hilton Garden 5265 International Blvd, N Charleston.

---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY (FULL FORCE) :
1\. Communicate with the Campaign. Tell us you're showing up so we can assign you a duty.
2\. Host a House Party.
3\. Let us know if you need a Sign.
4\. We are Door Knocking. Let us know when you can walk with us. **

body:
It means the world to have you by my side
| | |
---
Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43156334/335966346/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2685-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWIyMzAzNi1kZGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XdJqjlMDOSJ5cECnNWflKxgyc-utYC6bGZfrKzdnCHk=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson of my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to being representative of my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow .12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43156335/335966347/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2685-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWIyMzAzNi1kZGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XdJqjlMDOSJ5cECnNWflKxgyc-utYC6bGZfrKzdnCHk=)**
Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings

I’ve shared with you my personal infertility journey in the past, and today I would like to share a painful piece of that journey.

It's been a difficult road of fertility treatments as I’ve tried to sustain a pregnancy. Despite that, I had an abortion, because I had an ectopic pregnancy—and it could have killed me.

My pregnancy, even if I carried it out as best I could, wouldn’t have been viable. My doctors and I chose to end my pregnancy to get my life out of danger and give me the best chance of keeping a pregnancy in the future.

It was the hardest choice to make and I can’t imagine the GOP making that choice for me. [**_We need more Congresswomen who will protect reproductive rights. If you agree, will you pitch in $27 to my campaign today? >>_**](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/4a5ITp4l7cLdOAkaTMGUuA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkGLb9P0TSaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDMxOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9yZXByb2R1Y3RpdmVqdXN0X2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTI2Y0xlMHVmbVh0ZlVzME4yUVFLRmpXMDd6aSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yNmNMZTB1Zm1YdGZVczBOMlFRS0ZqVzA3emkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjZjTGUwdWZtWHRmVXMwTjJRUUtGalcwN3ppVwNzcGNCCmIq_TE2Yn10OpJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw) | [ ](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/4a5ITp4l7cLdOAkaTMGUuA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkGLb9P0TSaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDMxOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9yZXByb2R1Y3RpdmVqdXN0X2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTI2Y0xlMHVmbVh0ZlVzME4yUVFLRmpXMDd6aSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yNmNMZTB1Zm1YdGZVczBOMlFRS0ZqVzA3emkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjZjTGUwdWZtWHRmVXMwTjJRUUtGalcwN3ppVwNzcGNCCmIq_TE2Yn10OpJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw)

This difficult journey is why the GOP should not be forcing women to carry dangerous pregnancies to signal their own virtue.

We must codify Roe v. Wade at the federal level and get GOP legislators out of OBGYN offices. I own my own body, and I will not sit by while people are threatened with imprisonment for protecting their health and their lives.

**That’s why I’m proud to be the candidate in NC-4 endorsed by VoteProChoice, an organization that is fighting everyday to protect reproductive rights.** [**_We can’t let the GOP take away our reproductive rights. clean_body: | | I’ve shared with you my personal infertility journey in the past, and today I would like to share a painful piece of that journey. It's been a difficult road of fertility treatments as I’ve tried to sustain a pregnancy. Despite that, I had an abortion, because I had an ectopic pregnancy—and it could have killed me. My pregnancy, even if I carried it out as best I could, wouldn’t have been viable. My doctors and I chose to end my pregnancy to get my life out of danger and give me the best chance of keeping a pregnancy in the future. It was the hardest choice to make and I can’t imagine the GOP making that choice for me. | ---|--- This difficult journey is why the GOP should not be forcing women to carry dangerous pregnancies to signal their own virtue. We must codify Roe v. Wade at the federal level and get GOP legislators out of OBGYN offices. I own my own body, and I will not sit by while people are threatened with imprisonment for protecting their health and their lives. That’s why I’m proud to be the candidate in NC-4 endorsed by VoteProChoice, an organization that is fighting everyday to protect reproductive rights. | | | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ Thank you for reading this, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on our team. Thank you, Nida Allam | 6409 Fayetteville Rd Ste 120-378 Durham, NC 27713 Paid for by Nida for NC Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m about to tell you something you’re not expecting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Allow me to speak my truth.
#
Derek, I'm coming to you today to personally ask if you'll **[chip in your first $5 to our campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45475?refcode=em20220319-5044&t=1&akid=5044%2E434096%2EmWWQQU)** Before I get to that, I'd like to share something with you that I'll admit is a bit unconventional:
**I'm about to tell you why NOT to vote for me.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45475?refcode=em20220319-5044&t=2&akid=5044%2E434096%2EmWWQQU)
I know this isn't exactly your typical politician's stump speech, but please allow me to speak my truth:
No disrespect – although it may be perceived that way – but if Senators Manchin or Sinema are your ideal Senators, then I am *not* your candidate.
If you are looking for a candidate that had to "evolve" on core issues like the $15 minimum wage, then don't vote for me.
If you want a candidate that has outdated views on marijuana, then you and I might have to agree to disagree.
If what you think our democracy needs in this pivotal moment is a candidate who's going to get compliments from Mitch McConnell and his sedition-curious GOP, then I am quite simply not your guy.
Here's the thing, Derek: Right now, there are Democrats in the Senate who have chosen to stand in the way of bold, transformative, and once-in-a-lifetime legislation. Policies that have the power to lift millions of working people out of poverty, and that actually deliver on President Biden's agenda for American families.
It is my solemn pledge to you that I will not be one of those kinds of Senators. I will *always* act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of our Commonwealth.
**Derek, if you want a Democrat that you can depend on, that you know is always going to stand up and fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am humbly asking for your support in our campaign.**
**[So, if you're still in my corner after reading this note, then I must ask: Will you chip in anything you can today to support our grassroots campaign? I can't get to the Senate on my own — I'm relying on all of yinz to have my back as we fight together to flip this seat blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45475?refcode=em20220319-5044&t=3&akid=5044%2E434096%2EmWWQQU)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45475?refcode=em20220319-5044&amounts=5&t=22&akid=5044%2E434096%2EmWWQQU)**
If you give me your vote now, then you’ll always have mine in the Senate. You will always be able to depend on me to have your back and fight for you when I am in Washington.
Thank you for everything, Derek.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. **I know my campaign and I come to you often to ask for your support, and here's the honest reason why: With tens of millions of dollars being spent by my opponents, we're gearing up for one of the most competitive — and most expensive — races in Pennsylvania's history. I've refused to accept a cent of corporate PAC money, so I'm relying on folks like you.** **[Will you chip in your first $5 or more to our campaign if you're committed to flipping this seat blue in 2022?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45475?refcode=em20220319-5044&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=5044%2E434096%2EmWWQQU)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220319-5044-footer&t=24&refcode2=5044_434096_mWWQQU&akid=5044%2E434096%2EmWWQQU)**
