clean_body: Allow me to speak my truth. Derek, I'm coming to you today to personally ask if you'll Before I get to that, I'd like to share something with you that I'll admit is a bit unconventional: I'm about to tell you why NOT to vote for me. I know this isn't exactly your typical politician's stump speech, but please allow me to speak my truth: No disrespect – although it may be perceived that way – but if Senators Manchin or Sinema are your ideal Senators, then I am not your candidate. If you are looking for a candidate that had to "evolve" on core issues like the $15 minimum wage, then don't vote for me. If you want a candidate that has outdated views on marijuana, then you and I might have to agree to disagree. If what you think our democracy needs in this pivotal moment is a candidate who's going to get compliments from Mitch McConnell and his sedition-curious GOP, then I am quite simply not your guy. Here's the thing, Derek: Right now, there are Democrats in the Senate who have chosen to stand in the way of bold, transformative, and once-in-a-lifetime legislation. Policies that have the power to lift millions of working people out of poverty, and that actually deliver on President Biden's agenda for American families. It is my solemn pledge to you that I will not be one of those kinds of Senators. I will always act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of our Commonwealth. Derek, if you want a Democrat that you can depend on, that you know is always going to stand up and fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am humbly asking for your support in our campaign. If you give me your vote now, then you’ll always have mine in the Senate. You will always be able to depend on me to have your back and fight for you when I am in Washington. Thank you for everything, Derek. John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania P.S. I know my campaign and I come to you often to ask for your support, and here's the honest reason why: With tens of millions of dollars being spent by my opponents, we're gearing up for one of the most competitive — and most expensive — races in Pennsylvania's history. I've refused to accept a cent of corporate PAC money, so I'm relying on folks like you. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
| Peter,

I’ve got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: **_ Do you MISS ME YET? _**

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. _Guess what?_ _I was right!_ I hate to say it, but I was right.

**It’s painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that’s what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.**

**[Take a moment to let me know if you miss me](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88dd3b2fbad84c25a14faa696ac4e204&_e=1w2BV-OkJK6PnsETt18D0eDwAX_PokyeEu_QgkyEeOSYgkJAOZwf_zmhtHiT08MxiUUk7ccSu7fpLYmlrsool3oNWCQqgLn6ixDhDETkaQ0k5d7zOwhtwiSrGLzLzRHSPiv-TvYSv4g94ZUADDeOzAv6Ur09_FgVC9HBkjctb8nWXh2whdyf4qfCa4fKBIfjzvAwRX6CFjNlUvMziTiQ-WOV-eneXhFxeyheO2PG8PQy44O4Nh8e-HhiM8jG-zZ8EchKAcrovtSxVJXI0CLugWR6zIsS7Q3kvUPwfB-9pxYZQuhwVyxyW3KlOGs6SXqpZ-HdMOjpg4TuFkPSdn3Y8cyDHyy4VbAj8TRZ-dZpIPRpk-a4t4cZfLZ_AiEuALaJmi-97tp-byiVxX4koeIMGCQAX44B4pLqfhDg4qIwXpj6tLSIjVECy_5xcZbu4rAaRffEQJbU72U7Om1UseiZLiFyy8qCPRLt0epZxgaui3A%3D)** and the **AMERICA FIRST** policies my team and I put into place during our **FOUR GLORIOUS years in the White House.**

[**< < MISS ME YET? LET ME KNOW >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88dd3b2fbad84c25a14faa696ac4e204&_e=1w2BV-OkJK6PnsETt18D0eDwAX_PokyeEu_QgkyEeOSYgkJAOZwf_zmhtHiT08MxiUUk7ccSu7fpLYmlrsool3oNWCQqgLn6ixDhDETkaQ0k5d7zOwhtwiSrGLzLzRHSPiv-TvYSv4g94ZUADDeOzAv6Ur09_FgVC9HBkjctb8nWXh2whdyf4qfCa4fKBIfjzvAwRX6CFjNlUvMziTiQ-WOV-eneXhFxeyheO2PG8PQy44O4Nh8e-HhiM8jG-zZ8EchKAcrovtSxVJXI0CLugQOsVMZxI-hTcXphuc4eQhmyds4V5m0fh-G2RzDloxukdXgvIdFOsEzgKygEtXMyaJTNwg3TyJCEtf9qJLZrTgGQ5yUmYr0iy7rc4Sy_AM8wItmXMrTcXfxvWkq1jxdclWCMOrcbG7SPODeg8gh4t6HoZoABMfqTyglQWXlRiBDxRmmZQsHpVXl0LsaOIi6Cw1E3_U5IKu9JQUXmCDlZPP0%3D)

**I’d like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT** so don’t wait – let us know if you want us back in office.

I’d ask my supporters the same question I’m asking you now on Twitter, but Jack DORSEY banned me because he didn’t like what I had to say!

_Wonder why he hasn’t banned Putin yet ..._

Thanks for your support,

body:
Reeves Campaign Statement Following the Virginia Guardians and Warriors PAC Forum
| | |

| | [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100017fa3d6f432-492a9374-f546-4808-a890-fcb9ad7b166b-000000/CZNRgEr97KW1gC6eEQIibN_Eixs=262)

| |

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact: Jimmy Spinella Media@BryceReeves.com **Reeves Campaign Statement Following the Virginia Guardians and Warriors PAC Forum** **Culpeper, VA - March 19th, 2022 -** Following this morning's candidate forum, hosted by the Virginia Guardians and Warriors PAC in Culpeper, Team Reeves had the following to say: “Senator Bryce Reeves was the unmistakable victor of today's forum. Despite all the other candidates in attendance lobbing attacks at the frontrunner, Senator Reeves was able to rise above the fray, make the case for his consistently solid voting record, and highlight his ability to be a day one impact player in the House of Representatives. The voters now have a clear choice to make in this election, and if they want to make sure we can defeat Congresswoman Spanberger and have someone ready to go toe-to-toe against President Biden, Bryce Reeves has made it obvious that he is the only option.” ### Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, auxiliary sheriff’s deputy in Culpeper County, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. He currently represents the 17th District in the Virginia Senate, which includes the City of Fredericksburg and the Counties of Albemarle (part), Culpeper (part), Louisa (part), Orange, and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is the Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County.
---

Fellow American,

My name is Scott, and I’m the campaign manager for Team Herschel.

You’ve probably received an email or two from our team letting you know that Herschel Walker is running for the Senate. _**However, I’m reaching out today to take the opportunity to address you directly.**_

**[I want to let you know just how important the month of March is for our campaign.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=52b57d828108492498e60dd85a218422&_e=rc81jXw7WpZrdIqsicOLfQMakw5PxBFOl6ZpzIPgdZjA7Z38NWpNrIUFmvoPAenGMAasf4fTNquUIFwtDvz3EoZHdHPEEr53hVTH4_wTtdbjJy82Vmz0ch79jNJmYCMUofGaxllbzYHGjOZU2kapKwBMNIi3x5iARCokQ_t9U0a7nawFqzTq6tg9_KotcpJzhrnVmGmwFMmfxG5YXFTPMptlBHIZ6AGOXrumkuR9wUVMS4_7N9Eo0PQV7UTkA-mkOdkgJ0swAErqKKEuuTLbWXYH3jjK-p7SQN0jTUz4fs_dxw3l5iUAqRilwr7xLAgoAubzVhXQ2ZkoiRrJMufntf1L2Y_wlva7FIpQ9RgTNT_Gm5g8J583F9H69zrTCymHauUv7chU9KEXSmqfirO4kzfAA1ZoXotXolt7EoY9rYsnLQL3NUcdAxLXUmX_dKemu6TVncI2ntl-DcPlSaCpIQ%3D%3D)**

On the first day of every month, we sit down as a team to update our campaign’s goals. As we were sitting down together around our conference table _this month_ , I stressed to our team that **we’re approaching the end of the 1st quarter of 2022.** In the political world, that’s when most political campaigns kick into a higher gear (not that we weren’t already in a high gear, but you get my point).

**To be frank with you, our list of supporters isn’t where we need it to be.** Come June, if our list is the size it is today, we will not be able to raise the amount of money or turn out the number of voters we’re going to need to win this CRITICAL SENATE race.

**[For this reason, over the course of the next month, we need to add 25,000 new supporters to our list](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=52b57d828108492498e60dd85a218422&_e=rc81jXw7WpZrdIqsicOLfQMakw5PxBFOl6ZpzIPgdZjA7Z38NWpNrIUFmvoPAenGMAasf4fTNquUIFwtDvz3EoZHdHPEEr53hVTH4_wTtdbjJy82Vmz0ch79jNJmYCMUofGaxllbzYHGjOZU2kapKwBMNIi3x5iARCokQ_t9U0a7nawFqzTq6tg9_KotcpJzhrnVmGmwFMmfxG5YXFTPMptlBHIZ6AGOXrumkuR9wUVMS4_7N9Eo0PQV7UTkA-mkSvXrqwcSt4ZnZH8uIn-NMw2UGtoRhVbIkYQcUVzQ0-OlUqY9ZUdICY0i7lrYIbYSKX1gjBenjBDaVl3znT2HOIHHqaPA5L5TnGZUHIJluNfS0TkxivnJOA_Cak5cl-TpbrGHnPXFI0Il7mUs3jO1lbrKRylD_KDwVZyIs9OnNBD_F8RcWYuas19ObjRDt_1UeLCtIHX-H8RV7QHRxuJ9cQ%3D%3D)**. If you’ve previously offered your support to our campaign, would you please reaffirm your commitment today? If you haven’t yet responded or engaged with our communications thus far, would you please take action today?

**Signal Your Support for Team Herschel Today** [** Join our growing list of supporters -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=52b57d828108492498e60dd85a218422&_e=rc81jXw7WpZrdIqsicOLfQMakw5PxBFOl6ZpzIPgdZjA7Z38NWpNrIUFmvoPAenGMAasf4fTNquUIFwtDvz3EoZHdHPEEr53hVTH4_wTtdbjJy82Vmz0ch79jNJmYCMUofGaxllbzYHGjOZU2kapKwBMNIi3x5iARCokQ_t9U0a7nawFqzTq6tg9_KotcpJzhrnVmGmwFMmfxG5YXFTPMptlBHIZ6AGOXrumkuR9wUVMS4_7N9Eo0PQV7UTkA-mkcHxJCiKif-vBtKi6bJUIX_qAD1iW2k10fP4KYdoElEBIFH3S_v64S3RQgPzBUh32qImcuJ6kuCAaIsrKq2dFeoVq8OrBVMa_V8Gpkhf70A8tsEOUOUl70YpE0fIoeihrY3JW-oC3q56dgMXShPnftQl8QQAgz7VP0CxjxW3_zTworGoMuXumWZnT2A9cnRkRVqvYk4lFQwJwdpomwZs05g%3D%3D) **[Reaffirm your commitment to Team Herschel!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=52b57d828108492498e60dd85a218422&_e=rc81jXw7WpZrdIqsicOLfQMakw5PxBFOl6ZpzIPgdZjA7Z38NWpNrIUFmvoPAenGMAasf4fTNquUIFwtDvz3EoZHdHPEEr53hVTH4_wTtdbjJy82Vmz0ch79jNJmYCMUofGaxllbzYHGjOZU2kapKwBMNIi3x5iARCokQ_t9U0a7nawFqzTq6tg9_KotcpJzhrnVmGmwFMmfxG5YXFTPMptlBHIZ6AGOXrumkuR9wUVMS4_7N9Eo0PQV7UTkA-mkd4EMDpBqvmBOK1UfYSJN2oYfJfHycA1jWjYYTCFTt3d3mu5loUfQxQ1eSfmDebPDUaW5SqTu-5KyPOQsBYHoYDQp6YGlrKgQEz8DheGmsQVPY0YrFFm1KKVNv6iWK4-jjmhTJebHSjjJ3JUfAaabi69X8VD_3XB_bs6qhBiXf9H1VYd9wBzCR0e6O9eTQyKPmFHCCwThjHt9rYhjxmkxeg%3D%3D)**
We’ll be in touch to give you a progress update. Please know that the future of the country depends on the outcome of this race.

Come June, if our list is the size it is today, we will not be able to raise the amount of money or turn out the number of voters we’re going to need to win this CRITICAL SENATE race. . If you’ve previously offered your support to our campaign, would you please reaffirm your commitment today? If you haven’t yet responded or engaged with our communications thus far, would you please take action today? Signal Your Support for Team Herschel Today We’ll be in touch to give you a progress update. Please know that the future of the country depends on the outcome of this race. We really need your input and your buy-in, Sincerely, Scott Paradise Campaign Manager Team Herschel P.S. What’s stopping you from joining our team right now? | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

**The Allegheny-Fayette Central Labor Council just endorsed Chris for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 17th District!**

Chris has always stood with the labor movement and workers, and this endorsement is a testament to the strength of our people-powered movement of, by, and for working Pennsylvanians.
The fact is we cannot win a general election without strong labor support, and Chris is the only union-backed candidate who can keep PA-17 blue and hold our House majority.

body:
This is too important
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1546%2E878179%2ETCUKXs)
---
_We reached out Thursday,_ _We reached out Friday,_ **_AND NOW we’re reaching out AGAIN on Saturday..._** That’s how important it is that we act IMMEDIATELY to REVERSE Senator Warnock’s decline in the polls! [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7133?t=7&akid=1546%2E878179%2ETCUKXs) Team, Senator Warnock has been one of the loudest and bravest voices in the Senate to protect our voting rights. **_But he’s also one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!_** WE CAN’T LOSE HIM. [**So we’re SCRAMBLING to hit our $50,000 goal before midnight – can we count on your $5 donation to SAVE Democrats like Warnock?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7133?t=8&akid=1546%2E878179%2ETCUKXs) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7134?t=9&akid=1546%2E878179%2ETCUKXs)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1546%2E878179%2ETCUKXs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1546%2E878179%2ETCUKXs).**

name: Team Lira
subject: 1 day left
body:
Peter, we only have 1 day left until we need to hit our March Mid Month goal, so we’ll keep this quick.

Your donations fuel us to keep going. It allows us to afford the resources we need to keep fighting for Texans and win this district back for the people.

But your donations also make sure we are staying on track for our most important month yet — our first End of Quarter deadline at the end of this month.

Hitting this goal would put us in a place to not only hit our goal, but smash it out of the park.

Can you help us make an even deeper dent in our March Mid Month goal of $10,000 before the end of the week? We want to make sure we have the financial fighting power we need going into our general election season.

It’s not an easy feat to run a grassroots-funded campaign that depends on the generosity of supporters like you, Peter — but we wouldn’t do it any other way.

It allows John to focus on the people, and ONLY the people — not special interests or corporations trying to buy their way into influencing Washington.

Help us hit our March Mid Month goal now by chipping in what you can today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220319?refcode=em20220319]

Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States

name: Rick Scott
subject: You deserve to know this:
body:
Peter, _For too long, Republicans have gone into election years without releasing a plan to govern._

_You deserve better than that._

Americans shouldn’t just elect us and “hope for the best” - they need to know what we’ll do when we’re given the chance to govern.

**Our future CAN be bright - and I put together an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA and keep our nation strong for the next generation.**

_But we can’t put that plan into action without your help._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: Win Dinner with Joe Kent
body:
Dear Supporter,

The quarterly deadline is coming up at the end of the month and we need every contribution we can get to help us overcome the millions of dollars my RINO, Trump-Impeaching opponent Jaime Herrera Beutler is collecting from corporate lobbyists.

To help us meet our goals, we're offering you the chance to win dinner with me in Washington State. We will fly the contest winner out to my district where you'll join me for a meal and then attend one of our campaign rallies. We provide all necessary accommodations, too.

To enter, please donate whatever you can afford by March 31st at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/contest.

Thank you and I look forward to meeting the winner as we get closer to victory!

Respectfully,

Joe Kent

PS - Enter today to win a trip to Washington State to have dinner with me and attend a campaign rally. Donate what you can at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/contest for a chance to win.

_Team, this week is one of the most important weeks for voting rights in Arizona in decades._ Unable to prove voter fraud in the 2020 elections, the AZ GOP has launched a full attack on early voting and PEVL at the Arizona Supreme Court. Arguments before the court are due this week!

The vast majority of Arizona voters approve of and use early voting and mail-in voting. And the **AZ GOP has been fine with it for decades until we defeated Trump in 2020.**

**_This is the most serious attack on voting rights the AZ GOP has launched so far._**

In response, **we’re mobilizing everything we have here at AZ Dems, including intervening in the AZ GOP’s lawsuit. That’s how important we think protecting voting rights is.**

**[Team, can you contribute $10 now to help us mobilize against these voting rights attacks? We quickly mobilized everything we have to fight this lawsuit, and we’re incurring unplanned expenses because of it. name: James Carville
subject: we’re screwed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2849%2E3611125%2EFSOLbb ][IMG]

Folks,

I’m not exaggerating: if we lose our Senate majority, we’re all screwed.
Our priorities—democracy, a livable planet, you name it—all go down the
toilet.

Either we win in Ohio and secure a Democratic Senate that passes
meaningful legislation, or we lose and hand over the gavel to Mitch
McConnell.

Look, this
isn’t my first rodeo. I’ve seen enough to know this race is as tough as it
gets—but I can also tell you that Tim Ryan is the real deal. And he can
win this seat, with your help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9184?t=1015&amount=25&akid=2849%2E3611125%2EFSOLbb ]Don’t let Mitch McConnell take back control of the Senate! Instead, put
him on his heels and defend our Senate majority by chipping in $25 or more
to Tim’s campaign.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9184?t=1016&amount=25&akid=2849%2E3611125%2EFSOLbb ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9184?t=1017&amount=50&akid=2849%2E3611125%2EFSOLbb ]Donate $50

Make no mistake, Mitch McConnell has his eyes fixed squarely on Ohio’s
open Senate seat, and his billionaire buddies are already opening up their
oversized wallets to back another GOP corporate raider.

I cannot stress this enough: Ohio will determine Senate control, you can
bet on it.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9184?t=1022&amount=25&akid=2849%2E3611125%2EFSOLbb ]If you don’t want to wake up on November 9th to a post-democracy
nightmare, here’s your chance to make a difference—rush a donation to
elect Tim Ryan to the Senate and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

James Carville

name: Team Beto
subject: Canadian, TX (population 3,029)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We don't take a single dollar for granted.
#
On this grassroots-funded campaign, we don’t take a single dollar for granted.
With less than eight months until Election Day, we are putting all the resources we have into rallying support for Beto, reaching Texans where they live, and having as many face-to-face conversations as possible about our big, unifying vision for Texas.
Right now we’re focused on building the largest and best organizing program Texas has ever seen — but we simply can’t pull it off without strong grassroots support from folks like you.
**[Can you make a contribution of $3 right now? Every dollar donated today will help us reach our goal of organizing in all 254 Texas counties.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54061?refcode=ema20220319-181161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=181161%2E444211%2Ex9tb_e)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54061?refcode=ema20220319-181161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=181161%2E444211%2Ex9tb_e)**
As soon as the primary election was over, Beto and our campaign team hit the road for another drive across Texas to meet with, listen to, and learn from the folks that Beto will serve as governor. Take a look at our most recent campaign stops:
* Weatherford, Population: 30,895
* Olney, Population: 3,117
* Vernon, Population: 10,509
* Childress, Population: 6,201
* Canadian, Population: 3,029

Not many campaigns visit towns this small. Not many campaigns visit historically "red" counties for that matter. _But Beto believes in going everywhere and talking to everyone, writing nobody off, and taking nobody for granted._
You and your fellow supporters make this all possible — and you're the ones who will decide whether we can keep this momentum on the road going.
[Please, if you want Beto to win this race and get Texas back on track, will you consider chipping in $3 now to help us build organizing programs that reach Texans in all 254 counties?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54061?refcode=ema20220319-181161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=181161%2E444211%2Ex9tb_e)
Together, we will reach a historic number of new voters, defeat Greg Abbott, and elect a leader who serves all the people of this state.
Thanks for being with us,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220319-181161-footer&t=22&refcode2=181161_444211_x9tb_e&akid=181161%2E444211%2Ex9tb_e)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=181161%2E444211%2Ex9tb_e)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=181161%2E444211%2Ex9tb_e)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Andras via, CoraforMontana.com
subject: re: Cora’s birthday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
Cora’s birthday is tomorrow, and I know she’d love to see your name on her birthday card. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43155682/335963270/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWZjZmFiMC1kNGE3LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5qEVn-RtZ98xHhQBknh3t42ykwvCJQDigd6BkIx5BVU=) Hi friend, I know you haven't heard from me for a while, but I wanted to take a moment to express how amazed I've been by the outpouring of support we've seen for my wife's campaign.

Between all the campaign stops, fundraising events, and meetings, it's clear that something special is happening in Montana. name: Peter Welch
subject: Bringing the Vermont way to Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
This is a longer email, but I hope you’ll read it.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
Hello,
I always wish Washington were more like Vermont—and that includes the U.S. Senate.
You know, I used to serve in the Vermont State Senate. I learned a ton about what it means to represent our communities as a public servant. And I was able to work with liberal Democrats and conservative Republicans who united behind what was best for Vermont families.
I wouldn’t be where I am today without those experiences, and if we win this race, I would work to bring the Vermont way—respect, cooperation, and trust—to the U.S. Senate. But first, we need to keep building our strong grassroots coalition, which could use your continued support.
[**Can you chip in $15 to our Senate campaign and help defend and expand our Senate majority?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1627?t=3&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1627?t=14&amount=3&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1627?t=16&amount=15&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1627?t=18&amount=28&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1627?t=20&amount=50&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1627?t=10&amount=100&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1627?t=12&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
---

---
After helping flip the Vermont State Senate blue, I had the honor of serving as its first Democratic President pro tem. Years later, when I was Senate leader again under a Republican governor, some of my Democratic colleagues wanted us to focus on giving him a hard time. But I reminded them that we’d been elected by the same voters who’d picked the governor, and _it wouldn’t have been fair to Vermont families to prioritize political bashing over progress._
Now, we’ve got to make sure Mitch McConnell doesn’t take back control in Washington. We saw what he did to President Obama after taking back the Senate—all obstruction, all the time. We can’t let him do the same to President Biden. In a way, I’ve been in his shoes—and I’ve made a very different choice.
This seat could be the difference between moving forward on our progressive future—and handing it all back to Mitch McConnell. With our democracy at stake, the choice couldn’t be any clearer, but we still have to do the work to win it. That’s why we’re building the largest grassroots movement possible to win this election, and you’re playing an important role.
[**Please consider a $15 contribution today to help bring the Vermont way to Washington.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1627?t=7&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
Thank you,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22mar?refcode=em_20220317_f_r_mm3&refcode2=138_61531_jLRaf7&akid=138%2E61531%2EjLRaf7)
---

---

---|---|---

PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477

clean_body: What a surprise, my opponent accepted thousands of dollars from Nancy Pelosi after promising not to. Peter, We must be doing something right, Peter. This is just par for the course for Kim “ pants on fire ” Schrier, who promised inflation would just be temporary, then openly admitted that her party’s out-of-control spending spree was driving inflation. The only explanation for this one is she knows we’re hot on her trail, and she’s getting desperate. name: Kelly Cooper for Congress
subject: I'm Stepping Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kelly Cooper for Congress
body:
You don't want to miss this.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001poLvmybAE23kX1Q19M6nxqX6vLF-yDRq9DUkU6GtnAkl_30oy3OCczFuj5LsC7Ji8VZ8WtTkX07YY3BtiCklTm9j_oobJLDh_eUdwPPvrIbeIwqOxmuc4WCmj9_z0fkRm1-JhDxRmQ0l6hGtyO2Q06PULK0nC1oN&c=Tn9VaebfZs2bajWZrPw-ZyLBdMvRsP-Lk1RXztSsxhDXjuy_sc3DXg==&ch=L1_aY_0T1E4W9npHvjtnQt3wZHJiRoxpsxDKt2Yg-UtQXZaFCYzNnA==)

---
Our politicians have forgotten that they work for us - WE are the ones who bankroll their salary!
My name's Kelly Cooper, and as a father, husband, Marine, and restaurant owner, I know the meaning of service. That's why I'm positive that we can no longer put up with the incompetence of our current political leaders - we need a change of pace in order to get back to our elected officials actually serving our interests!
For that reason, I'm stepping up myself and running for Congress in Arizona's 4th District \- my goal is to get to work serving Arizona and America with the honest, hard-working leadership that we've been severely deprived of.
You see, here in Arizona right now, everyday citizens are getting tired of what out-of-touch politicians have been cooking up...
Our state's inflation rate? It's HIGHER than the national average...
Our food prices? The highest they've been in a decade!
And when pizza and chicken wings cost more to make, menu prices go up. Restaurants DON'T actually make more money, and you DON'T get a better product - you just have to pay more to eat dinner with your family.
Small businesses and our economy suffer, too - unemployment has SKYROCKETED because Democrats have been paying folks to stay home while labor shortages are seen in kitchens across our state and country.
Since these problems are a direct result of failures from politicians who WE pay, don't you think it's time for something to change?
I do - that's why I decided to take a stand and run for Congress. I hope the great people of Arizona will hire me, and that concerned citizens like you will support me along the way, so that we can get prosperity back on the plate.
Thank You! Kelly Cooper
Republican Candidate for Congress Arizona's 4th Congressional District
